perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a group of four (two women and two young boys) posing in front of a stone monument for Katsuoji Temple. (2) Fast-paced shots show numerous red Daruma dolls of various sizes placed around the temple grounds and a sign showing admission fees. (3) A young boy in a colorful jacket poses and points at Daruma dolls on a wooden ledge. (4) The main female creator, wearing a beige trench coat, speaks to the camera near a pond with a pagoda in the background. (5) The two boys run through a large red temple gate. (6) A creative shot shows Daruma dolls with mouse ears in a small hole, which the boy points at. (7) The creator and kids are seen stamping postcards at a wooden table. (8) More scenery of the temple, including a waterfall and a red bridge, is shown. (9) The scene shifts to a brightly lit gift shop where they look at souvenirs like chips, noodles, and plush toys. (10) The creator holds a shopping basket and smiles excitedly. (11) The video ends with a montage of photos from their trip.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a cheerful countdown in Mandarin, "San, Er, Yi!" accompanied by upbeat, mid-tempo pop-style background music. (2) A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice begins narrating, describing the experience at Katsuoji Temple. (3) The soundscape includes occasional ambient sounds of the outdoors and the lively chatter of kids. (4) In the gift shop section, the audio transitions to include the sounds of items being moved and more vocal interactions between the mother and daughter, expressing excitement about the cute products. (5) The music continues consistently throughout, maintaining a joyful and energetic tone until the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "勝尾寺" (Katsuoji) - Decorative hook text identifying the location. (2) "入園門票" (Admission Fee) - Functional text introducing the price list. (3) Continuous subtitles in Traditional Chinese translating the spoken narration - Functional. (4) "全寺院6處可蒐集明信片蓋章" (6 locations in the temple to collect postcard stamps) - Informative decorative text. (5) "勝尾寺紀念品店" (Katsuoji Gift Shop) - Functional text marking the location change. (6) "入園時間：08:00-17:00" (Opening hours) - Functional informative text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Scenic Exploration -> Interactive Activities -> Souvenir Shopping -> Conclusion Montage

(4) The setting changes to a set of stairs outside a building; the girl dances with a group of four other young women. (5) The video moves to an open asphalt area; the girl performs the dance alone, ending with a close-up shot of her laughing and gesturing toward the camera.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with her hair in a bun stands in a bright kitchen, smiling and presenting a finished plate of curry rice with broccoli and carrots. (2) She begins preparing the ingredients: peeling a large carrot, slicing it into thin rounds, and then further cutting those rounds into small heart shapes. She also chops a head of broccoli into small florets. (3) The scene shifts to the stove where she boils the broccoli and heart-shaped carrots in a small pan of water. (4) She opens a colorful pre-packaged curry sauce bag and pours the contents into another pan. (5) Using a water dispenser, she adds water to a cup of white powder (starch) and stirs it before pouring the mixture into the simmering curry sauce to thicken it. (6) Finally, she plates a mound of white rice, pours the rich brown curry sauce over one side, and carefully arranges the boiled broccoli and heart-shaped carrots on top. She picks up a piece of meat with chopsticks to show the texture and then presents the completed dish again.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and energetic electronic background music with a fast tempo starts immediately. (2) As the visuals transition to food prep, rhythmic sound effects (SFX) of a peeler scraping and a knife hitting a wooden cutting board are layered over the music. (3) Sound effects of water bubbling and the sauce packet being torn open are clearly audible. (4) The music remains consistent in volume and tempo throughout the entire process, with no human vocals detected at any point. (5) The video ends with a final musical flourish synchronized with the presentation of the dish.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional/Hook Text: '沉浸式' (Immersive) appears at the start in a stylized font, setting a relaxing tone. (2) Action Text: '切' (Cut) and '切切切' (Chop chop chop) appear in pink and white during the vegetable preparation phase. (3) Process Text: '丢' (Throw), '川烫' (Blanch), '撕' (Tear), '倒' (Pour), '好多料' (Lots of ingredients), '太白粉' (Starch), '搅拌' (Stir), '勾芡' (Thicken), '适量' (Moderate amount), and '摆' (Arrange) appear sequentially to label her actions. (4) Outcome Text: '夾夾夾' (Pick up) and '完成' (Finished) appear at the end to signal completion.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A pair of female hands with red nail polish holds a bundle of thin white noodles in front of a red '余天宮' noodle bag. (2) The noodles are added to a pot of boiling water. (3) Three eggs are cracked into a blue patterned ceramic bowl. (4) A packet of '老協珍' Drip Chicken Essence is opened and poured into the eggs. (5) The eggs and essence are whisked together with chopsticks. (6) The cooked noodles are drained and added to the egg mixture, stirred thoroughly. (7) Oil is sprayed into a black flat frying pan. (8) The noodle and egg mixture is poured into the pan and spread evenly. (9) The pancake is flipped to show a golden-brown, crispy texture. (10) The finished dish is displayed on a dark plate on a light wood surface.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and cheerful pop-style background music begins immediately. A female narrator speaks in a clear, friendly Mandarin tone. (2) The sound of water boiling and bubbling is heard as the noodles cook. (3) Crisp sound effects (SFX) of eggs cracking and the packet of chicken essence being torn open are audible. (4) The rhythmic sound of chopsticks whisking against the ceramic bowl is present. (5) A loud, satisfying sizzling sound occurs as the mixture hits the oiled pan. (6) The music remains constant in volume and tempo until the end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '一起來煮' (Let's cook together) - Informative and welcoming. (2) '大人小孩都愛吃的 麵線煎餅吧' (Let's make noodle pancakes that adults and kids love) - Hook targeting families. (3) '準備 兩捆麵線 三顆蛋 一包滴雞精' (Prepare 2 bundles of noodles, 3 eggs, 1 pack of drip chicken essence) - Functional ingredient list. (4) '步驟一' to '步驟八' - Numbered instructional steps. (5) '兩面煎熟就完成啦' (Fry both sides and it's done!) - Encouraging conclusion.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Live-action video. A young woman in a white sweatshirt is shown in a tight shot, frantically pounding on a small yogurt cup with a spoon at a wooden desk. (2) She stops, resting her head on her hand while looking at her laptop with an expression of deep annoyance and boredom. (3) She shifts to rummaging through desk drawers, tossing items out in a fit of frustration. (4) Transition to a brighter scene: the same woman appears in a yellow button-down shirt with pigtails, now smiling and holding a large container of Matthew's Choice yogurt. (5) Close-up shots show the white yogurt being scooped into a glass bowl and topped with granola and dried fruit. (6) She is then seen holding and drinking from multiple colorful 'Yogurt to Go' bottles, looking refreshed and happy. (7) She gestures toward the products and then points downward to the bottom of the frame while smiling at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with sharp, rhythmic tapping sounds of a spoon hitting a cup, accompanied by a female voice sounding frustrated and complaining. (2) Tension-building SFX play as she rummages through drawers, culminating in a short 'explosion' sound effect. (3) Upbeat, energetic electronic pop music with a fast tempo enters as the product is introduced. (4) A female voice speaks in a bright, enthusiastic promotional tone, describing the yogurt's taste. (5) A deep, professional male voice-over joins, detailing the probiotic count and health benefits. (6) Sound effects like 'ding' and 'sparkle' accompany text appearances. (7) The music continues at a steady volume until the end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: '烦' (Annoyed), '躁' (Restless), '气' (Angry) - Large red characters appearing with a fire-like background to emphasize frustration. (2) Functional: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese reflecting the dialogue about being an 'employer' who doesn't want to work. (3) Functional: '馬修嚴選 G+ 優格' (Matthew's Choice G+ Yogurt) - Product name identifying the brand. (4) Decorative: '口感細緻柔滑 奶香味濃郁' (Fine and smooth texture, rich milky aroma) - Highlighting product features. (5) Decorative: '100億隻以上 活性乳酸菌' (Over 10 billion active lactic acid bacteria) - Scientific health claim. (6) Hook: '快到我首頁 把團購優惠連結點起來' (Go to my homepage and click the group buy link) - Call to action at the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Problem (Frustration at work) -> Solution (Yogurt discovery) -> Benefit demonstration -> Call to action.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up of a woman's face as she tries to hold a yellow post-it note against a white wall using only the suction from her lips; she fails and laughs. (2) The scene shifts to a group of four women in a brightly lit indoor hallway/office space, where the main character explains the 'technique' she thought she found. (3) A series of competitive rounds follow (Round 1 to Round 4) where the women line up against the wall, each attempting to keep their post-it note from falling by pressing their puckered lips against it. (4) Close-ups capture their concentrated and often humorous facial expressions, including exaggerated pouting and squinting. (5) Graphic crowns and names appear over the winners, while 'Out!' labels appear over those whose notes fall. (6) The final segment shows a woman successfully maintaining the note's position while making waving hand gestures towards the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with the sound of a paper post-it falling, followed by high-pitched female laughter and speaking in Mandarin. (2) At 0:04, an upbeat, fast-paced variety show-style BGM with a strong rhythmic beat and occasional whistle sounds starts. (3) Throughout the game rounds, a dense layer of group chatter, cheering, and collective laughter is heard. (4) Specific sound effects (SFX) are layered in, including 'boing' sounds for failures, 'ding' sounds for winners, and a low-frequency hum/vibration effect when 'black magic' is mentioned near the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '為什麼他會' - Curiously asking why the note stays (Puzzled tone). (2) '不給你解釋' - Teasing caption (Playful tone). (3) 'Round 1' through 'Round 4' - Functional labels for the game rounds. (4) '想當牆壁 留言+1' - Engagement hook: 'Want to be the wall? Comment +1' (Humorous tone). (5) 'Anita Out!', 'Kiki Out!' - Functional status text for player elimination. (6) '來點黑魔法' - 'A little black magic' describing the final technique (Whimsical tone).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Fail -> Group Discussion -> Competitive Game Rounds -> Final Success

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with close-up shots of multiple 'Tokyo Kaiju Universe' blind boxes and some already opened figures, including a cat-like monster and a fish-like monster with a rocket on its back. (2) A woman in a blue-and-white striped shirt and a young boy with glasses are seen sitting at a table in a brightly lit living room, discussing the boxes. (3) The group, including another boy partially seen on the right, starts tearing open the silver plastic bags inside the boxes. (4) The woman reveals a grey fish monster (Maglorie) and shows it to the camera while the boys look at their own figures. (5) A red '突發!!' (Sudden!!) text overlay appears as they react to their draws. (6) The woman expresses playful disappointment and looks directly into the camera lens with a smirk after realizing they didn't get the panda monster they wanted. (7) The video ends with a centered graphic of a green monster figure on a black background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, whimsical, and slightly bouncy BGM starts, accompanied by the sound of plastic crinkling and toy components clinking. (2) A female voice speaks in an excited, high-pitched tone in Mandarin, followed by a young boy's voice responding with similar enthusiasm. (3) The sound of boxes being manipulated and plastic bags being torn is prominent. (4) High-pitched cheering and 'wow' sounds from the kids occur as they see the toys. (5) The woman's voice takes on a humorous, slightly self-deprecating tone as she discusses her 'bad luck' in drawing duplicates, while the playful BGM continues at a steady pace until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles translate the spoken dialogue throughout the video. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '東京怪獣ユニバース' (Tokyo Kaiju Universe) title, '改造ガマゴラー' (Custom Gamagora), 'パンダム' (Pandam), and '宇宙怪獣 マグローリー' (Space Kaiju Maglorie) appear as character names. (3) Emotional Hooks: '家庭會議中...' (Family meeting in progress...), '突發!!' (Sudden!!), '真的運氣不好' (Really bad luck), and '臭手' (Smelly hand/unlucky) are used to emphasize the narrative drama and humor.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up of a young woman playfully biting a pink scarf tied into a large bow. (2) She stands in a brightly lit room, holding the pink scarf around her neck and speaking directly to the camera. (3) She begins a step-by-step demonstration: she loops the scarf around her neck with one side longer than the other and ties a basic knot. (4) She takes the long end of the wide scarf and folds it back and forth several times to create a rectangular section. (5) She pinches the center of this folded section and pulls it through the previously made knot. (6) She spends several moments adjusting the fabric to ensure the bow is symmetrical and voluminous. (7) Finally, she holds the finished bow up to her face, smiling and posing, ending with a repeat of the intro shot where she bites the bow.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo pop background music begins immediately. A young woman's voice is heard speaking enthusiastically in Mandarin. (2) The vocal continues as the primary audio source throughout the tutorial, describing each step of the scarf-tying process in a friendly and instructional tone. (3) The background music remains constant in volume and tempo. (4) There are no significant sound effects or ambient environmental noises; the audio sounds like a clean studio or indoor recording.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '我們的圍巾很可愛' (Our scarf is very cute) - Hook/Functional. (2) '很長怎麼辦呢?' (What to do if it's very long?) - Hook. (3) '你可以綁一個很可愛的圍巾綁法' (You can tie a very cute scarf knot) - Functional. (4) '一長一短' (One long, one short) - Functional step. (5) '先打個結' (Tie a knot first) - Functional step. (6) '整理中' (Adjusting...) - Decorative variety-show style text in yellow. (7) '就是一個可愛的蝴蝶結啦' (It's a cute bow!) - Functional/Hook.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Step-by-Step Demonstration -> Final Result Showcase

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair and a black hoodie smiles at the camera, holding a red paper with the character 'Chun' (Spring). (2) She sits at a wooden table, opens a bottle of dark ink, and dips a yellow beauty sponge into it. (3) Chronological shots show her hands with red glittery nail polish using the sponge to write Chinese characters on square red papers. (4) She holds up the finished papers 'Chun' and 'Man' (Full) with a celebratory 'V' gesture. (5) She attaches the papers to a grey safe and a white cabinet. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a blue patterned oversized shirt stands before a school entrance, gesturing enthusiastically toward the camera. (3) Interaction in an office environment with school staff, followed by a transition to a large indoor gymnasium filled with students seated on floor mats. (4) The woman is shown on stage receiving an award, giving a speech with a microphone, and presenting a gift. (5) Interaction segment showing her handing out HAHABABY branded snacks to students, signing autographs on various items, and taking group photos with female students. (6) Closing shot of the woman's hand signing a document with an inspirational message.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music starts immediately with a loud female exclamation in Mandarin asking 'Where are we today?'. (2) The music continues as a constant backdrop through the travel montage, with minimal environmental noise. (3) Transition to field recordings at the school, featuring the main character's excited conversational voice and background chatter from staff. (4) In the gymnasium phase, the audio includes microphone-amplified speech, echoing gymnasium acoustics, and loud collective cheers and applause from a large crowd of students. (5) Occasional cartoon-style sound effects (pops and sparkles) coincide with text overlays. (6) The final phase blends the background music with the sounds of pens on paper and excited student voices during the autograph session.

(5) '老師訓話中' (Teacher lecturing) and '調皮的學生' (Naughty student) - Decorative/Humorous captions. (6) '上台前皮皮挫' (Nervous before going on stage) - Emotional hook. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a striped shirt and green apron stands in a modern kitchen introducing 3COINS kitchen gadgets. (2) She demonstrates a microwave rice cooker by adding rice, washing it at the sink, adding water, and placing it in the microwave. (3) She shows a dual-compartment container used to make tamagoyaki (rolled egg), cracking eggs, seasoning them, and microwaving. (4) She uses a steaming dish to cook broccoli and green beans in the microwave. (5) She introduces a 2-way oil dispenser, demonstrating both the spray and pour functions while frying an egg. (6) Beef slices are seasoned and cooked in the microwave using the steaming dish. (7) She assembles all the prepared components—rice, beef, eggs, and vegetables—into a white bento box and shows the final result to the camera with a smile.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music begins immediately. A young woman's voice is heard speaking in Mandarin with an energetic and friendly tone. (2) Sound effects such as water running, plastic lids clicking, and 'ding' sounds for microwave completion are integrated with the music. (3) The woman provides a continuous commentary/narration on the cooking steps. (4) The background music remains consistent in volume and energy until the end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '3COINS 好物分享' (3COINS Goodies Sharing) - Hook text at the top. (2) '很多人說我沒時間煮' (Many people say I don't have time to cook) - Functional subtitle. (3) Instructional steps: '加米', '加水', '洗米', '倒水', '浸泡', '微波' (Add rice, water, wash, pour, soak, microwave). (4) '飯好了' (Rice is ready) - Functional text. (5) Tamagoyaki steps: '打蛋', '攪拌', '調味', '成形', '切片完成' (Crack eggs, stir, season, shape, slicing done). (6) Vegetable steps: '清洗後放入', '加點水', '蓋上蓋子', '進去微波', '小心燙手', '完成' (Wash, add water, lid on, microwave, watch for heat, complete). (7) '好物推薦 噴倒兩用油罐' (Goodie recommendation: 2-way spray/pour oil bottle) - Promotional hook. (8) '擺盤擺盤擺盤' (Plating plating plating) - Playful decorative text. (9) '只有微波爐也可以煮出超可愛便當' (You can cook a super cute bento with just a microwave) - Closing summary text.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy presentation with bright, colorful text overlays and a focus on 'exclusive' or 'limited' items.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a fast-paced montage style typical of short-form social media marketing to create a sense of urgency and excitement about a physical retail event.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a yellow shirt and blue dress, jumps and waves enthusiastically in front of a colorful retail pop-up store. (2) The camera follows her as she walks through different sections of the store, including a photo-taking area with character cutouts, shelves of snacks, display cases for shoes and helmets, and a rack for apparel. Frequent cuts show close-ups of specific items like popcorn, crocs, and mugs. (3) The host stands at the checkout counter, gesturing towards promotional boards that list different spending tiers. The video ends with a still shot of her posing by a character cutout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic electronic background music begins. A high-pitched female voice excitedly introduces the Hsinchu pop-up store. (2) The female narrator provides a continuous, fast-paced description of the various zones within the store, her tone remaining cheerful and welcoming. Brief sound effects (dings) accompany text overlays. (3) The background music maintains its tempo as the narrator wraps up by inviting viewers to visit, ending with the music fading out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'Hahababy 新竹巨城快閃 3/17-3/31' (Hahababy Hsinchu Big City Pop-up 3/17-3/31). (2) Decorative/Effect Text labels for sections: '拍照打卡區' (Photo Spot), '惜福品' (Clearance), '食品專區' (Food Section), '生活用品、手作' (Lifestyle/Handmade), '鞋子專區' (Shoes), '保溫杯' (Mugs), '配件區' (Accessories). (3) Promotional Text: '$1500', '$3000', '$6000' indicating membership or discount levels.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Detailed Store Section Walkthrough -> Promotional Offer Summary -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main host, approximately 11 shoppers and staff visible in the background across various store sections.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a yellow long-sleeved shirt under a light blue dress, layered with a translucent plastic vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A vibrant and well-lit indoor retail space within Hsinchu Big City Mall, featuring colorful 'Hahababy' branding, product displays, shelving units, and cartoon character cardboard cutouts.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Section-by-section Showcase -> Promotional Incentives -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the limited-time Hahababy pop-up store in Hsinchu Big City Mall. The video aims to drive foot traffic by demonstrating the wide variety of lifestyle products, cute photo opportunities, and exclusive tiered shopping rewards.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video is a structured tour and promotional advertisement for the Hahababy brand store.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy female hosting typical of Taiwanese lifestyle influencers; use of stylized variety-show captions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The fast editing and beat-synced cuts are designed to maintain high engagement on social media platforms like Instagram or TikTok.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a montage of two young boys running through an indoor facility and playing with a large bubble machine, with large white text overlays. (2) A woman is shown standing outside the building pointing to a subway exit sign, followed by shots of the 'Kids Plaza Osaka' welcome sign and a floor map. (3) The woman demonstrates using an automated ticket machine and then shows a designated stroller parking area. (4) A fast-paced series of clips shows the boys engaging with various interactive exhibits: spinning discs, a wind tunnel, sliding down a large indoor slide, and climbing through a red rope bridge. (5) Further scenes show the children in a mock TV studio, playing traditional Japanese drums (Taiko), participating in a mock supermarket, and using a voice-changing machine. (6) The video concludes with the two boys walking outside the building, holding hands with their mother, looking tired with messy hair.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music starts immediately and continues throughout the video. (2) A male voice provides a clear, energetic narration in Mandarin, describing the location and its features. (3) Frequent sound effects are layered over the music: bubble popping sounds, whooshing noises for transitions, and the sound of a slide. (4) In the final seconds, the music volume drops, and a female voice is heard asking a question, followed by the high-pitched voice of a child answering 'Fun' (Hao wan).
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Hook: 'Osaka Parent-Child Travel' and 'Indoor Playground Japan' in large, bold white characters. (2) Functional Information: 'Subway Ogimachi Station Exit 2', 'Japan's largest children's museum', '5 floors in total', and ticket price details. (3) Descriptive Labels: 'Visual & Tactile Experience', 'Power Facilities', 'Drawing Creation', 'Physical Facilities', 'Nature/Science/Culture/Career', 'Indoor Facilities', 'Career Experience', 'Voice Changer', and 'Photo Animation'. (4) Interactive Hook: 'Good to play?' (Hao wan ma?) and 'Fun' (Hao wan) appear as colored captions at the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Essential Visitor Info -> Detailed Activity Showcase -> Emotional Conclusion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 adult female (mom), 2 young boys (main characters), several other children and adults visible in the background of the museum exhibits.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main woman wears a beige trench coat over a tracksuit; the two young boys wear matching brown and cream fleece vests with blue jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A multi-story indoor facility with colorful walls, interactive science exhibits, a mock TV studio, a supermarket area, and large wooden structures for climbing.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lighting and natural light from large windows.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Logic Flow -> Activity Demo -> Emotional CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a travel recommendation and guide for parents visiting Osaka, Japan. It highlights 'Kids Plaza Osaka' as an ideal, comprehensive indoor activity center for children, emphasizing its educational value through play and its practicality as a destination regardless of weather conditions.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed information about transport, pricing, and specific facilities suggest a travel destination recommendation.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density text overlays with variety-show style sound effects and a 'learn through play' (wan zhong xue) theme.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses fast-paced editing and comprehensive coverage of the museum's floors to create a sense of 'high value' for families looking for travel itineraries.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a man in a blue striped shirt and a woman in a beige tracksuit standing in a living room, looking excited and gesturing toward the camera. (2) Scene transitions to a bedroom where another woman is lying on a white mattress; the man approaches and 'wakes' her up. (3) Close-up shots of hands pressing into the mattress to demonstrate firmness and touching the 'Cooler' fabric surface. (4) A woman demonstrates a hydraulic lift bed frame, revealing a large storage space underneath. (5) The three individuals are seen in a large furniture showroom, walking past various sofas and trying out different mattresses. (6) Back in the living room setting, they sit on the floor around a white marble-top coffee table, pointing out its design features. (7) The video ends with the group waving and text showing store locations.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music starts immediately. A male voice speaks loudly and enthusiastically, followed by high-pitched female laughter. (2) Sounds of hands slapping or thumping a mattress to demonstrate its solid build. (3) Continuous Mandarin dialogue where the speakers explain the technical features of the furniture (cooling fabric, edge support). (4) The music remains consistent in tempo, providing an energetic backdrop to the conversation. (5) Sound of a hydraulic lift moving slightly as the bed frame is opened. (6) The video concludes with a cheerful goodbye from multiple voices.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: '總監禁慾 買房啦!!!' (Director bought a house!!!) in large yellow and black font. (2) Functional: Subtitles translating the spoken Mandarin throughout the video. (3) Decorative/Effect: '太!舒!服!' (So comfortable!) and '滑下去' (Slide down) to emphasize points. (4) Functional: Brand name '希匹家居 CP Home' and '台南店', '台中店' (Tainan store, Taichung store) with addresses and hours appear near the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Demo (Bedroom) -> Store Visit -> Product Demo (Living Room) -> Outro/CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator (blue shirt), 1 female (beige tracksuit), 1 female (black outfit/staff/friend).
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main male creator wears a blue and white striped shirt and baggy denim jeans. The primary female companion wears a beige oversized hoodie and matching sweatpants.

It uses the narrative of the creator 'buying a house' as a hook to showcase specific furniture items like the Alonso mattress and Vesper coffee table, emphasizing their comfort, durability, and storage features to encourage viewers to visit the brand's physical stores.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly names the brand (CP Home), showcases specific products with feature highlights, provides store locations, and includes a call to action to visit the store.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy presentation style with variety-show style text overlays and fast-paced editing typical of Taiwanese lifestyle influencers.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively blends personal life milestones (moving house) with commercial promotion, making the advertisement feel more like a recommendation from a friend.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is live-action. Close-up of two wooden bento boxes filled with rice, colorful vegetables, and a meat curry sauce. (2) A woman's hands hold a colorful 'Simba' branded food pouch and a plastic rice container against a clean white kitchen counter. (3) A woman in a white tank top uses pink chopsticks to add broccoli, baby corn, and red peppers into a pan of boiling water. (4) She drops the meal pouch into the boiling water and then places the rice container into a microwave, smiling directly at the camera. (5) She begins assembling the bento, using chopsticks to mold the rice and scissors to cut thin strips of dark seaweed. (6) She meticulously plates the cooked vegetables and pours the thick brown meat sauce from the pouch into the wooden compartments. (7) She adds a soft-boiled egg half and uses seaweed pieces to create a smiley face on a mound of white rice. (8) Transition to a young boy in a striped shirt sitting at a table looking at his meal. (9) A second boy with glasses opens the wooden lid of his bento box, revealing a wide, happy smile and expressive eyes. (10) The boys look down at their food with excitement and anticipation.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, playful acoustic guitar melody with light percussion starts. The faint sound of water bubbling and sizzling is present in the background. (2) Music continues at a steady, rhythmic pace. A high-pitched microwave 'ding' sound effect plays briefly. (3) The rhythmic snip of scissors and the soft clicking of wooden chopsticks are audible over the background music. (4) The BGM remains consistent in volume and cheerful tone throughout the assembly process. (5) A friendly, high-pitched female voice is heard asking, 'Hǎochī ma?' (Is it tasty?). (6) A young child's voice responds with a quick, unintelligible but excited exclamation. (7) The female voice responds warmly with 'Duì a' (Yeah) as the music concludes with a final chord.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '準備的材料有' (Ingredients prepared), '時蔬配菜煮熟' (Vegetables and side dishes cooked). (2) Decorative/Effect Text: '(不負責任字幕) 好燙' (Irresponsible subtitle: So hot) - humorous tone regarding the boiling water. (3) Functional Text: '料理包泡個溫泉' (Cooking pack taking a hot spring bath), '米飯三溫暖' (Rice sauna). (4) Functional Text: '白飯弄個造型' (Rice making a shape), '海苔剪頭髮' (Seaweed cutting hair). (5) Functional Text: '組合在一起' (Put together), '菜菜拿來擺漂亮' (Veggies used for pretty plating), '站好玉米筍' (Stand up baby corn). (6) Functional Text: '不唔唔青椒' (No bell peppers), '再做一個' (Make another one), '一樣菜菜擺好' (Veggies placed the same). (7) Functional Text: '肉肉要有' (Must have meat), '太乾會噎到' (Too dry will cause choking), '蛋蛋好吃' (Egg is tasty). (8) Functional Text: '剪剪貼貼' (Cutting and sticking), '原來是眼睛' (It turns out they are eyes), '五告勾錐' (So cute). (9) Decorative/Effect Text: '(滿滿的情緒價值)' (Full of emotional value), '很開心笑臉' (Happy smiley face) - emphasizing the children's reaction.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Step-by-step cooking/assembly -> Result and child reaction

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female adult creator, 2 young boys (one in striped shirt, one with glasses)
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An adult female with her hair pulled back, wearing a white ribbed tank top and having brown nail polish.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Step-by-step Process -> Emotional Payoff
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote 'Simba' meal pouches by demonstrating how easily and quickly a parent can create a visually appealing, cute, and nutritious 'smiley face' bento box for their children. It highlights the convenience for busy parents while emphasizing the 'emotional value' and joy it brings to the kids, as shown in the final reaction sequence.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator prominently displays the 'Simba' branded meal pouch at the beginning and uses its contents as the primary component of the meal.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Usage of humorous, 'irresponsible' parent-style subtitles and high-quality food close-ups.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively bridges the gap between commercial product placement and authentic family lifestyle content by focusing on the child's reaction as the ultimate validation of the product's worth.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Live-action video begins with a girl with braided pigtails in a cream crop top and blue track pants standing in a room crowded with clothing racks; she starts a rhythmic hip-shaking dance move. (2) The camera cuts rapidly between the first girl and another girl wearing a grey shirt and a black beret, both performing the same synchronized shaking motion. (3) A close-up shot focuses specifically on the first girl's waist and hip movement. (4) The girl in the beret is shown again, looking at the camera with a puzzled and questioning facial expression while attempting the dance. (5) The setting transitions to an office-like space where the first girl stands near a desk, followed by a shot of three girls in a line laughing and trying the dance together. (6) The video ends with the first girl performing the move in front of a vanity mirror.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat K-pop remix music starts immediately with heavy bass and female vocals singing in a rhythmic pattern. (2) A high-pitched sound effect of a baby giggling is heard over the music. (3) The music continues but is layered with the sounds of several young women laughing and talking loudly in the background. (4) The rhythmic bass-heavy music concludes the video with a final beat.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'JISOO-earthquake' (Trend Title/Functional). (2) '(好扭好扭)' (Playful/Decorative) - Expressing that the shaking is impressive. (3) '(......?)' (Confused/Decorative) - Expressing humorous bewilderment. (4) '不給你上訴' (Sassy/Hook) - A humorous transition phrase. (5) '真的好會扭' (Impressed/Decorative) - Praising the dancing ability.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro dance trend -> Rapid montage of two performers -> Behind-the-scenes group laughter -> Final performance

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One primary girl in pigtails, one secondary girl in a beret, and two additional female colleagues in a group scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One girl with long dark hair in braided pigtails wearing a cream-colored crop top and light blue track pants; another girl with long wavy hair wearing a black beret and a grey t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary background is a densely packed room with metal racks holding various garments. A secondary background features a clean office environment with white shelves, a red gashapon machine, and a wooden desk with a vanity mirror.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Performance -> Behind-the-scenes Humor -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a social media trend participation piece focusing on the 'Jisoo Earthquake' dance. It aims to showcase the creator's personality and dancing skills while incorporating humorous elements like exaggerated expressions and group outtakes to build rapport with the audience through a mix of performance and relatability.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: No specific product is being promoted; the focus is on a dance trend.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Frequent use of comedic text overlays and fast-paced trend-based editing.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the viewer's familiarity with current K-pop dance challenges and TikTok/Reels editing styles.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with five young women standing in a row in a bright, minimalist indoor room, performing a coordinated dance involving hand gestures like forming triangles above their heads and pointing to their mouths. (2) The scene transitions through several individual solo clips of each woman performing the same dance moves in the same room. (3) The group is shown together again, but the atmosphere becomes more chaotic as they start laughing, bumping into each other, and losing coordination. (4) The setting shifts to what appears to be a dressing room or studio area filled with clothing racks and mirrors, where they continue to dance and laugh together. (5) The final segment features one woman in a black dress standing alone, looking awkward and embarrassed while attempting the dance, with digital stickers and text appearing around her.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A fast-paced, electronic dance track begins immediately, featuring a repetitive vocal hook that sounds like "Chicken, Banana" synchronized with the dance movements. (2) As the video progresses into the chaotic group shots and dressing room scenes, the music remains at a high volume, but it is layered with the sounds of several women laughing loudly and shouting excitedly. (3) In the final segment, the music continues but the soundscape is dominated by high-pitched laughter and playful screams from off-screen, emphasizing the comedic nature of the solo performance.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: "關於SOLO：I人覺得害怕" appears at the top, which translates to "Regarding SOLO: I-person (introvert) feels scared," setting a humorous context for the ending. (2) Decorative Text: Multiple "救我~~~" (Save me~~~) captions appear around the character in the final scene, paired with laughing-crying emojis 🤣 to emphasize her staged embarrassment. (3) Decorative Text: Floating banana 🍌 and chicken 🐥 emojis appear throughout the video to match the lyrics and dance theme.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Structured Group Dance -> Individual Solos -> Chaotic Behind-the-scenes -> Comedic Solo Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 5 main female creators performing together in a studio setting.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Five young women wearing casual streetwear including black t-shirts, beige overalls, a beanie, a beret, and light blue track pants.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Demonstration -> Chaos -> Outro Joke
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a social media entertainment clip designed to showcase the camaraderie and personality of a group of female creators. It utilizes a popular 'Chicken Banana' dance challenge to engage viewers, moving from a polished performance to a relatable 'behind-the-scenes' chaotic vibe, and finally concluding with a joke about introverted personality types (I-persons) feeling awkward in solo situations.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The participants are all wearing apparel with the clearly visible 'HAHA BOY' branding, suggesting a lifestyle or merchandise promotion.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Usage of MBTI-related humor (I-person) and the 'HAHA BOY' brand identity.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the 'realtionality' of the creators, contrasting their professional dance execution with their messy, fun-loving reality to build community rapport.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a black and white striped sweater sits at a desk, excitedly talking to the camera while holding a piece of marble-patterned bread. (2) She takes a bite of the bread and gestures with her hands, showing a satisfied facial expression. (3) The camera shifts to a close-up shot of an orange plastic bread wrapper and a cardboard box with illustrations of an elderly woman and the text 'Made in Osaka'. (4) The woman is shown again in the original setting, eating the bread as colorful animated text overlays appear around her.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic music starts along with a high-pitched, excited female voice speaking Mandarin. (2) The music continues at a steady volume as the female voice narrates her experience with the food, maintaining a cheerful and energetic tone. (3) Subtle ambient studio noise is present in the background, but the primary focus remains on the clear vocal recording and the background music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'POV:在日本上架就秒殺的阿嬤麵包' (Hook: Grandma's bread that sold out instantly in Japan) appearing at the top. (2) Functional Text: '我要吃囉' (I'm going to eat it now) as a subtitle. (3) Decorative Text: '阿嬤可愛', 'My 阿嬤', 'Made in Osaka' (Grandma is cute, My Grandma) appearing during product close-ups with a playful tone. (4) Decorative Text: '(想吃底下留言敲碗!!)', '自己蓋hahababy' (Leave a comment if you want to eat it!!, Build your own hahababy) appearing at the end with a CTA intent.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a hand holding a small teddy bear puppet wearing a blue shirt, acting as an interviewer. A woman named Anita is interviewed at her desk in a cluttered office. (2) The scene cuts to a woman named Yuhan wearing glasses and a mask, then she removes the mask to pose. (3) A man named Baozi in a green hoodie is interviewed next. (4) A woman named Big JJ is seen working and then looking at the camera smiling. (5) A man in a beige jacket is interviewed. (6) Finally, the 'Boss Lady' in a black beret and hoodie is interviewed while she has a coffee and bread on her desk, laughing at the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, rhythmic background music starts immediately. A male voice asks questions in a friendly, inquisitive tone. (2) Various interviewees respond in cheerful, casual, and sometimes humorous tones. (3) Sound effects like high-pitched dings, bells, and cartoonish accents are used to punctuate the humor. (4) Ambient office noises like keyboard clicking and faint background chatter are occasionally audible during pauses in speech.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the interviewer's questions about company satisfaction and why employees chose this workplace. (2) Decorative Text: Brightly colored labels identifying each person (Anita, 渝涵, 包子, 大JJ, 客串-老溫, 闆娘). (3) Hook Text: Phrases like 'What are you most satisfied with in the company?' and variety-show style captions like 'Cute', 'Naturally beautiful', and 'Fat from eating too much' appear with stickers.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Series of brief interviews -> Final punchline/laugh

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 6 distinct employees are interviewed; 1 hand of the interviewer is visible.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a shot of the Nipponbashi Station Exit 8 entrance in Osaka. (2) A hand gestures toward a street, followed by shots of a walking route featuring a 7-Eleven store and the sign for 'Elizabeth Garden' guesthouse. (3) A woman in a blue and yellow patterned sweatshirt and a young boy with glasses enter a modern apartment. (4) They provide a room-by-room tour: a bedroom with a double bed, a modern toilet, a bathroom with a washing machine, and a spacious living/dining area where other adults are sitting on the floor. (5) They showcase a traditional Japanese-style room with tatami mats where the boy climbs into a storage cupboard, and a final bedroom with a dedicated workspace. (6) The video concludes with the woman summarizing the stay while interacting with the boy in the apartment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, rhythmic pop background music starts and continues throughout the video. (2) A female voice speaks in an energetic, high-pitched tone, narrating the proximity to the station and describing the room features. (3) The young boy is heard making excited sounds and talking occasionally. (4) Background ambient city noise is briefly heard at the beginning, transitioning to a clean indoor environment soundscape for the tour. (5) The music volume remains steady as the narrator provides a price summary and final recommendation.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a young woman in a grey jacket looking skeptical in a bright indoor room with white furniture. (2) The main creator, a girl with her hair in two buns, introduces a red and white package of Ippei-chan instant noodles. (3) She proceeds to prepare the noodles, showing the process of adding boiling water, letting it sit, and then draining the water through the container's built-in strainer. (4) She opens three packets: a red strawberry sauce, a white creamy powder, and a purple packet containing dried strawberry bits, adding them all to the noodles. (5) She mixes the noodles thoroughly and holds the result up to the camera, comparing the dry, pinkish appearance of the actual food to the vibrant, luscious photo on the packaging. (6) She tastes the noodles with a worried expression and then offers the container to a group of friends sitting on the floor. (7) One friend in a grey jacket takes a bite and gives a surprising 'not bad' reaction, followed by two other friends who also try the noodles with curious and amused expressions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with upbeat, high-tempo pop music featuring electronic synths. A high-pitched, energetic female voice (the creator) starts speaking enthusiastically in Mandarin. (2) As the noodle preparation begins, the music continues in the background while various sound effects are heard, including the sound of flowing water and variety-show style 'ding' and 'pop' cues. (3) The creator's voice maintains a fast pace, narrating each step of the flavoring process. (4) The audio landscape shifts to include multiple female voices as the friends begin to comment on the food, with laughter and conversational chatter layered over the persistent background music. (5) The video ends with a final upbeat musical flourish and the sounds of the friends laughing.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '在新竹人的面前' (In front of Hsinchu people) - Setting the context. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: '好像餵什麼都 OK 啊' (Seems like they are okay with whatever you feed them) - Humorous commentary on the friends' reactions. (3) Functional Text: '大家知道一平炒麵嗎' (Does everyone know Ippei-chan yakisoba?) - Introductory hook. (4) Decorative Text: '草莓蛋糕口味' (Strawberry cake flavor) - Highlighting the unique product flavor. (5) Functional/Instructional Text: '(蓋過麵條約八分滿)' (Cover the noodles about 80% full) - Preparation advice. (6) Decorative/Effect Text: '圖文不符' (Image doesn't match reality) - Sarcastic remark about the product's appearance. (7) Functional Text: '試吃時間' (Tasting time) - Transition to the reaction phase.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman in a black 'HAHABABY' t-shirt looking shocked and disgusted, touching her face. (2) Chronological montage of moldy items: a book with visible white mold on the pages, a black leather bag with grey mold spots, and the woman reacting with extreme disgust while holding her nose. (3) The woman is joined by another female assistant; they pull moldy boots and bags out of an orange storage box in a studio setting. (4) Transition to a clean product showcase of 'GW Wireless Dehumidifiers' in various shapes (cylindrical, square, circular) with close-ups of the moisture-indicating silica beads changing color. (5) Demonstration of the charging base and placing the dehumidifiers in different locations: a shoe cabinet, a wardrobe, a bookshelf, and a snack cabinet. (6) The two women return to the frame, sitting at a table, demonstrating a specific shoe-drying attachment and discussing the product's benefits while holding the devices.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music starts immediately and continues throughout the video. (2) A female voice speaks with a high-pitched, energetic, and slightly exaggerated tone, expressing shock about the mold. (3) The audio shifts to a more structured, informative narration as the product features are described, with subtle 'ding' sound effects highlighting key points. (4) Ambient studio sounds are minimal, with the focus on the clear, studio-recorded dialogue between the two women. (5) In the final segment, the two women have a conversational exchange about the product's convenience and 'MIT' (Made in Taiwan) status.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom for all spoken dialogue. (2) Hook/Decorative Text: Large, bold titles appear such as 'GW 無線除濕器' (GW Wireless Dehumidifier) and '是太潮濕' (It's too humid). (3) Feature callouts: '多種款式' (Multiple styles), '小巧機身' (Compact body), '0 耗材' (Zero consumables), and '台灣製造 MIT' (Made in Taiwan MIT) appear with emotional emphasis. (4) Offer details: '免運' (Free shipping) and '一年保固' (One-year warranty) are displayed prominently at the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Problem Hook (Mold discovery) -> Solution Introduction (Dehumidifier) -> Feature Demo -> Closing Endorsement

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman and two young boys are standing in a living room, all wearing matching maroon hoodies. They perform a choreographed dance involving swaying their hips and hands on their waists while smiling at the camera. (2) The trio transitions into skipping and running in a circular pattern around the room, laughing and holding hands. (3) The video cuts to a section titled 'Behind the video', showing the 'reality' of the filming process where the boys are more chaotic, uncoordinated, and playful, causing the woman to laugh and look slightly exasperated while trying to maintain the dance.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, upbeat, children's style electronic song plays with lyrics that sound like 'miao miao miao'. The tempo is fast and energetic. (2) The song continues with a melodic 'la la la' chorus as the characters skip around. (3) The music shifts to a more bouncy, comedic instrumental track. Faint background sounds of children's laughter and the woman's voice can be heard, though the specific words are indistinguishable.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '影片的背後...' (Behind the video...) appears in white bold text on a black background. Tone: Informative. (2) '認真學習的波' (Bo learning seriously) appears over one of the boys. Tone: Endearing. (3) '很調皮的貴' (Gui being very naughty) appears over the other boy. Tone: Humorous. (4) '無奈的我' (Exasperated me) appears over the woman. Tone: Humorous and self-deprecating. (5) '不受控的二子' (The uncontrollable second son) appears during a chaotic moment. Tone: Humorous.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Polished Performance -> Transition -> Behind-the-scenes Reality

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 adult female and 2 young male children.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Performance -> Outtakes
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain the audience by showing a cute family dance performance and then contrasting it with the humorous 'reality' or outtakes of filming with children. It emphasizes the theme of family bonding and the chaos of parenting in a lighthearted way.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: No commercial products or brands are highlighted.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Matching family outfits, 'Expectation vs Reality' editing style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a popular social media trope of showing the struggle behind a seemingly perfect video, which increases viewer engagement through relatability.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a young woman in a light blue patterned dress standing in front of a clothing rack in a brightly lit indoor store. (2) She proceeds to walk through the store, pointing out and picking up various merchandise including clogs, boxed gift sets, sanitary pads, thermos bottles, and walls of colorful socks. (3) She showcases stationery items like notebooks and desktop calendars, then moves to a section with plush toys and eco-friendly bags. (4) Detailed close-ups follow, showing red envelopes with snake illustrations, decorated motorcycle helmets, and patterned umbrellas. (5) The final sequence shows her behind a service counter with a large 'haha baby' logo, waving energetically to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaks continuously in Mandarin, introducing the store and describing the products. Background music is upbeat, featuring a fast tempo with electronic and pop elements. (2) As she moves through the store, the sound of items being moved and the subtle ambient hum of a shopping mall are audible. (3) Occasional cartoon-like sound effects (pings and pops) accentuate the presentation of specific items. (4) The audio maintains a high energy level until the end when she says a final greeting.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text: '我們來看看我們的快閃店' (Let's look at our pop-up shop) appears as a hook. (2) Decorative text: A large graphic shows 'haha baby x MAMU eggcake' with dates '01/04 - 01/22' and location '桃園台茂購物中心' (Taimall Shopping Center). (3) Functional text: Price tags like '109' and '99' appear near products. (4) Effect text: '送哦' (Free!) appears in large yellow and red characters to emphasize a promotion. (5) Content text: '蛇年大吉' (Happy Year of the Snake) is seen on the red envelopes.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Store Tour/Product Showcase -> Promotional Highlight -> Outro

social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets a young, family-oriented demographic in Taiwan, emphasizing the 'cute' (kawaii) aesthetic of the brand and the limited-time nature of the pop-up event.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman stands in front of a white wall and a wooden cabinet, holding up a large black T-shirt with "HAHABABY" printed on it. She smiles and talks to the camera. (2) She appears in a cream-colored T-shirt paired with a white lace-trimmed skirt and carries a small basket of flowers. (3) The scene shifts to her wearing the cream T-shirt with white distressed pants and a green cap; she demonstrates how to tuck the shirt using a hair tie. (4) She transitions to a preppy look, layering the T-shirt over a blue striped shirt with a denim skirt and a brown cap. (5) She changes into a black T-shirt over a black mesh long-sleeved top, paired with wide-leg blue jeans and a black beanie. (6) Finally, she wears the black T-shirt with denim shorts, a black beret, and a purple sweatshirt tied diagonally across her torso. (7) A quick montage shows all five outfits in succession.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic pop music begins with a clear beat. A female voice speaks with high energy and a friendly tone. (2) The music continues at a steady pace as the woman narrates her styling choices. The sound of clothing movement is occasionally audible. (3) The vocal narration remains dominant, explaining the step-by-step styling tips. (4) The music remains consistent in the background as the speaker continues to describe each outfit. (5) SFX including a shimmering sound or sparkle-like effect is heard during transitions. (6) The video concludes with the woman's voice trail off and the background music fading out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "T-shirt 穿搭" (T-shirt styling) appears as a title hook with a playful font. (2) Functional subtitles translate the creator's speech regarding styling tips. (3) "第一套 仙女風" (Outfit 1: Fairy Style) appears in a decorative bubble. (4) "第二套 休閒風" (Outfit 2: Casual Style) appears as a decorative title. (5) "第三套 學院風" (Outfit 3: Preppy Style) appears as a decorative title. (6) "第四套 酷女未風" (Outfit 4: Cool Girl Style) appears as a decorative title. (7) "第五套 夏日風" (Outfit 5: Summer Style) appears as a decorative title.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Styling Demonstration 1 -> Demo 2 -> Demo 3 -> Demo 4 -> Demo 5 -> Recap

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with white text on a solid black background. A woman wearing a cream-colored dress and a beret appears at the entrance of a 'hahababy' pop-up store, gesturing excitedly. (2) She moves through various sections of the store, pointing to displays of colorful safety helmets, patterned mugs, gift boxes, food products, and rows of clothing. Close-ups show detailed shots of these items. She enters and showcases a large fitting room with a yellow polka-dot curtain. (3) She stands behind a yellow checkout counter holding a promotional flyer, waving goodbye before the scene transitions to a static informational graphic about the event.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic pop music begins immediately. A male voice introduces the concept of dubbing the 'boss lady's' video. (2) As the visuals move through the store, the male voice provides a fast-paced, humorous narration, speaking as if he were the woman on screen. Periodic sound effects like 'dings', 'swooshes', and 'shimmers' occur when specific products are featured. (3) The music maintains its fast tempo and rhythm until the final scene, where the narrator says 'Love you bye' and the audio fades out as the event info screen appears.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: '把闆娘的影片拿去配音' (Taking the Boss Lady's video to dub it) followed by '會變成什麼樣子' (What will it look like?). (2) Functional text: A countdown from '7' to '1' appears on screen. (3) Decorative text: '超超級大' (Super super big) and '笑穴!' (Laughter point) are used for emphasis. (4) Functional text: Subtitles providing a translation of the male narration. (5) Event details: 'Kaohsiung Hanshin Arena B1' and dates '04/17 - 05/14' appear at the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Rapid Product & Store Tour -> Promotional CTA/Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with a messy bun enters a room filled with scattered toys; she looks frustrated and trips over a toy, hitting her head against a cabinet. She continues into a hallway, trips again while picking up a small green item, and bumps her head on a table. (2) She looks in a bathroom mirror, pulls her hair back, and discovers grey hairs near her roots, looking shocked and distressed. (3) She presents a red and gold box of hair dye; the scene cuts to her wearing gloves and squeezing a two-colored cream from a pressurized canister onto a special comb attachment. She brushes the cream onto her grey roots and then through the rest of her hair. (4) The woman appears again with neatly styled, shiny dark hair; she smiles and gestures towards the product boxes on a white table, showing various color options and finally holding the product up with a thumbs-up gesture.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Starts with the woman's voice sounding annoyed followed by exaggerated thumping and sliding sound effects (SFX) as she clumsy moves. (2) A transition sound leads into a bright, upbeat, medium-tempo pop background music (BGM). (3) A professional male voiceover enters, narrating the product benefits with a clear and energetic tone, while occasional 'ting' or 'shimmer' SFX highlight product features. (4) The woman's voice returns at the end, sounding cheerful and satisfied, accompanied by a final energetic musical flourish.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: '吼！超亂內！' (Ugh! So messy!) in a variety-show style font. (2) Action labels: '(滑)' (Slip), '(撞)' (Bump), '(又撞)' (Bump again). (3) Functional product text: '日本原裝進口 宣若EX染髮霜' (Imported from Japan, CIELO EX Hair Dye Cream). (4) Benefit hooks: '操作簡單' (Simple operation), '不需要攪拌' (No mixing required), '妥善保存 分次使用' (Safe storage for multiple uses), '完勝頑固白髮' (Defeat stubborn grey hair). (5) Conclusion text: '完成啦' (Done!), '全新亮麗秀髮' (Brand new beautiful hair). (6) Call to Action: '優惠連結點起來!' (Click the discount link!) with an arrow pointing down.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Problem (clumsy/grey hair) -> Solution (product application) -> Positive Result & CTA.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young man with short brown hair wearing a white and red striped polo shirt is seen folding and hanging clothes on a rack in a frustrated manner, gesturing wildly at the messy pile. (2) A young woman enters the frame wearing pink overalls, holding a sleek white handheld device; she begins demonstrating the device on a white dress shirt hanging on the rack. (3) The scene transitions rapidly between the woman using the device on various items: a yellow sweater, a patterned t-shirt, a grey sofa, and a yellow flower-shaped pillow. (4) The man reappears holding a green sweater and looks skeptical, pointing at the device while the woman explains features using the device's interface. (5) Close-up shots show a small brush cleaning a dust tray removed from the device, followed by the man and woman interacting playfully as she uses the suction feature on his shirt.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, high-energy BGM starts immediately with a male voice speaking loudly and rapidly in a complaining tone. (2) The music continues at a steady upbeat tempo as a female voice takes over, speaking in a bright, persuasive, and informative tone. (3) Frequent sound effects are heard, including 'swish' sounds for transitions, a vacuum-like suction hum when the device is active, and a sharp 'ding' and 'buzzer' sound coinciding with on-screen graphics. (4) The male and female voices engage in a rapid back-and-forth dialogue with comedic timing. (5) The video ends with a final upbeat musical flourish and both voices laughing.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: '自己在疊衣服的' (Folding clothes myself) appears in bold yellow and red. (2) Decorative: '講不聽' (Won't listen) with cartoonish impact lines for emphasis. (3) Functional: 'Morus V6 手持式電子衣櫥' (Morus V6 Handheld Electronic Closet) titles the product. (4) Functional: '20秒快速預熱' (20-second fast preheat), '殺菌&護理' (Sterilization & Care), and '三段式超強吸力' (3-stage super suction) list product specifications. (5) Decorative: Large red 'X' graphics over words like '細菌' (Bacteria) and '塵蟎' (Dust mites).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Problem Setup -> Product Introduction -> Feature Demonstration -> Objection Handling -> Final Wrap-up

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in a dark hoodie is seen crouched beside a pink and white claw machine, adjusting components at the base with tools. (2) A woman is on her knees on a wooden floor, carefully arranging blue letter balloons that spell 'HAPPY' and other birthday decorations. (3) A group of children and adults gather in a brightly lit room around a table holding the claw machine and a strawberry cake. A young boy wearing glasses is the focus of the group. (4) The boy stands by the cake, which has a '5' candle, and later blows it out as the crowd cheers. (5) The boy operates the joystick of the claw machine with the help of a woman, while other children watch with anticipation. (6) Close-up shots show the claw successfully grabbing a blue toy capsule and a small plush keychain.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic music starts immediately with sound effects. A male voice asks about the mission, and a second male voice replies that he is adjusting the claw machine. (2) Sound of general movement and light ambient noise as the setup continues. (3) A group of voices collectively sings 'Happy Birthday' in both Mandarin and English, accompanied by clapping. (4) Laughter and cheering erupt. A male voice asks the boy about his wishes; the boy repeatedly says 'none' (zhisun) in a playful tone. (5) The boy's voice is heard announcing 'I am 5 years old!' followed by more excited chatter. (6) Mechanical sounds of the claw machine operating are heard over the continuing background music and children's voices.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'KID哥 (怎麼又是你)' - Humorous hook. (2) '請問您今天接收的任務是什麼任務' - Functional question. (3) '調整夾娃娃機' - Functional response. (4) '專業夾娃娃機維修師傅' - Descriptive label. (5) '場地佈置中' - Status update. (6) 'HAPPY 5 BIRTHDAY' - Celebration text. (7) '祝你生日快樂' - Celebration hook. (8) '還沒唱完!!!!' - Humorous emphasis. (9) '知足的波' - Descriptive title. (10) '我是蔡波能, 我五歲啦' - Identification and celebration text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows an Intro (task reveal) -> Preparation (setup montage) -> Climax (birthday celebration) -> Activity (playing with the machine) flow.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman in a yellow sweatshirt struggling to juggle multiple gift bags with family labels. (2) Transition to a studio setting where the woman stands behind a table filled with various 7-Eleven gift boxes. (3) Close-up shots of Starbucks-branded red and pink metal gift boxes containing coffee egg rolls and sticks. (4) Presentation of an Ultraman-themed capsule machine toy that dispenses candy. (5) Showcasing Kuromi-themed piggy banks and candy buckets. (6) Introduction of character-themed boxes featuring Toshio and a Miss Rabbit snake-shaped coin bank. (7) Demonstration of an OPEN-chan lucky draw box where the woman pulls out a prize. (8) Final scene showing the woman surrounded by all the gift boxes on a table, waving to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music starts. A high-pitched female voice energetically introduces the stress of New Year gifting. (2) Music continues as a clear male voiceover provides professional narration for specific product details and prices. (3) Sound effects including 'ding' and 'pop' are used during product reveals. (4) The audio maintains a consistent high-energy tempo with the male voiceover describing the features of each gift box. (5) The video ends with the female voice returning, followed by a crunching sound effect as she eats a snack.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV：過年要準備送禮的你' (POV: You preparing gifts for Lunar New Year) appears as a hook. (2) Functional text labels identify relatives like '爸爸媽媽' (Father/Mother) and '大伯' (Uncle). (3) '7-ELEVEN 都幫你準備好了!' (7-Eleven has everything ready for you!). (4) Decorative text overlays show product names and prices, such as '星巴克精選咖啡蛋捲禮盒 $580' and 'ULTRAMAN家庭扭蛋機禮盒 $1499'.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a live-action group challenge. It begins with a group of approximately nine people, including women and children, looking at the camera in an indoor studio environment. (2) From Round 1 to Round 6, each sequence follows a pattern: a countdown appears while the people scramble to hide behind objects like suitcases, tables, and clothing racks. (3) After each countdown, the camera shows a wide shot of the room, and red circles appear to highlight participants who failed to hide completely, followed by text labels indicating they are 'OUT'. (4) The final round focuses on a young toddler who remains in front of the camera, looking confused as everyone else has hidden.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio consists of a continuous, upbeat pop-funk music track with a strong bassline and rhythmic drum beat. (2) There are no spoken vocals or dialogue from the participants; the audio is purely the background track. (3) The music maintains a consistent tempo and volume throughout the entire duration, ending abruptly with the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'ROUND 1' through 'ROUND 6' titles indicate the game rounds. (2) Hook Text: '限時五秒內躲到鏡頭拍不到的地方' (Hide where the camera can't see within five seconds) appears at the top. (3) Decorative/Effect Text: Countdown numbers '5, 4, 3, 2, 1' appear center-screen. (4) Decorative Text: Names followed by 'OUT!' (e.g., '二伯 OUT!', '波 OUT!', '云琪 OUT!') highlight losers. (5) Emotion Text: '(???)' appears near the toddler at the end to suggest confusion.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with an older man enjoying a spring roll, followed by a series of close-up shots showing the assembly of the roll: spreading peanut powder, adding noodles, shredded egg, meat, cabbage, and carrots on a thin wrapper. (2) The scene shifts to a bright modern kitchen where the main female creator, wearing a black 'HAHABABY' t-shirt, introduces the ingredients laid out on the counter. (3) Chronological cooking sequences show her stir-frying cabbage, boiling bamboo shoots and carrots in water, pan-frying seasoned pork belly until golden brown, and shredding cooked chicken by hand while wearing gloves. (4) A young boy in a yellow shirt enters the frame, and the woman helps him roll his own spring roll; he then takes a large bite with a happy expression. (5) The video concludes with the woman and a male friend in a blue sweater discussing the tradition of adding noodles to spring rolls, pointing at the ingredients and laughing while text overlays ask the audience for their opinion.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo acoustic-pop background music starts immediately. (2) A female voice begins speaking in Mandarin with an enthusiastic and friendly tone, introducing the Ching Ming festival tradition. (3) Crisp foley sounds are prominent: the 'hm-mm' of satisfaction while eating, the sizzling of meat in a pan, the bubbling of boiling water, and the rustling of plastic gloves. (4) Occasional interjections from a male voice (fatherly tone) and the sound of a child chewing and responding 'mm-hmm' to a question. (5) The audio ends with a lively multi-person conversation and laughter as they discuss regional food differences.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '清明' (Ching Ming) title card with traditional motifs. (2) Ingredient labels: '高麗菜' (Cabbage), '竹筍' (Bamboo shoots), '紅蘿蔔' (Carrots), '鹹豬肉' (Salty pork), '雞肉' (Chicken), '麵' (Noodles), '蛋' (Egg). (3) Decorative/Hook Text: '完成啦 YUMMY' (Finished, Yummy), '全家大小一起DIY' (Whole family DIY together), '潤餅南北之戰' (Spring roll North-South battle), '有麵派? 無麵派?' (Team Noodles? Team No Noodles?), '底下留言' (Comment below).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Ingredient Showcase -> Cooking Process -> Family DIY -> Social Debate/CTA

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a shot of an office worker sitting with her back to the camera, wearing a brown jacket. (3) Transitions to a female staff member at a desk drinking from a yellow mug; a sign is propped up in front of her laptop. (6) A woman sits at a desk with a pile of clothes nearby, drinking coffee from a paper cup with a sign in front of her. (7) The final shot shows two women at their desks with signs on their backs, one identifying herself and the other pointing to the person behind her.

(5) '找我的話去官方IG留言 依時間順序回覆 不要插隊' (Decorative Text): On a sign regarding social media contact and queuing. (6) '我沒有在玩手機 我是在剪片' (Decorative Text): On a sign clarifying phone use as video editing work. (7) '咖啡先來十杯 不然我沒辦法工作' (Decorative Text): On a sign expressing a need for coffee to work. (8) '我是kiki 不是大姐姐' (Decorative Text): On a sign identifying a person's name. (3) The acoustic environment is dominated by the diegetic sounds of an arcade, specifically the metallic clinking of hundreds of coins falling and hitting each other. (4) Later, the soundscape changes slightly to include the ambient chatter and echoing footsteps typical of a large public hall like an airport, though the BGM remains dominant.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "享受財富自由的感覺" (Enjoying the feeling of financial freedom) - Hook text, humorous. (2) "哈哈推幣團" (Haha Coin Pusher Group) - Decorative text, playful. (3) "好好玩喔" (So much fun) - Decorative text, enthusiastic. (4) "李佩潔就是這樣被推坑" (Li Peijie was hooked just like this) - Functional text/Dialogue caption, teasing. (5) "是我推坑所有人" (I'm the one who hooked everyone) - Decorative text, confident.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a living room where a woman in a beige outfit approaches another woman sitting on a white sofa holding a phone; they look concerned and then surprised. (2) They move to the kitchen where the sink is full of dirty dishes with sauce stains. The beige-clad woman produces a bottle of dish soap. (3) Close-up shots show the soap being poured onto a brown sponge and used to scrub a white plate, creating thick white foam. (4) The woman in black is then shown washing fruits (apple, peppers) in a bowl. (5) Both women stand in the kitchen doorway, one holding a clean plate and the other holding the soap bottle, smiling and gesturing. (6) A gift box containing three different spray bottles is presented to the camera. The woman in black takes the box and walks away, leaving the beige-clad woman at the sink.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, acoustic guitar-driven background music starts immediately. Two female voices are heard in a conversational, slightly exaggerated tone, expressing surprise and concern. (2) As the scene shifts to the kitchen, the vocals transition into a clearer, instructional narration style, though the original speakers continue to chime in. (3) Sound effects of running water and the squeaky sound of a clean plate being rubbed are audible during the demonstration. (4) The music remains consistent in tempo and volume throughout, providing an energetic backdrop to the continuous dialogue and product description. (5) The video ends with a humorous exchange and a short musical sting.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the dialogue throughout the video. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Large red exclamation marks and '!?' appear early on to denote surprise. (3) Hook Text: '骨董級碗盤' (Antique-level dishes) appears over the sink. (4) Brand Text: 'Goodies & Co. 二合一蔬果碗盤洗潔劑' (2-in-1 Fruit & Vegetable Dish Soap) is displayed prominently. (5) Feature Text: '天然的咖啡渣製作而成' (Made from natural coffee grounds) and '中性植萃配方' (Neutral plant-based formula) highlight product benefits. (6) Closing Text: '愛上洗碗就靠它' (Fall in love with washing dishes because of it).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a 'Problem -> Solution -> Benefit -> Closing' flow, starting with the shock of dirty dishes and moving through a product demonstration to a final recommendation.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a POV shot of a pink suitcase being wheeled through an airport terminal near a Narita Sky Access counter. (2) It transitions to a series of clips showing a woman with her hair in a bun, wearing a light green Prada T-shirt and white pants, walking through a subway station and a street in Japan, smiling and looking back at the camera. (3) The sequence continues with shots of the woman posing in front of a Fendi advertisement, unwrapping a pair of new white luxury shoes, and then dining at a high-end restaurant where a chef is seen preparing food, and she is seen eating sushi. (4) The final shots include her playing a medal game in an arcade, a scenic view of a park bridge, and the couple enjoying a dish topped with caviar, ending with a dessert and a heart graphic.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat Mandarin pop music with a male vocal starts immediately, maintaining a cheerful and romantic tone. (2) The music remains the primary audio throughout the entire video, with a steady tempo and rhythmic beat. (3) No clear ambient noise or on-screen dialogue is audible, as the music serves as the dominant soundscape. (4) The audio fades out at the very end as the heart graphic appears.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: "喜歡和你一起旅行" (Love traveling with you) - Romantic and affectionate tone. (2) Decorative Text: "即使是工作" (Even if it's for work) - Contextual and casual tone. (3) Decorative Text: "但有你在我身邊" (But with you by my side) - Sentimental tone. (4) Decorative Text: "不知不覺已經結婚八年" (Unknowingly married for eight years) - Informative and celebratory tone. (5) Decorative Text: "謝謝你 蔡先生" (Thank you, Mr. Cai) - Grateful and intimate tone.
