perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a grey dress and vest excitedly introduces the Crayon Shin-chan theme park in an indoor setting. (2) The scene shifts to two boys in striped shirts playing on a white roller slide and exploring a wooden playhouse. (3) Various interactive play areas are shown: a child playing with a wall-mounted puzzle, another using a Crayon Shin-chan game on a blue tablet, and boys drawing on a transparent board. (4) The children, now wearing yellow hats and blue kindergarten-style smocks, color in Shin-chan themed pages at a green table. (5) The boys jump and play on a large, white inflatable mound designed to look like Shin-chan's buttocks, followed by shots of them lying in a blue and white ball pit and sitting in a pink cat-shaped vehicle prop. (6) A series of close-ups shows hands browsing merchandise: bags, pens, pencil cases, and pouches, all featuring Crayon Shin-chan characters. (7) The video ends with the children posing for the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic music begins immediately. A woman's voice speaks in an energetic and high-pitched Mandarin tone, introducing the location. (2) The soundscape is a mix of the continuous background music and the narrator's commentary. Occasional ambient noises from the play area, such as the clattering of the roller slide and children's laughter, are faintly audible. (3) Sound effects like 'boing' and cartoonish sparkles are inserted to emphasize actions like jumping or showing off cute items. (4) The narrator's speech density is high, providing a constant flow of information about the park's features and merchandise prices.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '蠟筆小新主題樂園 熊本店' (Crayon Shin-chan Theme Park Kumamoto Branch) with red location pins. (2) Decorative Text: '多樣化遊樂設施' (Diverse play facilities), '主題畫紙' (Themed coloring paper), 'Cosplay雙葉幼稚園' (Cosplaying Futaba Kindergarten), '屁屁彈跳區' (Butt bounce area), and '溜滑梯' (Slide). (3) Merchandise Labels: '周邊販賣部' (Merchandise section), '電腦包' (Laptop bag), '鉛筆盒' (Pencil case), '收納袋' (Storage bag). (4) Hook Text: '超可愛的' (Super cute), '我很累' (I'm so tired) during the ball pit scene, and '很好買哦' (Great for shopping).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Play area highlights -> Activity demo -> Merchandise showcase -> Outro photos

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a light blue shirt stands at a food stall in Tsukiji Market, holding a wagyu beef skewer topped with sea urchin, expressing surprise at the price. (2) Close-up shots of raw oysters on ice and various seafood displays are shown. (3) A man in a black t-shirt holds a similar skewer, looking at the camera and talking. (4) The woman is filmed eating a large oyster with chopsticks, showing a look of intense enjoyment. (5) She then bites into the wagyu and sea urchin skewer, nodding in approval. (6) The video concludes with her standing in front of a shop, holding a coffee drink topped with soft-serve ice cream, smiling and flashing a peace sign.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic pop music plays throughout. (2) A female voice speaks excitedly in Mandarin, discussing the high prices of the food and comparing them to Taiwan Dollars. (3) An off-screen male voice briefly joins the conversation, sounding skeptical then impressed. (4) Background sounds of a busy outdoor market are audible, including indistinct chatter and the sound of distant foot traffic. (5) There is a subtle slurping sound when the oyster is eaten.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese translate the dialogue about food prices and taste. (2) Decorative Hook Text: '日本' (Japan) and '築地市場' (Tsukiji Market) appear in large blue/white font at the start. (3) Price Hooks: '6000日幣', '1400台幣', '2000日幣', '450台幣' appear in bold colors to emphasize the cost. (4) Emotional Sticker: A red circular graphic with '爽' (Satisfying) appears when the woman eats. (5) Outro Text: '一日蛋白質補充完畢' (Daily protein intake completed) appears in stylized yellow font.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Price discussion hook -> Showcase of fresh seafood -> Eating reactions and taste review -> Closing summary with a drink.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in her 20s enters through a wooden door into a brightly lit room. She carries a stylish transparent umbrella and a black crossbody bag, wearing a white crop top and a denim skirt. She looks confident and poses as if walking a runway. (2) A woman in her 30s enters wearing a colorful polka-dot raincoat. She frantically tries to take it off without getting the floor wet, looking stressed and checking herself in a mirror. (3) A man in his 40s enters carrying a helmet and a wet raincoat, looking disgruntled and messy. He tosses his gear aside with a look of annoyance. (4) An older man in his 50s/60s enters wearing a helmet and the same polka-dot raincoat, looking completely drenched and exhausted. He struggles with his wet clothing, and the video ends with a close-up of his miserable expression.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic electronic background music plays. A female voice speaks in a lively, slightly mocking tone about being in one's 20s. (2) Music continues as a different female voice speaks with a more hurried and stressed tone, accompanied by the rustling sound of plastic fabric and objects being moved. (3) The music stays consistent but a male voice enters with a deeper, grumpier tone, expressing frustration. (4) The audio transitions to a mix of Mandarin and Hokkien. An older male voice complains about being wet, with the background music remaining at a steady, driving tempo.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Top center hook: 'States of different ages when it rains'. (2) Phase labels: 'Age in 20s', 'Age in 30s', 'Age in 40s', 'Age in 50s'. (3) Decorative/Effect text: 'Messy level 25%', 'Messy level 50%', 'Messy level 75%', 'Messy level 100%'. (4) Descriptive captions: 'Is the umbrella for decoration?', 'Must keep everything nice', 'Bad mood, don't want to care about anything', 'Wet but still won't take it off?'.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> 20s fashion show -> 30s cleaning panic -> 40s grumpy arrival -> 50s total exhaustion/misery

It uses a progression of four characters to show a shift from 'fashion over function' in youth to 'exhausted survival' in older age. The core appeal lies in the relatable humor of aging and the deteriorating grace one has when coming home from the rain.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) In a brightly lit office with marble floors, three women are on their knees playing with a small white dog and plush toys. (2) A man wearing a multicolored cardigan enters the frame, gesturing emphatically and talking to the women while they look up at him. (3) One woman points to a wet patch on the floor; she makes funny facial expressions as if confessing something embarrassing. (4) A different woman with long dark hair enters the scene, sniffing the air with a disgusted look. (5) A woman in a grey sweatshirt starts mopping the floor. (6) The woman with long hair presents a green 'PurUP' spray bottle directly to the camera with a bright smile. (7) Fast-paced montage showing the man and woman spraying various items: a white rug, a sofa, a bed, and a blue teddy bear. (8) A humorous clip shows the man holding a bottle of yellow liquid, appearing to drink it while a woman laughs. (9) The final scene shows the woman in a kitchen setting presenting four variants of the spray bottle on a counter.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched laughter and the sounds of women playing with a dog, accompanied by light background chatter. (2) An energetic male voice enters, speaking loudly and rapidly in Mandarin with a confrontational yet comedic tone. (3) Sudden transition to upbeat, high-tempo pop/electronic BGM as the product promotion begins. (4) Male voiceover becomes more structured and professional, explaining product features while 'pssh' spray sound effects are synchronized with visual spraying. (5) Multiple female voices provide short, excited interjections like 'Wow' and 'Effective'. (6) The audio ends with a high-pitched female vocal summarizing a promotion and a quick chime SFX.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '好痛' (It hurts!) - Decorative text appearing when the dog bites a toy. (2) '老闆來了' (The boss is here) - Functional text marking the arrival of the main character. (3) '沒有狗!' (No dog!) - Decorative text for comedic denial. (4) '這你尿的?' (Did you pee this?) - Functional text translating the accusation. (5) '植淨日常 雙效抗菌消臭噴霧' (PurUP Daily Dual-Effect Antibacterial Deodorant Spray) - Functional branding text. (6) '萃取200多種 植萃複方' (Extracted from 200+ plant formulas) - Functional product benefit. (7) '專屬優惠' (Exclusive Offer) - Functional promotional text. (8) '留言再抽全系列產品!!' (Comment to win the full series!!) - Functional CTA.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro skit with a dog mess -> Transition to product solution -> Demonstration of usage -> Final promotion and CTA.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long dark hair in a denim jacket stands in a white kitchen, holding a plate with a single piece of boiled chicken. (2) She moves to a stovetop and uses tongs to place the meat in a pan. (3) Suddenly, she is holding a large piece of golden-brown fried chicken; she takes a large bite, appearing satisfied. (4) She holds a glass of iced tea and opens a white refrigerator. (5) She is seen pouring dark boba pearls into the tea glass instead of ice. (6) A second woman wearing a yellow sweater enters the kitchen and gestures toward the food. (7) The second woman presents an orange and white box labeled 'AB-LipiGO'. (8) Close-up shots show a sachet being opened and the contents poured into a glass of water, followed by the second woman drinking it. (9) Both women stand together, holding sachets and pointing at the product box on the table.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and energetic electronic pop music plays continuously. A high-pitched female voice speaks in an enthusiastic, narrative tone about her diet. (2) A sharp 'crunch' sound effect is heard as the woman bites the food. (3) The first voice continues in a humorous, self-deprecating tone. (4) A second female voice enters, sounding helpful and informative, speaking with a faster cadence. (5) Brief sound effects like chimes or 'pings' occur when the product box is shown. (6) The music remains steady in tempo and volume throughout the second half. (7) Both voices speak together in a high-energy, synchronized manner for the final promotional statement.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '飲控秘笈' (Diet control secret) - A hook establishing the theme of weight management. (2) Functional text explains the struggle of eating cold chicken breast for breakfast and the 'mistake' of adding too much oil. (3) 'CC脆' - Decorative text emphasizing the texture of the fried chicken. (4) Functional text describes adding pearls to tea instead of ice as a jaw exercise. (5) 'AB-LipiGO 科懋利脂受' - Clearly identifies the endorsed brand and product name. (6) Marketing claims such as '7天有感' (Feel results in 7 days) and '歐洲最佳營養品' (Best nutritional product in Europe) appear. (7) '趕快買起來' (Buy it now) - A direct call-to-action hook at the end.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a split-screen comparison of 'Before' and 'After' skin around a woman's eye, highlighting spot reduction. (2) A woman appears in a hallway, shouting through a megaphone with a playful expression. (3) She transitions to an indoor setting, pointing to spots on her face while looking concerned. (4) Close-up shots of the La Roche-Posay MELA B3 Serum bottle and its packaging are shown, followed by technical graphics illustrating a 'Golden Triangle' of skin benefits. (5) The woman demonstrates applying the serum, first dropping a pinkish liquid onto her hand and then massaging it into her face. (6) Two other women appear individually to provide brief testimonials while holding the product. (7) The video concludes with the three women together, smiling and holding the product towards the camera in a group shot.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music begins immediately. A woman's voice is heard shouting excitedly through a megaphone. (2) The main female narrator speaks in a fast-paced, enthusiastic, and professional tone, explaining the product's benefits. (3) The music remains constant in the background, maintaining a rhythmic and positive mood. (4) Ambient noise is minimal, suggesting a studio or quiet indoor environment. (5) In the final segment, two additional female voices provide short, friendly testimonials with similar high-pitched and positive tones. (6) The video ends with a synchronized group cheer.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up of a coin-pusher machine in an arcade. Metal blades move back and forth, pushing a large pile of silver coins towards the edge, mixed with several green plastic balls. (2) The camera pans to the right to reveal a young woman sitting at the machine; she is smiling broadly, laughing, and gives a thumbs-up gesture while looking at the camera. (3) The view shifts back to the machine's tray, where a significant volume of coins is cascading down as the mechanism operates. (4) The camera returns to the woman, who gestures with her hand to indicate 'just a little' while talking excitedly and laughing, appearing surprised by her win.

Faint, upbeat electronic game music is audible in the background. (2) A female voice enters, speaking in a high-pitched, energetic, and joyful tone. She is laughing frequently between sentences. (3) The sound of the machine continues consistently, with the clatter of coins being the primary acoustic feature alongside the woman's excited commentary.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV:當我想說玩一下就要走' - Hook text indicating a humorous situation about intending to leave but getting stuck. (2) '走不了欸' - Decorative caption expressing the inability to leave due to winning. (3) '一直中' - Decorative caption highlighting the continuous winning. (4) '怎麼離開' - Decorative caption jokingly asking how to leave. (5) '太多了吧' - Decorative caption reacting to the large amount of coins. (6) '我只換了十枚而已' - Functional text explaining she only used ten coins originally.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young girl in a purple shirt and a woman in a grey-green shirt sit at a white table. They interact warmly. The girl plays with a pink ball. (2) The woman holds an iPhone, displaying an English learning app interface. She gestures and talks directly to the camera while sitting in a room with shelves and plush toys. (3) Screen recordings or close-ups of the smartphone show different menu options like 'Business English' and 'Scenario-based dialogue'. Fingers are seen scrolling and tapping. (4) The woman is shown in various indoor settings—sitting on the floor with plush toys, then back at the table—continuously explaining the app. (5) The video ends with the woman holding the phone showing a discount offer, followed by a final shot of the little girl smiling and playing with a yellow stuffed bear.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo background music plays. A woman's voice talks to a child; the child responds with 'steak' and 'hamburger' in English. (2) The woman's voice becomes the dominant narrator, speaking in a clear, enthusiastic, and professional tone about English learning challenges. (3) Subtle UI sound effects (clicks/swishes) accompany the on-screen text transitions. (4) The music remains consistent in the background as the woman explains app features. (5) At the end, the child's voice is heard singing 'Happy happy happy' over a playful melody as the music fades.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'steak' and 'hamburger' appear with food icons (Decorative/Hook, enthusiastic). (2) 'Speak AI 英文口說App' (Functional, informative). (3) '身為職業媽媽...' and subsequent subtitles translate the spoken Chinese narration (Functional, narrative). (4) '自由設定AI對話情境', '跟老闆的英文簡報', '模擬雅思' (Functional, feature highlights). (5) '訂閱年度會員 還有最高 $777 的折扣' and '只到 6/20' (Functional, promotional hook). (6) 'Speak 讓英文一切好說' (Functional, slogan).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Interaction with child -> Problem identification -> App demonstration and feature list -> Call to action with discount.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional endorsement for the 'Speak' AI English learning app. It targets busy working parents by demonstrating how the app can be used in 'fragmented time' to improve spoken English through AI-driven scenarios (meetings, interviews, daily life). The inclusion of a child adds a relatable 'mom influencer' touch to build trust and relevance.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The speaker directly introduces the app, demonstrates its features, and provides a specific discount offer and deadline.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Mom-influencer style, educational content for adults using lifestyle vlog aesthetics.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively bridges the gap between childcare vlogs and educational software marketing.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a POV shot of a cable car ascending a hill surrounded by lush green trees, with title text overlay. (2) A young boy in samurai armor makes a funny face, followed by family photos at Matsuyama Castle and the Dogo Onsen hot spring area. (3) Quick cuts show kangaroos and a polar bear at Tobe Zoological Park, then transitions to adults and children ziplining at Ehime Children's Castle. (4) The family is seen riding an orange monorail and playing in the Okaido Shopping Arcade, including a vintage tram passing by. (5) They visit the Ehime Gokoku Shrine and Ehime University Museum. (6) The children play on large slides and playground equipment at Matsumae Park. (7) The final segment shows the kids playing interactive digital games, climbing, and using arcade machines at the Emifull MASAKI shopping center.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat pop music with an energetic tempo plays continuously throughout the video. (2) Occasional vocals from a female and male narrator provide enthusiastic exclamations and location introductions in Mandarin. (3) Specific sound effects include the mechanical whirring of a zipline at 0:17 and a distinct tram bell ringing at 0:30. (4) Sounds of children laughing and the electronic noise of arcade games are audible in the final few seconds.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: "日本愛媛 十大推廣 Let's Go!" in bold colorful fonts. (2) Functional text: Numbered locations from "1.松山城" to "10.Emifull松前購物中心" appear chronologically as subtitles. (3) Decorative/Effect text: Parenthetical captions like "(大膽組)" and "(偷約會啊！)" appear with a humorous, variety-show tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Montage of 10 recommended travel locations -> Interactive arcade ending

(4) The woman gestures toward a menu board and someone is shown pouring batter into an egg cake mold shaped like a character. (5) Final shots show more product boxes and customers in the background.

(2) A female voice speaks enthusiastically, introducing the 'food zone' and mentioning Chinese New Year preparations. (3) As the visuals change, she describes specific items like curry rice, beef noodles, and new snack products. (4) Background ambient noise includes faint chatter and sounds of a busy retail environment. (5) The narration continues with a focus on trying individual items before buying full boxes.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with an outdoor POV shot of a hand gesturing towards a distant view of Mount Fuji under a cloudy sky. (2) It transitions to a series of quick cuts showcasing the interior of a wooden cabin, including a large living room, a window view, a dart board game, the sink area, a bathtub, a toilet with a bidet, and a bedroom with two beds. (3) The scene shifts back outdoors to show various trailer-style accommodations, one featuring 'CHUMS' branding, followed by a woman posing in front of a white tent with Mount Fuji in the background. (4) A child is shown rolling on a green lawn, followed by shots of an indoor aquarium with fish and jellyfish, and a purple-lit light tunnel at night. (5) Finally, a staff member is shown delivering trays of food to a table, and a man is seen eating in the cabin, ending with a nighttime exterior shot of the resort.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo, upbeat electronic pop music with a repetitive 'up and down' vocal chop starts immediately and continues throughout the entire video. (2) Discrete, cartoon-like 'pop' and 'ting' sound effects are synchronized with the appearance of text overlays on the screen. (3) No human speech or environmental ambient noise is audible over the loud background music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '渡假園區' (Resort Park) - Decorative Hook. (2) '大客廳' (Large Living Room) - Functional description. (3) '大面窗' (Large Window) - Functional description. (4) '遊戲' (Games) - Functional description. (5) '洗手' (Wash Hands) - Functional description. (6) '洗身體' (Wash Body) - Functional description. (7) '洗屁屁' (Wash Bottom) - Functional/Humorous description. (8) '富士山' (Mt. Fuji) - Functional description. (9) '兩張床' (Two Beds) - Functional description. (10) '還有車屋' (Also Trailer Houses) - Functional description. (11) '企鵝聯名車屋' (Penguin Co-branded Trailer House) - Functional description. (12) '又是富士山' (Fuji Again) - Decorative Hook. (13) '可以拍照' (Can Take Photos) - Functional description. (14) '可以打滾' (Can Roll Around) - Functional description. (15) '免費看魚' (Free Fish Viewing) - Functional Hook. (16) '水母漂' (Floating Jellyfish) - Functional description. (17) '晚上會開燈' (Lights On At Night) - Functional description. (18) '含晚餐' (Dinner Included) - Functional Hook. (19) '二大二小' (Two Adults Two Kids) - Functional information. (20) '一晚只要' (Only... Per Night) - Hook. (21) '8800' - Functional pricing. (22) '時之栖 OUTDOOR HILL VILLAGE' - Location Brand Logo.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Rapid Room Tour -> Outdoor Facilities -> Night Activities -> Dining & Price Reveal

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Live-action video. Two young boys and adults pose with Crayon Shin-chan cutouts in a modern lobby. The boys hold yellow boxes and large cookies. (2) Close-ups of event posters on glass windows and admission tickets are shown. (3) The scene shifts to a bright indoor workshop area with yellow tables; a woman helps a boy sanitize his hands and prepare for a DIY activity. (4) Detailed shots of the cookie-making process: kneading dough, using a rolling pin, and carefully placing black dough pieces to create Shin-chan's facial features. (5) A montage of the children playing in a brightly colored indoor facility with yellow pipes and an electronic drawing station. (6) A boy receives the finished, baked cookie from a counter. (7) The video ends with the boy eating the cookie at a restaurant with his family.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat pop music with a playful rhythm starts immediately. An adult male voice provides energetic narration in Mandarin. (2) Cartoon-style sound effects like dings, pops, and sparkles are layered over the music. (3) An adult female voice and a young boy's voice are heard interacting during the DIY segment. (4) Ambient noise from the museum (muffled crowd chatter) and the mechanical sound of a scanner/printer are audible. (5) The music continues through to the final scene in the restaurant.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '大阪限定 DIY 蠟筆小新餅乾' (Decorative/Hook): Bold yellow and red text introducing the limited Osaka DIY activity. (2) '10:30, 11:30, 13:30...' (Functional): Schedule of event times. (3) '門票優惠 1800 日幣' (Functional): Highlighting a discounted ticket price. (4) '製作說明' (Functional): Title for the instructional sequence. (5) '餅乾製作中' (Functional): Captions indicating the process. (6) '真心說餅乾真的很香很好吃' (Decorative): Emotional review text expressing how delicious the cookie is. (7) '憑單領取餅乾' (Functional): Instructional text on how to collect the finished product.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Practical Info -> DIY Process -> Entertainment/Wait -> Final Product/Tasting

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a montage of indoor security cameras mounted on walls. A large text overlay appears in the center. (2) A woman in a grey sleeveless dress is seen vacuuming a light-colored rug in a modern living room; she turns her back to reveal a white sign taped to her dress. (3) The woman is in a hallway, leaning towards a hidden camera, making exaggerated pouty and playful facial expressions. (4) She opens a large built-in wardrobe, revealing organized storage bins; another sign is visible on the inner wall of the closet. (5) She is sitting at a desk with a computer, then leans down to open a drawer where a paper with a printed image of a luxury bag and text is placed. (6) She walks down a hallway and enters a room, closing the door behind her to reveal a final sign stuck to the door's surface.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, mid-tempo electronic pop track with a catchy melody begins immediately and continues throughout the entire video. (2) There are no audible vocals or spoken dialogue detected. (3) The acoustic environment is dominated by the background music, with very minimal ambient noise or sound effects that are mostly drowned out by the track.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '當你化工個愛看監視器的老公' (Decorative Hook: When you have a husband who loves watching the security cameras) - Humorous tone. (2) '我的努力 你看得見' (Functional: My hard work, you can see it) - Earnest/Playful tone on a back sign. (3) '我老了 你還會愛我嗎?' (Functional: I'm old, will you still love me?) - Sentimental/Probing tone on a closet sign. (4) '蔡先生 我想要這個 可以買給我嗎' (Functional: Mr. Cai, I want this, can you buy it for me?) and '(卡帶約13萬)' (Note: The bag is about 130,000) - Direct request tone in a drawer. (5) '如果以上都可以的話 我們床上見❤️' (Functional: If all the above are okay, see you in bed) - Flirty/Closing tone on a door sign.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Series of staged 'messages' for the camera -> Final flirty invitation.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Series of Propositions -> Climax/Invitation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: A comedic skit intended to entertain and potentially influence a partner. The creator uses the household's security cameras as a communication channel to show her 'hard work', ask for reassurance, and finally make a specific material request (a luxury bag) followed by a romantic invitation. It plays on the trope of 'smart' or 'sneaky' wives managing their husbands through humor.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The luxury bag (Loewe) is mentioned as a personal gift request rather than a promotion.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of physical signs/papers to communicate with an off-screen 'husband' via security cameras.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a popular social media trend of interacting with security cameras for comedic effect. The high text density is characteristic of Asian short-form content.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Ten individuals are posed in a studio setting, with red numbers 1 through 10 superimposed above their heads. They are all holding smartphones. (2) As the music plays, participants shift their facial expressions and body language; some sway slightly, some pretend to sing with closed eyes, and others maintain a neutral, observant look to conceal who is actually vocalizing. (3) The shot remains static throughout the entire performance, focusing on the collective group's expressions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a single, clear female voice singing a melodic Mandopop song a cappella. (2) The singing continues without any background music, maintaining a steady and emotional tempo. (3) The vocal track remains consistent in volume and clarity until the video ends, with no ambient noise or sound effects detected.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: "到底誰在唱歌" (Who on earth is singing?) appears at the top center with a curious and challenging tone. (2) Decorative Text: Numbers 1 through 10 are placed above the heads of the ten participants for identification. (3) Functional Text: Subtitles for the lyrics appear at the bottom, along with the song credit "七月半-你聽見我了沒有".

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women are in a living room; one points toward the camera while the other takes notes. (2) The main woman moves closer to the lens, gesturing expressively while addressing the viewer. (3) The scene shifts to a bathroom where the woman presents product boxes and then individual bottles of shower mousse. (4) Close-ups show the mousse being applied to an arm and leg, creating a thick white foam. (5) The woman is then seen sitting in a bathtub, demonstrating the texture of the foam on her hands and body. (6) The video cuts back to the living room setting where the host presents three different versions of the product side-by-side. (7) Final shot shows the host smiling and waving behind the product lineup.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo pop music begins. A female voice speaks in an informal, observational tone. (2) The female voice shifts to a direct, persuasive tone addressing the audience. (3) A male narrator's voice enters, speaking clearly and professionally to describe product features. (4) Sound effects (SFX) such as soft 'pop' sounds accompany text appearances and 'squish' sounds accompany the mousse dispensing. (5) The female host's voice returns at the end, sounding cheerful and encouraging.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '哎 你有沒有看到' (Hey, did you see?) - Hook. (2) '不要再滑手機了 好好洗澡 才能放鬆啊' (Stop scrolling, take a good bath to relax) - Functional/Instructional. (3) '挑選合格沐浴乳' (Choosing qualified shower gel) - Title Hook. (4) '很難沖' (Hard to rinse), '皮膚很滑' (Slippery skin), '不明添加物' (Unknown additives), '皮膚乾癢' (Dry/itchy skin) - Descriptive/Problem points. (5) '淨淨 胺基酸沐浴慕斯' (CleanClean Amino Acid Shower Mousse) - Product Title. (6) '德國DERMATEST 皮膚科醫師實測認證' - Endorsement/Functional. (7) '乾性肌 痘痘肌 敏乾肌' (Dry skin, Acne skin, Sensitive skin) - Targeting text. (8) '嬰兒級 安心洗沐產品' (Baby-grade safe washing product) - Quality Hook.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Living Room) -> Problem Identification -> Product Reveal (Bathroom) -> Feature Demonstration -> Conclusion (Living Room).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with her hair in a bun, wearing a black blazer, laughs at a wooden desk while holding food in a plastic bag. (2) A woman named Kiki wearing a black shirt and glasses talks to the camera, explaining a prank. (3) Kiki crouches by a desk, plugging a USB dongle into a PC tower. (4) Scene transitions to a laptop screen showing a chat app (LINE). (5) A young man (Baozi) in a beige t-shirt enters the office. (6) Kiki types on a retro-style wireless keyboard from a distance. (7) Close-up of chat messages being sent automatically on a screen. (8) Baozi looks confused at his monitor, then checks his computer hardware under the desk. (9) Colleagues are seen laughing in the background. (10) A woman speaks on a mobile phone near office supplies. (11) Several Starbucks paper bags are placed on a desk. (12) Final shot shows Baozi typing at his desk with Starbucks bags in front of him.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy background music with a fast tempo begins. Multiple female voices are heard laughing and talking loudly in Mandarin. (2) Music volume drops slightly as a woman (Kiki) speaks in a conspiratorial, excited tone. Sound of footsteps on a hard floor. (3) Sound of a USB device being plugged into a computer port (metallic click). (4) Sound of rapid mechanical keyboard typing. (5) A male voice expresses confusion with short, questioning phrases. (6) More loud group laughter follows. (7) The music reaches a peak with upbeat, rhythmic beats as the final scene unfolds with ambient office chatter.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "前情提要 大家叫包子趕快休息吃飯": Functional text explaining the backstory of the prank. (2) "調皮同事代表 KIKI": Decorative text introducing Kiki as the mischievous prankster. (3) "今天要幹嘛 要惡整同事啊": Functional text stating the prank objective. (4) "我要讓他電腦有鬼": Functional text explaining the 'haunting' concept. (5) "我要操控他的電腦": Functional text confirming the remote control intent. (6) "正在準備午餐的包子": Functional text identifying the victim. (7) "今天我請大家喝星巴克喔": Functional text showing the prank message sent in the chat. (8) "謎之行為": Decorative text reacting to the victim's confusion. (9) "謝謝包子": Hook text thanking the victim for the 'gift'.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Prank Setup -> Prank Execution -> Victim Reaction -> Result (Starbucks arrived)

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with two women walking into a restaurant called 'JIN.HER'. (2) Inside, a waiter in a white shirt and black suspenders presents a menu. The restaurant has a large decorative hot air balloon and dried floral arrangements. (3) The women are seated at a table and begin trying various durian-themed dishes. First is a white layered drink with a lime slice. They stir it and take sips. (4) Next is a coffee-layered drink (durian latte). A close-up shows thick durian flesh being sucked up through a straw. (5) They eat a pizza topped with what looks like durian and small snacks. (6) A large souffle pancake is served with cream and durian fruit on the side. Liquid sauce is poured over it. (7) The women react with mixed expressions of intensity and enjoyment while eating. (8) The video ends with a shot of the menu showing the 'Season of the King' durian items.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic/pop background music plays continuously throughout. (2) Two female voices are heard conversing in Mandarin, discussing the food's texture and flavor. They describe the coconut taste and the strong durian presence. (3) Ambient restaurant noise is minimal, with clear vocal focus. (4) Sounds of sipping through a straw and light clinking of cutlery are heard occasionally. (5) The music remains upbeat until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'JIN.HER 今鶴' - Functional: Restaurant name. (2) '榴槤椰果凍飲' - Functional: Durian Coconut Jelly Drink. (3) '不黏 / 很像椰奶' - Functional: Not sticky / very like coconut milk. (4) '很東南亞的味道' - Functional: Very Southeast Asian flavor. (5) '榴槤拿鐵' - Functional: Durian Latte. (6) '榴槤果肉' - Functional: Durian flesh. (7) '榴槤乖乖PIZZA' - Functional: Durian Pizza. (8) '榴槤望返舒芙蕾' - Functional: Durian Souffle Pancake. (9) '讚賞!! 好吃到太驚艷' - Decorative: Praise!! So delicious it's stunning.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at entrance -> Menu reveal -> Sequential tasting of four different durian dishes -> Summary/Outro.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a split-screen intro featuring a man and women in a hallway, overlaid with large yellow text. (2) It transitions into a fast-paced montage comparing professional dancers in a large, well-lit studio with several individuals in a narrow marble-floored hallway attempting the same energetic dance moves. (3) The professional dancers wear various outfits (black, red, grey), while the hallway dancers are in casual wear. Characters show high-energy expressions, laughing, and dynamic movements like high kicks and spins. (4) The video concludes with a group shot in the hallway and a black screen with recruitment-style text.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo, upbeat electronic dance music starts immediately and continues throughout the montage. (2) Transition SFX like digital glitches occur between visual cuts. (3) Towards the end, the music lowers to allow for audible laughter and light-hearted shouting from the people in the hallway. (4) A final laugh track or giggle is heard over the ending text screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "什麼" (What), "還有" (Also), "Round 2": Hook text in yellow and black. (2) "抓! KIKI 偷懶啊": Variety-show style caption accusing a character of being lazy. (3) "誠徵 職缺：正職 希望你：會跳舞、體力好 (開玩笑的)": Functional and joke text regarding recruitment for dancers with good stamina.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Comparative Dance Montage -> Comedic Group Outro -> Text Outro

(2) Close-up shots of a variety of colorful meringue cookies topped on small round crackers; the host is shown holding a bag of these snacks and taking a bite, smiling with satisfaction. (3) The video transitions to several packaged bags of snacks with different flavor labels like Matcha and Oreo; the host then stands behind a display counter filled with these bags. (4) The host continues to eat the snack while gesturing towards the camera, eventually posing with six bags of the product spread out on the counter. (5) The final sequence shows a close-up of a promotional poster detailing store offers and the wide-angle view of the 'OASIS' pop-up stall located in the mall basement.

A young female voice speaks with a high-pitched, energetic, and welcoming tone, introducing a 'hidden snack' at a pop-up store. (2) The music continues as the female voice describes the product's texture as being like 'crispy cotton candy' and lists various flavors. (3) Subtle sounds of plastic packaging crinkling and crunching are heard as she tastes the snack. (4) The female voice transitions into a promotional call-to-action, announcing a giveaway while the music maintains its steady, cheerful pace. (5) The audio concludes with her providing specific location and date details, with the music fading out at the very end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '我最近來看我們的快閃店的時候，發現了一個超刷嘴的隱藏零食' (I found a super addictive hidden snack while visiting our pop-up store) - Hook text, Tone: Excited. (4) '抹茶、檸檬、OREO、焦糖脆脆' (Matcha, Lemon, Oreo, Caramel Crispy) - Functional text. (5) '抽兩位送六包！' (Choosing two winners to give away six bags!) - Promotional hook, Tone: Energetic. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women wearing white safety helmets and reflective vests are in a retail store under construction; one points towards a shelf while talking. (2) Quick cuts show one woman placing items on high shelves, another cutting open a cardboard box with a utility knife, and one standing near a tall ladder supervising work behind a plastic sheet. (3) Transition to a woman standing in front of storage bins saying something to the camera while wearing her vest over a green dress. (4) A series of clips show them playfully 'working': hanging clothes and immediately moving them, carrying a box around the store without purpose, and laughing while applying a tiny sticker to a counter. (5) The video ends with a static graphic of a logo featuring a cartoon woman and event details.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo acoustic guitar and piano music begins. A female voice speaks in a bright, narrative tone. (2) The music continues as the primary soundscape; occasional subtle ambient rustling of boxes and movement is heard under the BGM. (3) Music shifts slightly in tone as a female voice says 'I am ready' in Mandarin. (4) The BGM becomes more playful and whimsical with woodwind-like synth sounds. Frequent sounds of female laughter and light-hearted chatter occur. (5) The music reaches a final chord and fades out as the screen transitions to the end card.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '你以為的快閃進櫃' - Hook text indicating expectation of pop-up store setup, serious tone. (2) '擺設討論', '商品上架', '包材處理', '水電設備監工', '商品數量清點' - Functional text describing various professional setup tasks. (3) '實際上' - Large text indicating the shift to reality. (4) '裝忙', '拿起來又放回去', '這邊搬搬那邊搬搬', '我盡我小小的心力', '太小了吧' - Decorative text mocking their own lack of productivity with a humorous tone. (5) 'TAIPEI POP UP STORE DREAM PLAZA 7/25~9/7' - Functional text providing event dates and location.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a group of young adults standing on a sidewalk under lush green trees, putting their hands together in a huddle and cheering enthusiastically. (2) The scene shifts to behind-the-scenes footage showing two girls sitting on a white Gogoro scooter; one is wearing a brown shirt and a beige helmet, the other a grey shirt and a colorful polka-dot helmet. They look at a phone and discuss the shot. (3) Several 'NG' (no-good) takes follow, showing the group laughing, running out of place, and a girl in a white tank top gesturing wildly to the camera. (4) The 'main scene' begins: the two girls ride the white scooter down a paved street lined with trees and modern buildings while a group of about five friends chases them on foot, shouting and pointing. (5) The video ends with a solid red screen featuring white text and a scalloped white frame around central numbers.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music starts immediately along with the sound of a group of people shouting and cheering in Mandarin. (2) The music continues as a background layer while clear female and male voices discuss filming details, with sounds of laughter. (3) During the chase scene, the audio becomes a loud, rhythmic chanting/shouting of promotional lines in Mandarin, delivered with high energy and urgency by multiple voices. (4) The video concludes with a short, final musical chime as the text card appears.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'NG 再一次' (NG, one more time) and 'NG 第N次後...' (After the Nth NG...) appearing as white captions to indicate filming bloopers. (2) Decorative Text: 'HAHABABAY 4th Anniversary' and '7/27 最後倒數' (7/27 Final Countdown) appearing on a red graphic background at the end, conveying a sense of excitement and celebration for a brand event.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Behind-the-scenes/NG compilation -> Final high-energy chase scene -> Promotional call to action

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a hand holding four vintage-style tickets in front of the entrance to Seibuen Amusement Park. (2) A man in a bright red fleece jacket walks through a meticulously recreated Showa-era Japanese shopping street with retro storefronts and signs. Two young boys are seen interacting with a pink rotary telephone and looking at vintage snacks. (3) Performers dressed in mid-20th-century police and civilian costumes engage in street theater and dance. A small three-wheeled parade vehicle passes by. (4) A rapid montage follows showing children on various rides: driving green go-karts, riding a frog and ostrich on a carousel, traveling on a miniature steam train, and spinning on an octopus-themed ride. (5) The man runs up a grand stone staircase toward a building labeled 'Tasogare Cinema'. Inside, the group enters a dining area designed to look exactly like the interior of a luxury vintage train car. (6) A waitress in a formal uniform serves a plate of Japanese 'yoshoku' (western-style food) featuring hamburger steak, fried shrimp, and omelet rice. The video ends with a price list overlay.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music with a strong percussion beat starts immediately. A male voice speaks in Mandarin, introducing the location and the nostalgic atmosphere. (2) Ambient sounds of a theme park are heard, including the chatter of crowds and children's excited voices. (3) During the parade segment, the music remains dominant, but the sounds of street performers shouting and cheering are audible. (4) On the rides, the children's high-pitched voices are heard shouting 'Bye bye!' and laughing. (5) In the restaurant, the soundscape shifts slightly to include the ambient chugging and whistle of a train, simulating a moving railcar environment. (6) The video concludes with the music fading out as the voiceover provides final comments.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '日本東京 西武園遊樂園' - Functional text identifying the location as Tokyo Seibuen Amusement Park. (2) '派出所', '商店街', '零食', '周邊' - Decorative/Functional labels identifying the police station, shopping street, snacks, and merchandise sections. (3) '隨機的表演' - Hook text indicating random street performances. (4) '遊行 15:30 每日一場' - Functional text giving parade times. (5) '超過20種遊樂設施' - Decorative hook emphasizing the variety of rides, followed by labels like '卡丁車' (Go-kart) and '旋轉木馬' (Carousel). (6) '入園門票' - Functional text showing ticket prices for adults (4400 yen) and children (3300 yen).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a logical flow from park entry to street activities, ride montages, and finally dining and pricing information.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 adult male (the creator), 2 young boys (main travelers), and various background performers/passers-by.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An adult male wearing a bright red textured fleece jacket and black pants; two young boys in casual jackets (yellow and beige).

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background transitions from a sunny outdoor amusement park gate to a sheltered, retro-styled Japanese shopping street with wooden buildings and paper lanterns, and finally into a dim, wood-paneled train-themed restaurant interior.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural bright sunlight outdoors; warm, atmospheric indoor lighting in the shopping street and restaurant.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Location Showcase -> Action Compilation -> Practical Utility
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a travel guide and recommendation for Seibuen Amusement Park in Tokyo. By combining visual proof of the unique Showa-era retro aesthetic, the variety of child-friendly rides, and the immersive themed dining experience, it aims to convince families that this is a high-value destination. The fast-paced editing and upbeat music create a sense of fun and excitement, while the final inclusion of ticket prices provides viewers with actionable planning information.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: None

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Family-centric travel perspective with a focus on immersive themed environments.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages heavy text overlays to guide the viewer through the specific attractions, making it highly suitable for social media consumption where audio might be muted initially.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a blue and white striped sleeveless dress, walks through a brightly lit shopping mall identified as 'Dream Plaza'. She is seen on an escalator and walking through the corridors. (2) She enters a store named 'STANCAVE' where she looks at sports apparel, specifically a WBC (World Baseball Classic) themed jacket and jersey. She also shows a tray with various embroidered patches. (3) The scene shifts to 'HOBBY WORLD', a store filled with toy boxes, anime figurines, and collectible cards. She smiles while holding a pink box. (4) She transitions to 'FLIPPER'S', a cafe with white brick walls and wooden accents. She is seen browsing a menu featuring souffle pancakes. (5) She and a female friend are at a table, excitedly eating a tall, multi-layered strawberry souffle pancake tower. They take bites and look directly at the camera with expressions of delight.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic pop background music plays continuously. A female voice speaks in an enthusiastic, fast-paced tone, introducing the mall. (2) The music maintains its tempo as the female narrator describes the products at STANCAVE and the customization options for patches. (3) Music continues as she talks about the toys and collectibles found in Hobby World. (4) Sound of a page turning or soft restaurant ambiance is layered under the BGM as the narration focuses on the cafe. (5) The voices of the two women are heard reacting to the taste of the dessert with 'Mmm' sounds and happy exclamations, while the upbeat music reaches its conclusion.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in a green and white striped shirt and a woman in a white dress are walking quickly down a wet sidewalk lined with trees; a large text bubble appears above them. (2) The scene shifts indoors to a modern apartment; the woman, now wearing a black cardigan over her white dress, brings a cup of coffee to the man who is working on a laptop. She gestures with her hands as if explaining something and gives a double thumbs-up. (3) The woman is sitting on a white sofa eating a plate of fried food while the man sits next to her using a remote control; she feeds him a piece of food. (4) In the hallway, the woman kneels to help the man put on his white sneakers while social media screenshots of food and toys appear as overlays. (5) The woman playfully pushes the man out of the front door. (6) The video returns to the sidewalk where the man is walking ahead very fast, and the woman has to run to catch his hand.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic music begins immediately. A high-pitched, energetic male voice starts a rapid-fire narration in Mandarin, speaking as if he is the inner voice of the woman on screen. (2) The narration remains continuous and rhythmic, matching the fast editing pace of the video. Subtle 'pop' and 'whoosh' sound effects are used during visual transitions and text appearances. (3) The background music maintains its high energy until the very end, where a short, high-tempo electronic remix of the 'Baby Shark' melody plays as the final audio tag.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '老闆娘的心聲 小編幫她說' (Decorative/Hook Text): Appears at the start, translating to 'The boss lady's inner voice, the editor speaks for her.' (2) '咖啡都幫你準備好了' (Functional Text): Translates to 'I've prepared the coffee for you.' (3) '看劇就是要吃宵夜' (Functional Text): Translates to 'Watching shows means eating late-night snacks.' (4) '吼 又要去獨旅' (Decorative Text): Translates to 'Sigh, going on a solo trip again,' expressing annoyance. (5) '用走的' (Decorative Text): Large red and black text appearing at the end, meaning 'Walk!' with an emphatic tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a fast-paced sequence of daily life vignettes (coffee, snacking, leaving home) bracketed by an outdoor walking scene.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Four participants (three females and one male) are seated in a row against a beige wall with a white bookshelf, clapping in a synchronized 4/4 rhythm to start a word game. (2) The camera cuts frequently between wide shots of the group and close-ups of individuals as they attempt to complete four-character phrases, showing varying expressions of focus, panic, and joy. (3) When someone fails, the group erupts into laughter; participants swap seats and engage in playful physical reactions, such as leaning over or covering their faces in embarrassment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The soundscape is dominated by a steady, rhythmic clapping sound and an upbeat, fast-tempo background music track. A female voice clearly states the game prompts in Mandarin. (2) Vocals are high-pitched, energetic, and loud, consisting of quick responses followed by collective shouting and laughing when a mistake is made. (3) SFX such as digital 'whoosh' sounds, comedic 'fail' buzzers, and high-frequency 'ping' sounds are layered over the dialogue to punctuate funny moments.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '四字接龍挑戰' (Four-character solitaire challenge) acts as the main title; prompts like '公司裡面有什麼' (What is in the company?) and '台北地區有什麼' (What is in the Taipei area?) guide the segments. (2) Decorative Text: Variety-show style captions like '我是想講...' (I wanted to say...) and '兩个字?' (Two characters?) emphasize the players' confusion. (3) Content & Tone: Emotional 'hooks' like '新年快樂' (Happy New Year) and '忠孝敦化' appear in bright, bold fonts to mirror the energetic and humorous tone of the dialogue.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Game Round -> Failure/Laughter -> Position Swap -> Repeat Round

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a wide shot of a woman in a striped shirt pushing a baby stroller across a pedestrian crosswalk in a Japanese urban setting. (2) The scene transitions to an indoor room with wood-paneled walls where the woman, now in a pink t-shirt and shorts, stands between two different models of black baby strollers. (3) Close-up shots focus on the stroller wheels and the 'Jeep' branding as the woman points to specific parts. (4) The woman demonstrates the folding mechanism of the red-framed stroller, using her foot to press a lever and her hands to collapse the frame. (5) The video cuts to a demonstration of the 'gb' brand stroller, showing its compact size and an adjustable backrest. (6) A short clip shows a child sleeping in the stroller outdoors. (7) The final sequence displays static, well-lit shots of each stroller individually against a white wall.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop background music with a driving rhythm plays from the start. A female voice begins narrating in Mandarin Chinese with an energetic and friendly tone. (2) As the scene moves indoors, the narration becomes more detailed and descriptive, explaining the pros and cons of the products. (3) Clicking and snapping sound effects (SFX) are layered over the audio to emphasize the movement of the stroller parts being folded or adjusted. (4) The music remains continuous and at a consistent volume, while the vocal narration maintains a high speed and professional delivery until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "推車介紹 終於來了!!!" - Enthusiastic hook introducing the stroller review. (2) "大型3D車輪 / 提高穩定性" - Functional text highlighting feature benefits. (3) "官方限重15kg / 20幾公斤坐" - Comparison of official vs. actual weight capacity. (4) "缺點：收納後較大" - Critical review text. (5) "gb POCKIT 口袋推車 / 3秒內打開" - Brand specific details and a speed-of-use hook.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Outdoor Hook -> Indoor Feature Comparison -> Practical Folding Demos -> Final Product Shots

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a grey hoodie and black pants falls face-down on the floor of an empty, modern apartment with wooden floors and minimalist cabinetry, looking completely exhausted. (2) The scene cuts to a clothing rack where she is picking out a hoodie. (3) She is seen in an office setting with three other women who are eating; she takes pieces of their food. (4) She crawls under a desk to grab bags of snacks. (5) She applies lipstick in a crowded vanity area. (6) She kneels by a drawer filled with toiletries and office supplies, stuffing them into her black bag. (7) At a water dispenser, she fills a large plastic bottle, looking around suspiciously. (8) She is seen plugging a charger into a wall outlet. (9) She enters a toilet stall, grabs a whole roll of toilet paper, and runs away. (10) In a bathroom, she meticulously folds and uses a tiny piece of toilet paper, then picks up used scraps from the sink to reuse.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a rapid montage of two women engaging in various activities: skiing in a snowy landscape, trying on baseball caps in a store, and taking a mirror selfie. They are eating traditional rice dumplings (zongzi) and other food while engaged in a conversation. The woman on the left has long black hair and a black t-shirt; the woman on the right has her hair in a bun and wears a black tank top. (3) Throughout their discussion, short clips from movies and cartoons (e.g., SpongeBob SquarePants) are inserted to emphasize their points or provide comedic relief. (4) The camera remains mostly static on the two women as they talk, with occasional close-ups or cuts between them. (5) The video ends with a black screen displaying 'To be continued'.

(2) As the main scene starts, the music volume lowers to become background music, and two female voices enter. They speak in a casual, conversational manner with occasional laughter. (3) Ambient sounds of eating, such as the clinking of wooden forks against plates, are audible. (4) Occasional sound effects (SFX) like cartoon 'boings' or emphasize sounds are used during editing transitions or to highlight specific remarks. (5) The music fades out as the video concludes with a quiet ambient sound before silence.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '03- 悠二的距離' - Decorative title for the series. (2) '至今隱瞞對方沒有說出口的事' - Question being discussed: things kept secret from each other. (5) 'To be continued' - Closing functional text.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with braided hair and a white tank top presents a large box for a Moyu branded 'Coin Pusher' building set. (2) She uses scissors to open the box and begins sorting thousands of yellow, white, and grey plastic bricks onto a wooden desk. (3) A series of montage clips shows her following an instruction manual and building the base and internal motorized mechanism. (4) She changes outfits twice (a green sweatshirt, then a striped shirt) to indicate time passing over several days. (5) In one segment, two children are seen sitting at a table behind her. (6) She completes the build, featuring a yellow arcade-style cabinet with white clouds on top. (7) She demonstrates the motorized function by dropping plastic coins into the slot and watching them being pushed.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched, energetic female vocals speak in Mandarin over upbeat, medium-tempo pop background music with a synthesized beat. (2) The sound of plastic bricks clattering on a wooden surface and paper rustling becomes more prominent. (3) The music maintains a consistent, cheerful rhythm as the female voice narrations the difficulty and progress. (4) The audio transitions to include a mechanical whirring sound of a small motor. (5) Background chatter from children is briefly audible. (6) The music ends on a bright, final note as the narrator expresses satisfaction.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "電動推幣機樂高" (Electric Coin Pusher Lego) - Hook text. (2) "2093片" (2093 pieces) - Descriptive text for difficulty level. (3) "第二天" (The second day), "第三次" (The third time), "第四天" (The fourth day) - Temporal markers showing progression. (4) "完成" (Finished) - Decorative text in red to mark success. (5) "繼續努力" (Keep working hard) - Floating emotional text overlays during the difficult phase.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Detailed Unboxing -> Multi-day Building Montage -> Final Functional Demonstration.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a wide shot of an office environment, showcasing several rows of desks cluttered with various items. The camera pans across the room to show the overall state of the workspace. (2) A series of quick cuts follow, each focusing on a different desk belonging to a specific colleague. These desks are filled with monitors, keyboards, stationery, personal decorations like Pikachu and Crayon Shin-chan plushies, and scattered boxes. (3) The camera then settles on a particularly disorganized desk. A hand enters the frame from the bottom, gesturing toward the mess. The camera zooms in slightly as the hand points at a growing stack of storage boxes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and playful electronic background music starts immediately, setting a lighthearted tone. (2) Around the 13-second mark, a female voice enters. She speaks in a humorous and slightly teasing tone. (3) The music continues at a steady volume as the female narrator finishes her observation, concluding the video on a whimsical note.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '辦公室搬家事隔半年...' (Six months after the office move...) - Hook text setting the context. (2) Functional text labels appearing over different desks: '包子', '云琪', '大丁', '禁慾', 'KIKI', '小白鼠'. (3) '大魔王 李佩潔' (The Demon King Li Peijie) - Humorous title identifying the subject of the final focus. (4) Functional subtitles for the narration: '這是李佩潔的桌子 收納盒原本只有這一個 現在有3個 我們看看再過半年 會有幾個盒子呢？' (This is Li Peijie's desk. There used to be only one storage box, now there are 3. Let's see how many boxes there will be in another half year?)

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro wide shot -> Montage of desks -> Close-up focus on a specific messy desk

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up of a woman with her hair in a bun, smiling and making funny faces. (2) Suddenly, the scene cuts to the woman dressed in a comedic 'old lady' costume, wearing a curly black wig, a floral shirt, patterned pants, and red circles painted on her cheeks, dancing energetically in a modern living room. (3) A young man with brown hair is shown looking surprised and confused by the performance. (4) The woman in costume continues to dance, jumping around and gesturing wildly while the man reacts off-camera or partially on-screen. (5) Transition to a 'behind-the-scenes' segment where the woman and man talk and laugh together, still in the living room environment. (6) The woman performs the dance again, including a segment where she lifts her shirt slightly to reveal her belly in a comedic manner. (7) Final shot returns to the woman in her normal appearance, winking at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy electronic pop music with a repetitive 'Rock your body' vocal hook plays immediately. (2) Mandarin vocals from both a male and female speaker are heard over the music, featuring laughter and conversational dialogue. (3) The female voice sounds breathless and excited, while the male voice is rhythmic and teasing. (4) Sound of heavy breathing 'Hu~' is emphasized during the dance breaks. (5) The music continues as the main backbeat through the entire video, maintaining a high tempo.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative text: '呼~~~' (representing heavy breathing) with cloud icons, tone is exhausted yet humorous. (2) Functional text: '我覺得有點...' (I feel a bit...), '再一顆好不好' (How about one more take?), '你可以先練好' (You can practice first) - documenting the dialogue between the characters. (3) Effect text: '緊張' (Nervous) appearing twice around the man's head. (4) Decorative text: '正式版' (Official version) with red borders, signaling the final performance cut. (5) Hook text: '才不理你' (I don't care about you) with a blowing kiss emoji at the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Comedic Dance Montage -> Behind-the-scenes bloopers -> Final 'Official' Dance Cut.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A piece of braised pork trotter is held up with chopsticks over a pot of dark sauce. (2) A beige pot with colorful dots is placed on a black stove; water is boiling inside. (3) Raw pork trotters are added to the boiling water for blanching. (4) The pork trotters are blanched, and then scooped out into a bowl. (5) The blanched pork trotters are rinsed under running water in a sink. (6) A person chops ginger and green onions on a black cutting board. (7) The pork trotters are placed back into the pot, and a bottle of cola is poured over them. (8) Water is added to cover the pork trotters. (9) Soy sauce, pepper, and the chopped ginger and green onions are added to the pot. (10) The pot is covered with a lid and the contents are simmered. (11) The lid is removed to reveal the cooked braised pork trotters in a bubbling dark sauce. (12) A piece of the final cooked pork trotter is held up with chopsticks.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo music starts with a clear drum beat and synth melodies. No vocals are detected. (2) Sounds of water boiling and splashing follow as meat is added to a pot. (3) Rhythmic chopping sounds of a knife on a cutting board are heard clearly. (4) The sound of a bottle being opened and liquid being poured occurs. (5) A lid is heard being placed on a pot, followed by the continuous bubbling sound of a stew. (6) The upbeat music continues throughout the entire video as the primary soundscape.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "可樂豬腳" (Cola Pork Trotter): Decorative title to hook viewers with the dish name. (2) "煮水" (Boil water): Functional instruction for the first step. (3) "下豬腳" (Add pork trotter): Functional instruction. (4) "川燙" (Blanch): Functional term for the cooking process. (5) "撈起" (Scoop out): Functional instruction. (6) "清洗" (Wash/Clean): Functional instruction. (7) "備料 蔥 薑" (Prepare ingredients: green onion, ginger): Functional instruction. (8) "一瓶可樂" (One bottle of cola): Functional label for the key ingredient. (9) "加水（醃過豬腳）" (Add water (to cover pork trotters)): Functional instructional tip. (10) "適量醬油" (Appropriate amount of soy sauce): Functional seasoning label. (11) "適量胡椒" (Appropriate amount of pepper): Functional seasoning label. (12) "蔥薑下鍋" (Add green onion and ginger to the pot): Functional instruction. (13) "煮熟即可" (Cook until done): Functional final instruction.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Prep -> Cooking -> Result

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A group of three children and one adult woman are seated on a light wood floor around a large metal mixing bowl. A boy in a red and blue striped shirt is holding a white hand mixer, blending a thick yellow batter. (2) As the boy concentrates on mixing, a small dark, spherical object suddenly falls from his face into the bowl. (3) The video cuts to a zoomed-in, slow-motion replay of the incident, showing the object (a bubble tea pearl) falling directly from the boy's mouth into the batter. (4) The camera pans and zooms onto the boy's face as he and the others realize what happened, showing him laughing sheepishly while the woman and other children react with surprise and amusement.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Whimsical, upbeat background music with a steady electronic beat begins. The mechanical whirring of a hand mixer is clearly audible over the music. (2) Multiple voices (a mix of female and child tones) are heard talking and laughing in Mandarin. (3) A distinct 'rewind' or scratching sound effect occurs during the transition to the slow-motion replay. (4) Sound effects such as a 'boing' or high-pitched pop are used to emphasize the pearl falling. (5) The music continues as the group's laughter becomes more pronounced towards the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '餅乾做到一半...' (Halfway through making cookies...) - Narrative hook. (2) '竟然!!' (Surprisingly!!) - Emotional emphasis. (3) '倒帶' (Rewind) accompanied by a rewind symbol - Functional/instructional. (4) '這是什麼？' (What is this?) - Functional inquiry. (5) '換個角度再看一次' (Watch again from another angle) - Functional/instructional. (6) '還沒咀嚼完的珍珠' (Still unchewed pearl) - Descriptive/funny reveal. (7) '好噁心' (So gross) with laughing-crying emojis - Emotional commentary.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro activity -> Unexpected event -> Detailed replay and reveal -> Group reaction.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a person's hands using a small round cutter to make holes in a raw scallion pancake dough on a plastic sheet. (2) Next, instant noodles are shown being boiled in a pan and then placed in a bowl with seasoning added. (3) The focus shifts back to the pan where oil is sprayed, and the perforated pancake dough is fried. (4) Two egg yolks are carefully placed into the top holes (eyes), sausages are added to the bottom hole (mouth), and ketchup is applied for blush/cheeks. (5) A young woman is then shown transferring the creative pancake 'face' and the noodles onto a plate. (6) The scene changes to a dining area where the woman presents the dish to a young man. They both look at the food, laugh, and proceed to eat it using chopsticks while interacting in a well-lit home environment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat background music with a steady beat begins immediately. Sound effects of tapping, water boiling, and spraying are synchronized with the visual actions. (2) A female voice enters, providing energetic commentary and narrating the steps with a playful tone. (3) As the scene transitions to the dining area, a male voice joins in, expressing surprise and amusement with sounds like 'Mmm!' and laughter. (4) The two characters engage in a lively conversation while eating, characterized by frequent laughter and high-pitched, excited tones. The background music remains consistent until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '開天眼' (Open the third eye) - Humorous tone. (2) '戳鼻孔' (Poke nostrils) - Humorous tone. (3) '挖嘴巴' (Dig out mouth) - Humorous tone. (4) '煮麵' (Boil noodles) - Informative tone. (5) '加點調味' (Add some seasoning) - Informative tone. (6) '上油' (Apply oil) - Informative tone. (7) '開煎' (Start frying) - Informative tone. (8) '記得翻面' (Remember to flip) - Instructional tone. (9) '只要蛋黃' (Only egg yolks) - Instructional tone. (10) '來個香腸嘴' (Give it a sausage mouth) - Humorous tone. (11) '不想禿頭' (Don't want to be bald) - Humorous tone, referring to the noodles as hair. (12) '小眼睛' (Small eyes) - Humorous tone. (13) '來點口紅' (Add some lipstick) - Humorous tone, referring to ketchup. (14) '盛盤上菜' (Plate and serve) - Informative tone. (15) '今天的晚餐很不錯' (Today's dinner is quite good) - Enthusiastic tone. (16) '跟你很像' (Looks just like you) - Teasing tone. (17) '我覺得蠻好吃的' (I think it's quite tasty) - Satisfied tone. (18) '蔡媽媽泡麵煎餅' (Cai's mom's instant noodle pancake) - Descriptive title. (19) '底下留言許願' (Leave a comment below to make a wish) - Engaging Call to Action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Tutorial -> Presentation -> Reaction & Tasting

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women stand behind a white table, one in a pink shirt and one in a white dress, whispering and reacting to each other while a woman in black sits behind them using a phone. (2) Sequence of close-up shots showing two WOKY tumblers, one patterned green and one solid grey, followed by a demonstration of washing the grey tumbler's interior under a faucet. (3) A woman in a black shirt demonstrates three different types of interchangeable lids (classic, straw, and flip) for the tumblers. (4) Montage of various people using the tumblers in different settings: a woman at an office desk, a man drinking while walking, and a woman holding all three versions. (5) Final shot of the two women from the start holding the tumblers and gesturing towards the viewer.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic background music starts with female voices speaking in a humorous, high-pitched tone, whispering and asking 'What did you say?'. (2) A clear male narrator's voice enters, speaking steadily and professionally to describe product features over the background music. (3) Sound effects including a water faucet running and the clicking sound of lids being snapped onto cups are heard. (4) The female voices return, speaking in a friendly and enthusiastic tone about their personal experiences using the product. (5) The video ends with a final promotional statement and the upbeat music fading out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'WOKY渾圓杯升級到第三代了' (WOKY Round Cup upgraded to 3rd gen), '不僅容量加大升級' (Not only capacity upgraded), '770ml >>> 800ml'. (2) Decorative Text: '升級一體成型圓底杯身' (Upgraded one-piece rounded bottom), '無縫無死角' (Seamless, no dead ends), '內層升級抑菌塗料' (Inner layer upgraded antibacterial coating). (3) Hook Text: '現在嘖嘖募資中' (Now crowdfunding on Zeczec), '最低只要 $999 就能帶回家' (Lowest price $999 to take home).

She poses and smiles in a modern indoor setting with white furniture.

perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '2uncle House' and '零食櫃穿搭' (Snack Closet Outfits) appear in yellow and white stylized fonts as a decorative hook. (2) Functional text appears on the packaging of snacks shown, including 'Suntory', 'Fried Potato Sticks', '脆米滋', and 'The Glenlivet'. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with pigtails wearing a blue tracksuit runs excitedly down a brightly lit white hallway holding a plate of Japanese curry. (2) The scene cuts to a well-known Japanese male actor sitting in a living room, taking a bite of curry from a spoon and looking incredibly satisfied, leaning his head back in delight. (3) The woman is shown laughing hysterically and covering her face. (4) Large stylized Japanese text appears over the man as he speaks. (5) The woman appears in a white lace dress, acting shy and holding her hands up to her face as if she is a bride. (6) The video loops back to her running with the plate.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat, and playful music starts with the sound of rapid footsteps. (2) A woman's excited giggle is heard followed by a man's deep, resonant voice saying "Umai" (Delicious). (3) A sound effect of a cheering crowd and laughter plays loudly. (4) The music transitions into a more grand, romantic orchestral swell as the man says "Kekkon shite kure" (Marry me). (5) The woman lets out a high-pitched, ecstatic squeal.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: "結婚してくれ" (Marry me) - Dramatic/Romantic tone. (2) Functional Text: "（嫁給我吧）" (Marry me) - Literal Chinese translation. (3) Decorative Text: "我準備好了" (I'm ready) - Enthusiastic tone with heart-eye emoji. (4) Hook Text: "這笑容..." (This smile...) - Admiring tone. (5) Decorative Text: "緯嘉看過嗎" (Has Weijia seen this?) - Questioning/Playful tone.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a shot of an Asian woman in white overalls and two young boys in striped shirts standing in front of a 7-Eleven store in Tokyo, gesturing excitedly. (2) The scene shifts to a first-person perspective as a hand reaches into a freezer and picks out a plastic cup filled with ice and tea concentrate. (3) The hand is seen at the checkout counter paying for the item. (4) The cup is then placed inside a 'Seven Cafe' tea-making machine. (5) A finger presses a 'Push' button on the machine's digital display. (6) A digital animation of a teapot appears on the screen while the tea brews. (7) The woman is shown again inside the store, smiling broadly and holding up the finished iced milk tea. (8) The final shots show liquid syrup being poured into the drink and a close-up of the completed beverage with a straw.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, cheerful, and mid-tempo electronic-pop background track starts immediately and remains constant throughout the video. No vocals are detected. (2) Subtle ambient sounds of a convenience store environment, such as the faint sound of a freezer door opening and mechanical whirring from the tea machine, are integrated with the music. (3) The music continues at a steady volume without interruptions until the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: '日本東京漫遊 現泡紅茶機' (Japan Tokyo Roaming, Freshly Brewed Black Tea Machine) - Exciting and informative hook. (2) Functional Text: '冰箱取冰塊杯' (Take ice cup from the fridge) - Instructional. (3) Functional Text: '先結帳' (Pay first) - Instructional. (4) Functional Text: '紅茶專用機' (Black tea dedicated machine) - Explanatory. (5) Functional Text: '放入指定位置' (Place in designated spot) - Instructional. (6) Functional Text: '按下開始' (Press start) - Instructional. (7) Functional Text: '完成' (Finished) - Celebratory. (8) Functional Text: '甜度自由調配' (Adjust sweetness freely) - Informative.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a container filled with colorful makeup brushes, quickly panning to a woman sitting at a desk with no makeup on, showing some skin blemishes. (2) A person's hand points back and forth between a large, overflowing box of makeup and a small green translucent plastic bag containing only a few items, highlighting a contrast. (3) A montage of different women in an indoor setting follows; they are seen using sponges, brushes, and palettes to apply products to their faces while looking into mirrors. (4) The woman from the beginning is shown again, now with finished makeup, intentionally squeezing her neck to emphasize a double chin for the camera. (5) Another woman is seen laughing hysterically at the gesture.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo, upbeat electronic pop music starts immediately. A female voice is heard laughing and speaking in Mandarin Chinese with an energetic, friendly tone. (2) The music continues as a constant background layer while several female voices overlap, creating a bustling, social atmosphere. Sounds of laughter and the soft clicking of makeup containers are audible. (3) The vocal intensity peaks during a conversation about the amount of makeup brought. (4) A sharp, comedic 'cartoon-style' sound effect plays at the end, coinciding with a sudden visual gag.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'HAHA化妆课' (HAHA Makeup Class) and '超級大素顏' (Super bare face) appear as opening hooks. (2) Functional text appears as dialogue subtitles: '叫妳帶一點點化妝品就好了' (Told you to bring just a little makeup), '家當都帶來了' (Brought all belongings), '因為要挑啊 我就懶得挑' (Because I have to choose, I was too lazy to). (3) '偶素小資女' (I'm a budget girl) appears as decorative hook text over the small plastic bag. (4) '(老酥好美)' (Teacher is so beautiful) appears as a variety-show style emotional sticker. (5) '修容就是這樣子' (Contouring is like this) and '譴責!!' (Condemn!!) appear in bold, expressive fonts during the humorous ending.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Humorous Comparison -> Fast-paced Makeup Process Montage -> Comedic Outro
