perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman stands in front of a large purple sign with white Japanese characters '無印良品' (MUJI), holding a shopping bag and smiling excitedly. (2) The scene transitions to her inside a MUJI store, pushing a basket and browsing shelves filled with various household and cosmetic products. (3) She begins a series of product demonstrations: first pouring a dark soda into a blue thermal bottle, then cleaning a white shoe with foam, wiping a faucet with a gray cloth, and spraying a cooling mist on a young boy in a bedroom. (4) She continues demonstrating a body scrub on her arm, applying lotion, and finally dabbing a serum on her face in a bathroom setting. (5) The final shot shows a shopping basket full of the featured products with an overlay text suggesting the viewer take notes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music with a cheerful electronic melody begins immediately and remains constant throughout the video. (2) An adult female voice provides fast-paced, enthusiastic narration in Mandarin Chinese, describing each product's benefits. (3) Specific sound effects (SFX) are layered over the music: the fizzing sound of a carbonated drink, the click of a bottle lid, the 'pfft' sound of a spray bottle, and the sound of running water. (4) A young child's voice briefly speaks, confirming the cooling effect of the spray. (5) The music reaches a crescendo and ends with the narrator's concluding remarks.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '2025 MUJI 必买好物' (Must-buy MUJI items) appears as a primary hook title. (2) Functional numbering 'NO.1' through 'NO.7' appears sequentially to categorize products, accompanied by item names and prices in Japanese Yen (e.g., 日币 2990円). (3) Comparison labels '使用前' (Before) and '使用后' (After) appear during cleaning demonstrations. (4) Descriptive hooks like '长效保冷6小时' (Long-lasting cold for 6 hours) and '评价版 Aesop' (Affordable version of Aesop) highlight product strengths. (5) Ending hook '赶快笔记起来' (Quickly take notes) serves as a call to action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Seven sequential product demonstrations -> Outro/Summary

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a split-second clip of a high-fashion runway where models in avant-garde black clothing perform a stylized, aggressive walk. It then cuts to a young man and woman in a residential hallway attempting to mimic the dramatic movements. (2) The sequence alternates rapidly between professional runway footage and the couple's hallway parody. The couple performs exaggerated lunges, hair flips, and jumps. The woman's facial expressions transition from intense concentration to laughter. (3) In the final phase, the man attempts to lift or hold the woman in a dramatic pose. He exhibits extreme facial strain and bulging eyes as he struggles with her weight, while she lets out a wide-mouthed scream of surprise or laughter. The camera moves closer to capture their distorted facial expressions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, rhythmic electronic dance track starts immediately. Footsteps on a hard floor are audible during the hallway segments. (2) Short, sharp vocal bursts—sounds of effort and brief giggles—are heard as the couple jumps and lunges. The BGM remains at a consistent high volume, driving the pace of the edits. (3) The audio finishes with a loud, high-pitched comedic scream from the woman and grunting sounds from the man as they struggle with the final pose, momentarily drowning out the background music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative/Functional Text: The phrase 'kaka baby' is printed in a small white font on the front of both the man's black t-shirt and the woman's black crop top. (2) No other on-screen subtitles or decorative text overlays are present.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Comparison/Parody: Professional Runway -> Amateur Imitation -> Comedic Failure

The video parodies the dramatic and sometimes aggressive walking styles seen on modern runways by showing the 'main characters' attempting and failing to replicate those moves in a mundane hallway environment.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Both main characters are prominently wearing matching apparel with the 'kaka baby' branding visible throughout the comedic performance.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman in a blue and white striped shirt tasting a drink and expressing delight. (2) She approaches a freezer in a brightly lit convenience store, filled with transparent bags containing pre-cut frozen fruit and vegetables. (3) The scene shifts to a chronological walkthrough of the purchasing process: selecting a bag, paying at the counter to get a cup, scanning a QR code on a specialized pink and teal smoothie machine, and placing the cup inside. (4) Close-ups show the machine blending the ingredients and the woman adding extra items like Yakult and yogurt to different flavors. (5) Throughout the video, she is seen tasting four different flavors: Green Latte, Apple Blueberry, Lemon Guava, and Berry, using various facial expressions to convey the taste (sweet, sour, refreshing). (6) The video ends with a shot of a QR code on a sign and the woman encouraging viewers to try it.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, mid-tempo pop-style BGM starts immediately and plays continuously throughout the video. (2) A cheerful female voice provides a continuous narration, explaining the steps and describing the taste of the smoothies. (3) Occasional high-pitched sound effects (pings and pops) occur during text transitions or when a specific action is completed on screen. (4) Faint ambient noise of a commercial environment (refrigerator hum, distant movement) is audible under the music and voice. (5) The narrator's tone is consistently enthusiastic and conversational.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '在台灣也能喝到水果奶昔' (You can drink fruit milkshakes in Taiwan too) - Hook, excited tone. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a brightly lit skincare store with three women in their 30s. They appear energetic and happy, examining bath bombs and products. (2) The scene shifts to a toy store where they excitedly show off blind boxes and merchandise featuring Stitch and Doraemon, smiling broadly at the camera. (3) A text-based transition appears. (4) One woman is then seen sitting down on a bench in a shoe store, looking exhausted. (5) The group is shown walking through a mall, then leaning against pillars while focused on their smartphones. (6) One woman leans heavily against a wooden wall near a restaurant with a tired expression. (7) They are shown walking with several shopping bags, appearing weary. (8) The video concludes with two of the women slumped over a dining table in a restaurant, looking sleepy and drained. (9) A final close-up shows a woman's face with a look of mock despair.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music plays as female voices chat excitedly and laugh while shopping. (2) A comical 'whoosh' or transition sound effect occurs. (3) The music changes to a slow, slightly melancholic yet humorous piano melody. (4) Female voices are heard in a more subdued tone, mentioning being tired, needing to find a toilet, wanting to take a taxi instead of walking, and feeling hungry. (5) Sound effects of ambient mall noise and restaurant clatter are audible in the background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '跟30歲以後女人出門' (Going out with women over 30) - Hook text. (2) '剛出門時' (When just starting out) - Contextual label. (3) '然後就...' (And then...) - Narrative transition. (4) '可以坐就不站' (If they can sit, they won't stand) - Humorous observation. (5) '三不五時廁所' (Going to the bathroom frequently) - Humorous observation. (6) '找機會就玩手機' (Looking for any chance to play on phones) - Humorous observation. (7) '有車就不想走路' (If there's a car, they don't want to walk) - Humorous observation. (8) '總是肚子餓' (Always hungry) - Humorous observation. (9) '吃飽了就想睡' (Wanting to sleep after eating) - Humorous observation. (10) '人生好難' (Life is so hard) - Dramatic humorous conclusion.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro (High energy shopping) -> Transition -> Series of 'tired' vignettes (Decreasing energy levels) -> Outro (Post-meal exhaustion).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a busy office environment where a group of colleagues are gathered. A person is seen applying a small white alcohol testing patch to the inner forearm of a woman in a green shirt. (2) The scene transitions through several close-ups of different individuals' arms as the patches are applied and then removed after a period of time. A woman with long dark hair, a man with glasses, and a woman in a black top are all shown reacting to their arm skin which remains normal after the patch removal. (3) The camera pans to various desks showing office clutter and computers. (4) A woman with brown hair and large headphones removes her patch and laughs as she sees no reaction. (5) Another woman in a blue sweater removes her patch with a similar negative result. (6) The video concludes with the entire office group laughing, gesturing, and clapping in a chaotic, celebratory manner.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy BGM with a playful, comedic tempo starts immediately. There is loud background chatter and multiple voices laughing. (2) A female voice clearly asks a question about turning red when drinking alcohol, followed by a 'Yes' response. (3) Sound of adhesive tape or a patch being peeled off is heard several times. (4) A series of female voices are heard saying 'No,' 'Won't,' and 'Really no' in surprised or humorous tones as they check their skin. (5) One woman's voice becomes very loud and expressive as she insists she usually gets very red. (6) A man's voice is heard briefly during the montage. (7) A final burst of collective, loud laughter and shouting from multiple people dominates the audio as the video ends, with rhythmic clapping sounds.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '實測都市傳說' (Testing Urban Legend) and '會紅，代表喝酒也會紅' (If it turns red, it means you'll turn red when drinking) appear as hook text with an experimental tone. (2) '酒精片貼手臂5分鐘' (Alcohol patch on arm for 5 minutes) provides functional context. (3) '你喝酒是臉會紅的嗎？' (Do you get a red face when you drink?) serves as the primary hook question. (4) '會' (Yes) and '沒有' (No) mark the responses during testing. (5) '臉會紅的人嗎？' (Someone whose face gets red?) continues the inquiry. (6) '好像不會' (Seems not) and '真的沒有' (Really none) record the experiment results. (7) '但我喝酒會臉紅欸，而且是超紅欸' (But I get a red face when drinking, and super red) emphasizes a participant's disbelief. (8) '都、不、會' (None of them will) uses big, bold characters for emphasis. (9) '沒有 我酒超差，酒品也很差' (No, my alcohol tolerance is poor, and so are my manners) adds self-deprecating humor. (10) '這群女人激不得' (These women can't be provoked) appears as a final humorous commentary.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a logic of setting up an experiment -> sequential execution on multiple subjects -> final collective realization and humorous outburst.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a blurred background of a Japanese drugstore with large hook text overlaid. (2) A female creator with her hair in a bun, wearing a black and white striped top, demonstrates CANMAKE blush on her cheek, followed by a close-up of three blush compacts on a shelf. (3) She holds a tube of by365 sunscreen, then a close-up shows the white cream being spread on a person's arm. (4) Close-up shots of ANESSA serum on a store shelf are followed by a demonstration of the white lotion being rubbed onto sun-reddened legs. (5) The creator applies Melano CC essence directly from the yellow tube onto her face, specifically around her mouth and cheeks. (6) She holds the Curel balm tube, smiling at the camera, then applies it to her face with both hands. (7) The final shot shows the brightly lit exterior of a 'Sugi Pharmacy' store at night.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music begins immediately and plays throughout. A male voiceover with an enthusiastic and friendly tone introduces the theme of Japanese drugstore recommendations. (2) The male voice continues, detailing the features of each product: describing the blush's price and color persistence. (3) The voiceover explains the sunscreen's texture, comparing it to ice cream. (4) The narrative shifts to explaining the use of the ANESSA serum for sunburn repair. (5) The voiceover describes the benefits of the Melano CC essence for skin repair and acne. (6) The male narrator describes the protective film formed by the Curel balm. (7) The music and voiceover conclude with a final recommendation to buy these items.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '不用 60 秒推薦你 日本藥妝 5 大推薦' (Don't need 60 seconds to recommend: 5 major Japan drugstore recommendations) - Hook text. (2) 'CANMAKE 日幣 638円', '高 CP 值!!', '顯色又持久' - Product name, price, and functional benefits. (3) 'by365 日幣 978円', '淡淡亞麻香氣', '延展性超好' - Product name, price, and descriptive texture notes. (4) 'ANESSA 日幣 2480円', '曬後使用', '全身均可塗抹' - Product name, price, and usage instructions. (5) 'Melano CC 日幣 1480円', '改善斑點暗沉', '便宜又好用' - Product name, price, and efficacy claims. (6) 'CUREL 日幣 1900円', '妝前使用', '如絲一般的保護膜' - Product name, price, and effect description. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young girl with a large purple bow in her hair sits on a grey couch, gesturing excitedly while speaking. A woman in a yellow t-shirt sits beside her, smiling and nodding. (2) The woman holds up a purple box labeled 'Kids Beta-Glucan', and the girl raises her hand eagerly. (3) Transitions to close-up shots of the product packaging and small purple tablets arranged on a white scalloped plate. (4) The woman is shown feeding one of the tablets to the girl. (5) The girl flexes her biceps and shows off a purple smartwatch, appearing energetic. (6) Both the woman and the girl appear together in the frame holding multiple boxes of the product, looking directly at the camera with happy expressions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic background music with a playful synth melody starts immediately. A young girl's high-pitched, excited voice recites a tongue twister about grapes. (2) A clear, professional female voice enters, introducing the brand 'Pharmacist's Healthy Life' and the 'Kids Beta-Glucan' product. (3) A deep-toned male narrator's voice takes over, providing technical details about the product's ingredients and concentration levels over the continuous upbeat BGM. (4) The girl's voice returns, asking 'Is it sweet?' followed by the woman's reassuring reply. (5) The male narrator returns to explain the current promotional discounts and specific coupon codes as the music reaches a crescendo with sound effects like pops and sparkles.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '吃葡萄' (Eat grapes) - Hook text with a playful tone. (2) '不吐葡萄皮' (Don't spit out grape skin) - Continuation of the tongue twister. (3) '藥師健生活 兒童葡聚醣' (Pharmacist's Healthy Life Kids Beta-Glucan) - Functional text identifying the product. (4) '幫助你調整體質' (Helping you adjust your constitution) - Functional health claim. (5) '葡萄聚醣濃度80%是市面最高' (80% Beta-Glucan concentration is the highest on the market) - Decorative hook for value proposition. (6) '最低79折' (Lowest 79% off) - High-emphasis marketing hook. (7) '專屬優惠碼 2uncle' (Exclusive discount code 2uncle) - Functional call-to-action text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Skit-based intro -> Product introduction -> Technical features overview -> Tasting demo -> Promotion and CTA

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a fast-paced montage of two young women engaging in various activities: riding a snowmobile in a snowy landscape, taking mirror selfies in a store, and posing together in athletic wear. (2) The scene transitions to a static indoor setting where the two women are seated at a wooden dining table. (3) The woman on the left, wearing a black t-shirt, is shown eating a Zongzi (sticky rice dumpling) while talking. (4) The woman on the right, with her hair in a high bun and wearing a black tank top, is seen eating a bowl of noodles and responding. (5) They engage in animated conversation, using hand gestures and various facial expressions to express thought and emotion. (6) There are occasional close-up shots of each woman and a brief cutaway to a SpongeBob SquarePants meme character. (7) The video ends on a shot of the woman in the tank top eating, followed by a text-based outro screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Energetic, upbeat electronic music plays during the opening montage along with sounds of a snowmobile engine. (2) As the women begin talking at the table, the music transitions to a light, mid-tempo rhythmic background track. (3) Two female voices are heard throughout, speaking in a casual and conversational tone in Mandarin. (4) The sound of chopsticks clicking and ambient room tone is present. (5) Specific sound effects (SFX) such as a 'ding' or a cartoonish slide whistle are used to mark topic transitions or emphasize certain points. (6) The vocals are clear and high in density, dominating the audio track.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '二的距離' - Decorative title meaning 'Distance of Two'. (2) '討厭對方的一件事or行為' - Functional question header about hating a behavior. (3) '我好像很少認真討厭人這件事' - Functional subtitles translating the speaker's thoughts. (4) '成立公司到至今是否中途想放棄結束？' - Functional question header about giving up on their company. (5) '比如上個月賠了5-600萬' - Highlight text regarding a financial loss. (6) 'To be continued...' - Decorative outro text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Montage -> Casual Q&A while eating -> Cliffhanger Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a vertical montage using a three-way horizontal split-screen format. (2) The second phase transitions to shots of children squatting to look at plants, a man standing by a vending machine, and kids relaxing on a sofa in a modern hotel lobby or living room. (3) The final phase shows the family walking outside with umbrellas, a man feeding a child, and children looking at gashapon machines and a traditional red temple entrance.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A continuous acoustic guitar melody with a medium tempo begins, accompanied by low-frequency road noise and wind from the car footage. (2) The music remains dominant, but soft Mandarin Chinese vocalizations from children and a male adult become audible, suggesting casual conversation. (3) Sound effects of a camera shutter click occur twice in the latter half of the video, synchronized with visual transitions or flash effects, ending with the music fading out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative/Hook Text: A persistent date stamp reading "2025.9.6 - 2025.9.7" appears in the center of the frame, serving as a temporal anchor for the vlog. (2) Functional Text: On-screen signage displays "雪霸國家公園管理處 SHEI-PA NATIONAL PARK HEADQUARTERS" in a formal, informative tone. (3) Decorative/Effect Text: Small stylized captions appear briefly at the bottom but are mostly obscured by the montage layout.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman is sitting in a red Ferris wheel carriage, smiling and pointing towards the Sydney Opera House and Harbour Bridge in the background; the scene cuts to the bridge. (2) The woman stands by a stone wall at 'Felt Step', gesturing with both hands towards the Opera House across the water. (3) She is on a yellow ferry, wearing a white shirt and black sleeves, pointing to the Opera House again. (4) In a Lego store, she stands before a large Lego mosaic of the Opera House, gesturing towards it. (5) She stands in the plaza directly beneath the Opera House, pointing up at its structure. (6) At night, she is on a boat with a young boy; she talks to the camera, gestures towards the city lights, and smiles. (7) A final montage shows the Opera House and Harbour Bridge illuminated at night from the water.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo pop music with a steady electronic beat begins. A woman's voice provides short, energetic phrases in Mandarin, coinciding with the location changes. (2) The music continues at a lower volume as the woman speaks in a conversational, friendly tone, explaining the benefits of the 'sunset ferry' while ambient wind and water splashing sounds are audible. (3) The upbeat music returns to the foreground during the final montage of nighttime scenery, ending with a final rhythmic beat.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '雪梨歌劇院' (Sydney Opera House) appears as a main title throughout the first half. (2) Functional location labels appear: '月神公園摩天輪' (Luna Park Ferris Wheel), 'Felt step', '渡輪' (Ferry), '樂高玩具店' (Lego Store), and '底下看' (Look from below). (3) Subtitles explain the travel tip: '這個時間點就是叫做黃昏的船班' (This time slot is the sunset ferry), '出發的時候是看夕陽的景' (See the sunset when departing), '回程的時候就是看夜景' (See the night view on the return). (4) Emotional hook text: '超棒' (Awesome/Excellent).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a modern living room. A man in a brown sweater reaches for a bag of snacks on a light wood table, while a woman in a pink hoodie sitting on a white sofa watches him with a look of disapproval. (2) They engage in an animated conversation with exaggerated facial expressions. The man looks defensive, while the woman points and gestures to emphasize her point about hygiene. (3) The woman shows a white pump bottle (HygieneCare). Close-ups show her dispensing white foam into her hands and rubbing them together. (4) The scene shifts to a laundry room where a person pours a milky liquid from a large white bottle into the detergent drawer of a Whirlpool washing machine. (5) A split-screen comparison shows 'Before' (moldy bathroom silicone) and 'After' (clean silicone) transitions. (6) Another split-screen shows 'Before' (water-stained faucet) and 'After' (shiny faucet) transitions. (7) Finally, the couple returns to the sofa, holding the products and pointing toward the bottom of the screen with happy, smiling faces.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music begins. A male voice speaks defensively in Mandarin, followed by a female voice with a slightly nagging, concerned tone. (2) As the conversation intensifies, the BGM maintains a consistent bouncy rhythm. (3) The female voice transitions into an informative voiceover (narration) style as the visual shows product use. (4) Subtle sound effects like 'pop' or 'ding' are heard when text overlays appear. (5) The male voice returns, sounding impressed and enthusiastic ('Bie-bai-ne!'). (6) The video concludes with both voices speaking energetically together to deliver the final call to action.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '不洗手喔!' (Not washing hands!) - Decorative text showing the woman's concern. (2) '家裡沒細菌就不髒嗎?' (Isn't it dirty if there are no germs at home?) - Functional text summarizing the debate. (3) '腸病毒 / 諾羅病毒 / 超級細菌' (Enterovirus / Norovirus / Superbug) - Alarming decorative text highlighting health risks. (4) '黃金盾 泡沫式乾洗手' (HygieneCare Foam Hand Sanitizer) - Functional product title. (5) '8小時長效護膜' (8-hour long-lasting protective film) - Key feature text. (6) 'Before / After' - Comparison labels in the bathroom scenes. (7) '團購優惠中' (Group buy discount in progress) - Call-to-action text.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Specific brand-related terminology like 'Pomato' and a focus on 'happiness' through colorful patterns.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses a behind-the-scenes interview style to build a personal connection between the creators and the audience.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a blue shirt stands in front of a street food stall with a yellow sign featuring durian illustrations, gesturing excitedly. (2) Close-up shots of the menu and the cooking process, showing hands in purple gloves kneading dough, spreading cheese, and adding large scoops of yellow durian paste. (3) The woman holds a golden-brown, round pancake and breaks it apart to show the stretchy cheese inside, then takes a bite with a satisfied expression. (4) Footage shows a queue of people at the stall and the woman carrying a take-out bag. (5) The scene shifts to an office setting where the woman shares the pancake with a colleague who reacts with surprise and delight after tasting it.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic electronic background music starts. A high-pitched, excited female voice speaks in Mandarin, introducing the food. (2) Sharp sound effects like 'dings' and 'pops' coincide with text appearances. (3) Rhythmic chopping sounds are heard as the pancake is sliced on a metal surface. (4) The narrator continues her enthusiastic review with a medium vocal ratio against the music. (5) Audible gasps and 'Oh!' exclamations from a second female voice as she tastes the food in a quieter indoor environment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '我一定買一份回去給羅禁慾吃' (I'll definitely buy one back for Luo Jinyu to eat) - Hook text. (2) '[強烈推薦] 但加倍' (Strongly Recommended, but double) - Decorative/Hook text. (3) '榴槤加倍' (Double durian) - Functional content. (4) '我們在這邊等有四組客人...' (We are waiting here with four groups of customers...) - Functional subtitle. (5) '很香很好吃' (Very fragrant and delicious) - Content emphasis. (6) '生意很好' (Business is very good) - Narrative text. (7) '可以' (Can/Yes) - Decorative text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Ordering/Making -> Tasting -> Context (Crowd) -> Second Tasting (Office)

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 female colleague, 2 staff members behind the counter, and roughly 4 people in the background queue.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with shoulder-length brown hair, wearing a white crop top, an unbuttoned blue short-sleeved shirt, and matching blue shorts.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A vibrant night market street with a yellow food stall named '浪榴槤' and various retail shops. Later, a typical office desk cluttered with supplies and snacks.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Mixed: Bright street lighting and standard office fluorescent lights.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Process -> Review -> Validation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote a specific street food vendor ('浪榴槤') by showcasing the generous use of real durian and cheese, providing a personal taste test, and validating the quality through a colleague's reaction.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showing of the preparation process, multiple positive taste reactions, and prominent display of the stall's branding and location.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Energetic female hosting, high-density colorful text overlays, and 'office share' verification trope.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a standard 'hidden gem' street food discovery format common in short-form social media content.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a girl in a grey sweater and white pants standing in front of a white building labeled 'haha baby HAMU CAFE'. She throws a white paper airplane toward the building. (2) The camera transitions to a POV shot following the airplane's flight path inside the building. It passes through multiple rooms filled with merchandise including snacks, boxes of drinks, patterned pillows, and colorful helmets on wooden shelves. (3) The flight path continues up a set of concrete stairs and through a second-floor area filled with racks of vibrant, multi-colored clothing, display shelves with handbags, and rows of white and patterned shoes. (4) The scene shifts back to the girl in the upstairs clothing area as she catches the paper airplane. She unfolds it to reveal a handwritten sign. (5) She holds the sign close to the camera and then performs a short, high-energy dance routine among the clothing racks.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic pop music starts immediately and continues throughout the video. There are no spoken vocals. (2) Accompanying the rapid camera movement (POV of the plane), subtle wind-like whooshing sound effects (SFX) are layered over the music. (3) The music maintains a consistent, high-energy tempo until the video concludes, with the ambient noise of the store being completely filtered out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '(一定要看到最後)' (Must watch until the end) - Decorative/Hook text appearing at the top right throughout the first half. (2) '惜福祭 等你來喔' (Blessing Festival, waiting for you to come) - Functional text revealed on the unfolded paper sign at the end, intended to invite viewers to an event.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro (Airplane throw) -> Fast-paced POV tour of products -> Reveal and celebration dance.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator appearing at the beginning and end.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman wearing a grey and black striped sweater over a grey shirt, white baggy sweatpants, and pink chunky sneakers.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern white building exterior transitioning to a well-organized retail interior with wooden shelving, concrete stairs, and checkered blue/white tile floors.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright, even indoor lighting and natural overcast daylight.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Montage (Tour) -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the 'Blessing Festival' (惜福祭) event for the brand 'haha baby'. The video uses a creative paper airplane POV to showcase the wide range of products available at the Hamu Cafe/Store, building excitement before revealing the event details through the main creator's energetic presence.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is centered entirely on the brand's store and a specific upcoming event, ending with a call to action on a sign.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced retail tour POV, energetic dancing.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses the 'follow-the-object' editing technique to maintain high viewer engagement while displaying inventory.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) This is a live-action video. A man in a yellow plaid jacket and green beanie holds a hot dog with red toppings toward the camera with an excited expression. (2) Cut to another man in a black jacket tasting the hot dog and expressing delight. (3) A young woman in a beige sweater and white skirt walks toward a yellow octagonal kiosk labeled 'Raketten Bar & Pølse'. (4) Close-ups inside the kiosk show a vendor in a black shirt preparing hot dogs and adding various toppings like onions and red cabbage from stainless steel containers. (5) Two hot dogs are held up side-by-side against the background of the kiosk. (6) The woman drinks from a paper cup while sitting on a wooden bench. (7) Close-up of a cup containing red liquid and almonds, followed by a wide shot of the couple sitting together outside the kiosk enjoying their meal.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic pop music begins. A male voice exclaims 'Wa~' and 'Aiyo' with high-pitched excitement. (2) Music continues at a consistent volume as a female voice with a Nordic accent asks in English, 'Which toppings do you like?' and 'The same?', followed by 'Ok! Perfect'. (3) The male narrator's voice returns, speaking in Mandarin with a friendly, casual tone over the steady background music. Subtle outdoor ambient noise of a public square is audible in the background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative text appears: '哇～～～' and '哎唷，好香！' (Aiyo, so fragrant!). (2) Title text: 'Raketten Bar & Pølse (全世界最小巧可愛的熱狗堡攤)' (The world's smallest and cutest hot dog stand). (3) Functional subtitles: 'Which toppings do you like?', 'The same?', 'Ok! Perfect'. (4) Hook text: '大種配料可以選' (Many kinds of toppings to choose). (5) Descriptive labels: '豬肉+牛肉' (Pork + Beef) and '鹿肉+牛肉' (Reindeer + Beef). (6) Decorative label: '杏仁熱紅酒' (Almond Mulled Wine) with wine glass emojis.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro reaction -> Location reveal -> Preparation process -> Food comparison -> Final tasting and atmosphere.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator, 1 female partner, 1 male friend tasting, 1 female vendor.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main male creator wears a yellow and black plaid jacket, a green HH beanie, and grey trousers. The main female character wears a beige turtleneck sweater and a white skirt with her hair in braids.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A historical wooden octagonal kiosk painted yellow with a red dome, a wooden deck with benches, and a small outdoor fire pit. Traditional European buildings and trees with autumn leaves are visible in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Location Intro -> Detail Demo -> Experience Wrap-up
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a travel and culinary guide, specifically reviewing a famous hot dog kiosk in Tromsø, Norway. It uses high-energy visual reactions and detailed process shots to recommend the unique meat options (reindeer) and the cozy outdoor atmosphere of the location.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video provides detailed information about the shop name, menu items, and pricing while showing high satisfaction during consumption.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-pitched 'wa' opening, variety-show style text stickers, first-person food presentation.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes high-saturation editing and fast cuts to maintain viewer engagement, typical of lifestyle travel content on platforms like Instagram Reels or TikTok.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long dark hair, wearing a pink outfit, is in a clothing store/studio environment. She looks at a black shirt held by a clerk and smiles politely while declining. (2) Transition to a different scene where the woman is pointing her finger as if scolding someone off-camera, while two other women are seen in the background looking at a phone. (3) Scene shifts to her lying in bed in a bedroom, looking annoyed and eventually sitting up in a huff. (4) She walks to a wooden door in a hallway, rings the bell, and knocks aggressively. A man in a green t-shirt opens the door. They engage in a heated conversation with exaggerated gestures. (5) The woman presents a large blue exercise mat. Close-up shots follow, showing her feet jumping on the mat, her hands feeling the texture, and a finger pressing into the foam to show its density. (6) The woman and the man are back in a bright studio room, demonstrating the mat together. They are laughing and talking to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced background music starts immediately. A woman's voice is heard speaking politely in Mandarin, followed by a lighter tone. (2) The tone of the vocals becomes sharp and authoritative as if disciplining. (3) Rhythmic thumping and banging sound effects occur, followed by the sound of a doorbell and loud knocking. (4) High-energy dialogue between a male and female voice, sounding like a comedic argument. (5) The music shifts to a more clear, promotional style with a male narrator's voice-over describing product features over the ambient noise of jumping on the mat. (6) The video ends with loud laughter, overlapping dialogue between the man and woman, and a final upbeat musical flourish.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 身為一位知名網路創作者... (As a famous internet creator...) - Informative tone. (2) 如果我逛街不消費 (If I go shopping and don't buy) - Hook text. (3) 如果我在路邊教育小孩 (If I educate kids on the street) - Hook text. (4) 如果我的鄰居很吵鬧 (If my neighbor is noisy) - Hook text. (5) Lotus Fitness - Brand name. (6) 二代慢跑墊 (2nd Generation Jogging Mat) - Functional product info. (7) 專為超慢跑設計 (Specifically designed for slow jogging) - Promotional hook. (8) 台灣製造 (Made in Taiwan) - Quality assurance text. (9) 團購優惠中 (Group buy discount in progress) - Call to action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Problem skits -> Conflict with neighbor -> Product solution demonstration -> Outro and CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 main male supporting actor, 1 store clerk, 2 background females in the second skit.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main female is wearing a pink pajama-style outfit with a white t-shirt underneath; later seen in a beige workout top and brown leggings. The male has dark curly hair and wears a green 'Hahahbaby' branded t-shirt and shorts.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern clothing studio with racks, a bedroom with a simple bed and wooden door, and a bright white room filled with character toys and a Vegeta statue in a glass display case.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cut between skits with music swells

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage -> Linear: Hook -> Conflict -> Solution -> Call to Action.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video is a commercial endorsement for the Lotus Fitness 2nd Generation Jogging Mat. It uses a comedy skit format featuring a well-known influencer to demonstrate how the product solves the problem of noise complaints from neighbors during home exercise.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product demonstration, verbal praise of features, brand logo overlays, and a call to action for a group buy.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Taiwanese influencer style, use of popular character toys in background, 'Hahahbaby' brand clothing.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the celebrity of Kimy (Er-Bo) and the associated brand 'Hahahbaby' to build trust and engagement for the endorsed fitness mat.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a hand pointing at a red 'Michelin 2025' sticker on a glass door. (2) A woman wearing a black bucket hat and black jacket points at a restaurant sign that says 'Moon'. (3) The camera shows a series of fast cuts featuring a cheese platter, a meat dish with beet garnish, and a dessert in a dark bowl. (4) A hand flips through a menu showing '3 Course', '4 Course', and '5 Course' options. (5) White wine is poured into glasses in a bucket of water/ice, followed by the woman and a man clinking glasses and sipping. (6) A waitress and a chef are shown plating and serving food with specialized tools. (7) The woman is shown eating several dishes, smiling and nodding with approval. (8) The final scene shows the woman walking down a cobblestone street at night, laughing and looking back at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, mid-tempo electronic pop track with a steady beat begins. A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice provides continuous narration. (2) The sound of liquid pouring and glass clinking is heard clearly over the music. (3) Soft ambient restaurant chatter and the metallic clinking of cutlery on plates are audible. (4) The narrator's tone remains cheerful and energetic. (5) The music continues as the soundscape shifts to outdoor ambient noise with the woman's laughter as the video concludes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'Michelin 2025' and '2024' labels are functional text identifying the restaurant's status. (2) '逛街發現 卑爾根' is decorative text indicating the discovery in Bergen. (3) '5家米其林推薦指南' is informative text about the guide. (4) '連續四年米其林推薦' emphasizes the restaurant's reputation. (5) '3 4 5 或是 6 道菜的組合' provides functional menu information. (6) '酒的部分... 或是請侍酒師搭配' provides functional dining advice. (7) '廚師選用卑爾根當地的食材... 料理法式餐點' describes the food's origin and style. (8) '(好好吃)' and '(好滿意)' are emotional captions reflecting the taster's reaction. (9) '天都黑了' and '吃超久' are descriptive captions about the duration. (10) '(猜猜看吃了幾道菜?!)' is a hook text to engage the audience.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Michelin sign) -> Restaurant Intro -> Menu & Wine -> Food Montage -> Satisfaction & Exit.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 male dining partner, 1 female server, 1 male chef.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An Asian woman with braided hair, wearing a black bucket hat, black jacket, and later a light-colored scarf while outside.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern restaurant with wooden walls, plants, and glass display cases; a cobblestone European street at night with traditional buildings and street lamps.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Warm indoor restaurant lighting and dim night street lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Experience -> Review -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a travel and culinary recommendation, showcasing a high-end dining experience at the 'Moon' restaurant in Bergen, Norway. It highlights the Michelin accreditation to establish quality and then walks the viewer through the menu, wine pairing, and the aesthetic presentation of the dishes to encourage a visit.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed display of the restaurant name, Michelin awards, and positive review of the food quality.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of variety-show style text bubbles and a signature energetic narration style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses fast-paced editing synchronized with the beat of the music to maintain high viewer engagement during the food showcase.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins outdoors on a city sidewalk where three young women are standing. One is holding a large cardboard box labeled 'haha baby,' and another holds a white tote bag with the same branding. They are talking and gesturing. (2) The scene shifts to the entrance of the Boyo Social Welfare Foundation in Keelung. The women enter and are seen inside a classroom-style office. They interact with a male staff member who is holding a small child and a female staff member. (3) The women open the boxes and show the contents, which include various items of clothing and winter accessories like socks. The camera shows close-ups of children's drawings on the wall and maps of serviced areas. (4) Transition to the second location, the Taipei Christian Encouragement Center. The women are walking through a hallway carrying boxes. (5) Inside the second center, they show more donated items such as colorful socks and gloves. They also highlight small products like coffee drip bags featuring children's illustrations. (6) The video concludes with the women receiving a certificate of appreciation and taking a group photo with the staff.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with upbeat, fast-paced acoustic music and energetic female voices talking excitedly outdoors with background traffic noise. (2) As the setting moves indoors, the music continues but the volume of the dialogue increases. Multiple female voices are heard explaining their purpose for the visit. (3) A male voice and the sound of a child's babbling are heard at the first foundation. (4) The audio transitions to the second location with a continuation of the upbeat background music. Sounds of cardboard boxes being opened and tape being pulled are audible. (5) In the final phase, the dialogue focuses on explaining the significance of the children's artwork on the products, with a warm and appreciative tone throughout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '今天要去哪' (Where are we going today?) - Functional introductory text. (2) '臺灣製' (Made in Taiwan) - Functional text emphasizing product origin. (3) '提供給基金會 分送給大家' (Providing to the foundation to distribute to everyone) - Functional text explaining the goal. (4) '基隆 · 博幼社會福利基金會' (Keelung · Boyo Social Welfare Foundation) - Location marker. (5) '致力於幫助偏鄉、低收、資源不足家庭' (Dedicated to helping remote areas, low-income, and under-resourced families) - Functional descriptive text. (6) '自立成長' (Self-reliant growth) - Large decorative hook text. (7) '台北 · 基督教勵友中心' (Taipei · Christian Encouragement Center) - Location marker. (8) '與咖啡結合' (Combined with coffee) - Functional text describing the product. (9) '作品商品化' (Productizing works) - Functional text explaining the initiative. (10) '感謝狀' (Certificate of Appreciation) - Functional text showing the document received.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Visit Foundation 1 -> Visit Center 2 -> Conclusion/Appreciation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 3 main female creators, 1 male staff member, 4 female staff members across two locations, and 1 child.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Three young women; one in a pink hoodie and shorts, one in a grey hoodie and black skirt, and one in a white and pink color-blocked sweatshirt and cargo pants.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves from a tree-lined city sidewalk to the interior of two different social welfare centers which feature desks, bookshelves, posters of children's drawings, and educational materials.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural daylight outdoors, standard fluorescent office lighting indoors.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Action (Donation 1) -> Action (Donation 2) -> Resolution (Appreciation)
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional vlog documenting a charitable donation effort by the brand 'haha baby'. It aims to showcase the brand's social responsibility by visiting two welfare organizations, donating goods (clothing and accessories), and highlighting the meaningful work these foundations do for underprivileged children.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creators are prominently carrying and showing products/packaging with the 'haha baby' brand logo throughout the charity visit.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High energy group interactions and direct address to the camera.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively blends influencer-style lifestyle content with corporate social responsibility (CSR) messaging, making the brand appear relatable and community-oriented.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a woman in a pink t-shirt and blue cap pushing a child in a stroller through a covered pedestrian walkway. (2) The scene transitions to the woman in a black-and-white striped shirt pushing the stroller in a city street and then in a mall hallway. (3) A role reversal occurs: the young boy, wearing a black cap and striped shirt, begins pushing the woman who is now sitting in the stroller. She looks surprised and starts laughing. (4) A montage follows showing the boy pushing the woman in various urban settings, including past a 7-Eleven. (5) In one shot, the woman is wearing a brown dress, taking a selfie with her phone while being pushed. (6) The final scenes show them on a sidewalk, with the woman holding a drink and giving a thumbs-up while the boy continues to push her with great effort.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, whimsical, and fast-paced electronic background music begins immediately. A woman's high-pitched, energetic voice provides narration in Mandarin. (2) The sound of the woman's laughter and occasional exclamations from the boy are heard over the music. The rolling sound of stroller wheels on hard pavement is periodically audible. (3) The vocal density remains high as the woman continues to speak excitedly about the experience. (4) Subtle ambient city noises like distant traffic and muffled background chatter can be heard during pauses in the narration. The music stays consistent in tempo until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '推了7年的推車...' (Pushing the stroller for 7 years...). Tone: Nostalgic. (2) Decorative Text: '兒子竟然說要推我' (My son actually said he wants to push me). Tone: Surprised and amused. (3) Hook Text: '一人推一個位' (One person pushes one seat). Tone: Humorous. (4) Decorative Text: '調皮的波波' (Mischievous Bobo). Tone: Affectionate. (5) Functional Text: '這是什麼好康的服務' (What kind of good service is this?). Tone: Playful. (6) Decorative Text: '波爺衝刺' (Master Bo sprints). Tone: Energetic. (7) Functional Text: '推去撞牆' (Push towards the wall). Tone: Alarmed but joking. (8) Decorative Text: '孝子！長大了！' (Filial son! Grown up!). Tone: Proud.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro (Mom pushing) -> Transition (Son taking over) -> Montage (Son pushing Mom in various locations)

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main woman creator, 1 son, and approximately 6 passers-by visible in the background across different scenes.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The woman wears various outfits: a pink lounge set, a black-and-white striped t-shirt with white overalls, and a brown midi dress. The boy wears a blue t-shirt then a black-and-white striped t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Modern urban environments with Japanese signage, including a shopping mall interior, a red-carpeted indoor area, and city sidewalks near a 7-Eleven and ACCEA store.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural daylight and bright indoor studio-style lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Narrative Shift -> Evidence -> Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a lifestyle and family vlog intended to entertain through a humorous role reversal. It documents a moment during a trip where a son takes over pushing his own stroller while his mother sits in it. The objective is to showcase the son's growth and the playful, close relationship between parent and child while traveling in Japan.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: No specific product is promoted as a primary focus; brands in the background are incidental to the travel location.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-speed Mandarin narration with variety-show style text graphics and role-reversal humor.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The contrast between the child's small size and the effort to push an adult in a stroller creates high engagement and a 'cute' factor for social media.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Indoor office setting; a woman sits at a desk with a laptop, looking exhausted. Another woman approaches from behind and speaks to her; the seated woman looks annoyed and slams her laptop shut. (2) Scene transitions to a bedroom; the first woman is packing a blue suitcase on the floor. The second woman stands over her nagging; the first woman gets frustrated, slams the suitcase shut, and jumps on it. (3) Scene transitions to a white cabinet; the first woman is getting sneakers. The second woman leans against the cabinet nagging; the first woman slams the cabinet door and walks away angrily. (4) Scene transitions to a kitchen; the first woman is leaning on a counter drinking from a large pink cup. The second woman approaches, and they look at a smartphone screen showing the Shopee app. (5) The first woman holds up the pink cup to the camera, smiling. A montage follows showing various colors and styles of WOKY cups and a frying pan. (6) The woman demonstrates washing the cup and carrying it by a handle. (7) She stands behind a table filled with various WOKY products, holding up a sheet listing various discount tiers and rewards. (8) Final scene shows both women together, looking at the phone while surrounded by cups.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music starts immediately. A female voice is heard speaking in a nagging tone, followed by a loud 'thud' sound effect as a laptop closes. (2) The same music continues. The nagging female voice returns, followed by a 'boing' sound effect as someone jumps. (3) Music continues. Nagging continues, ending with a sharp 'bang' sound effect of a door closing. (4) Music continues. The tone shifts as a second female voice speaks in a friendly, conversational way. (5) A fast-paced, professional male voice-over enters, narrating the product features and the 'WOKY Super Brand Day' promotion details on Shopee. (6) The male narrator lists specific discount codes and prices over the continuous upbeat track. (7) Brief dialogue between the two women at the end as the music fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: 'POV: 越念越不想做' (The more you nag, the less I want to do it) appears at the top. Functional: Dialogue subtitles. Decorative: '(不想弄了)' (Don't want to do it anymore). (2) Decorative: '(整理心情都沒了)' (Mood to organize is gone). (3) Decorative: '(來去運動)' (Going to exercise), '(老娘不運動了)' (I'm not exercising anymore). (4) Decorative: '(?吃錯藥?)' (Took the wrong medicine?), '(打開蝦皮)' (Opening Shopee). (5) Functional: 'WOKY超級品牌日' (WOKY Super Brand Day), '純鈦渾圓杯' (Pure Titanium Round Cup), '雙飲杯' (Dual Drink Cup). (6) Functional: '$1399', '史上最低價' (Lowest price ever). (7) Functional: A full list of discount coupons and terms (e.g., '滿599享10%'). Decorative: '✨贈品超豐富✨' (Gifts are super rich), '在搶了啦!!' (Already buying!!).

(4) The music and narration continue until the end, with the music fading out slightly during the final scene at the bank.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a group of people in an indoor setting. A woman in a pink dress explains the rules of a game while others sit on chairs placed on rows of newspapers. (2) Round 1 begins; participants use their feet to shuffle their chairs forward along the newspaper tracks. A woman in pink reaches the end first and celebrates excitedly. (3) Highlights and interactions between the participants follow, showing laughter and teasing. (4) Round 2 features a different set of players, including a woman in a grey shirt who wins her heat. (5) A 'Director's Demonstration' or special round occurs with more participants joining in. (6) Round 3 and a special 'PK' match take place, focusing on players who struggled to move. (7) The video concludes with a celebration of a male participant's success and a close-up of a participant's foot showing a hole in their sock from the intense movement.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and energetic BGM plays throughout. A female voice enthusiastically explains the game rules. (2) Shouts of 'Ready, Go!' and 'Start!' are heard, followed by the loud crinkling sound of newspapers being shredded by feet and chairs. (3) High-pitched cheering, laughter, and variety-show style commentary from multiple people fill the soundscape. (4) Frequent sound effects (SFX) like whistles, bells for winners, and comedic 'fail' sounds are interspersed with the dialogue. (5) The BGM remains consistent in tempo, maintaining a lively atmosphere. (6) The final segments feature more conversational talking, laughter, and a celebratory ending track.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '遊戲規則' (Game Rules) - Informative and energetic. (2) 'Round 1 預備... 開始' (Round 1 Ready... Start) - Functional. (3) '精彩回放' (Highlights) - Decorative/Hook. (4) '中看不中用' (Looks good but useless) - Humorous caption targeting a participant. (5) '下一組' (Next group) - Functional. (6) '總監親自示範' (Director demonstrates personally) - Informative hook. (7) '賽外賽 滑不動PK大賽' (Side match: Can't Slide PK) - Decorative hook. (8) '雪恥成功' (Successfully redeemed) - Emotional/Celebratory. (9) '可以追到Kiki了' (Can catch Kiki now) - Humorous inside joke. (10) '我真的很用力' (I really used a lot of strength) - Emotional emphasis.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Game Rounds -> Highlights/Replays -> Special PK -> Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with two women standing together; one is wearing a white sweatshirt and a plaid skirt, and the other is in a green hoodie. (2) The scene transitions to an office setting where the woman in white presents a laptop screen to the woman in green, who is seated at a desk. They engage in an animated discussion with visible hand gestures and intense facial expressions. (3) The woman in white suddenly strikes the woman in green on the cheek, accompanied by a visual lightning effect. (4) The woman in white then dances joyfully while the woman in green holds her face in shock. (5) The woman in green speaks while pointing to herself, and the screen transitions to black and white, capturing her expression of disbelief and distress.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-tempo electronic background music starts. (2) Two female voices are heard in a rapid-fire dialogue in Mandarin, sounding like a heated work-related argument or negotiation. (3) A loud, exaggerated slapping sound effect (SFX) triggers, followed by a thunderous boom. (4) The music shifts to a celebratory, high-pitched tune as one woman laughs and shouts joyfully. (5) The celebratory music cuts out, replaced by a single female voice speaking in a serious, questioning tone. A somber, dramatic piano and violin melody plays as the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "職場禮儀" (Workplace Etiquette) and "教戰手冊" (Strategy Manual) - Hook text setting the theme. (2) "今天優惠這樣可不可以" (Is this discount okay today?) - Functional subtitle for dialogue. (3) "怎麼可能可以" (How could that be okay?) - Functional subtitle for dialogue. (4) "國際賞同事巴掌日" (International Slap Your Coworker Day) - Decorative text explaining the comedic context. (5) "開心" (Happy) - Multiple emotional stickers appearing on screen. (6) "我是你老闆欸" (I am your boss) - Functional subtitle for the twist ending.

perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music starts immediately. A high-pitched, excited female voice speaks in Mandarin. (2) Periodic camera shutter sound effects and 'ding' SFX are heard as text and scene transitions occur. (3) During the indoor scenes, the music continues at a lower volume as the female narrator explains the clinic's features, with some background conversation from the consultant. (4) The audio maintains a high-energy, vlog-style pace with continuous music until the end. (5) Final segment includes overlapping laughter and chatter from a group of women.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '當闆娘帶頭變臉？' (Hook: Does the boss lead the face-change? Energetic). (2) '今天我們要來打醫美' (Subtitle: Today we are going for medical beauty). (3) '因為昨天去夜店' (Hook: Because we went to a nightclub yesterday. Humorous). (4) 'Dr.Evers 弘大門市' (Functional: Location info). (5) '價格透明! 與韓國同步' (Effect: Transparent pricing! Sync with Korea. Informative). (6) '超方便!' (Hook: Super convenient!). (7) '下次再一起來' (Subtitle: Come together next time. Warm).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Context Setting -> Location Discovery -> Consultation & Service Walkthrough -> Results & Tax Refund CTA.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Outdoor urban street with modern buildings in Seoul; interior of a bright, clean medical clinic with minimalist white walls, consulting rooms, and tax refund machines.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Location Intro -> Feature Demo (Service/Tax) -> Result/Social Proof
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional vlog intended to endorse 'Dr. Evers Clinic' in Hongdae, Seoul. It highlights key selling points for Chinese-speaking tourists, such as easy location, transparent pricing, Chinese language support, and on-site tax refunds, using a 'girls' trip' narrative to make the service feel accessible and fun.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator specifically names the clinic, shows the location, walks through the consultation process, and highlights specific customer benefits like the tax refund.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy Mandarin narration, frequent use of variety-show style colorful text overlays, and a focus on 'group lifestyle' content.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets young female travelers interested in 'K-beauty' tourism, emphasizing convenience and cost-effectiveness through tax refunds.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with two young boys in matching black and white striped t-shirts and a woman outdoors on a city sidewalk near a crosswalk. One boy pushes a Jeep-branded stroller. (2) The scene shifts to a fast-paced montage of the two boys at various arcade locations. They are seen playing a Pokemon-themed card game, a Dragonball Super Divers interactive game, and an alligator-hitting mallet game. (3) The montage continues with them looking at a Kirby-themed capsule machine, playing a fishing game with a small blue net, peering into claw machines, and interacting with an Anpanman-themed kiosk. (4) A brief shot shows one boy walking alone on a sidewalk at night. (5) The final shots return to the Dragonball game, showing the character Goku on screen and the boy actively using the touch-screen interface.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, rhythmic electronic music starts immediately. A female voice with a clear, professional tone typical of public transit announcements says in English: 'The next station is...', followed by 'Tokyo' in Japanese. (2) As the music maintains a steady dance beat, the female voice continues to list Tokyo districts in sequence: 'Shibuya', 'Asakusa', 'Shinjuku', 'Roppongi', 'Akihabara', 'Ginza', and 'Tsukiji'. (3) Faint sounds of arcade machines, including mechanical clicking and synthesized bells, are layered beneath the music. (4) Toward the end, the same female voice announces, 'The doors on the left side will open' in English. No speech from the children is audible.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'THE NEXT STATION IS' appears in bold white text as a hook. (2) Functional text identifies each location corresponding to the audio: 'TOKYO 東京', 'SHIBUYA 渋谷', 'ASAKUSA 浅草', 'SHINJUKU 新宿', 'ROPPONGI 六本木', 'AKIHABARA 秋葉原', 'GINZA 銀座', 'TSUKUJI 築地'. (3) 'THE DOORS ON THE LEFT SIDE WILL OPEN' appears in white text near the end. (4) Game titles like 'DRAGONBALL SUPER DIVERS' and gameplay status 'GREAT!!' are visible on screens.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro crosswalk scene -> Fast-paced montage of arcade gaming in various districts -> Outro gameplay shot.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main young boys, 1 woman accompanying them, 2-3 blurred passers-by in the background of arcade scenes.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young boys with short black hair, wearing matching horizontal black and white striped shirts and shorts. One boy wears black-rimmed glasses.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Features various Japanese urban settings: a sunlit street with a crosswalk, several brightly lit indoor arcades filled with colorful game cabinets, neon lights, and glowing screens, and a dimly lit night-time storefront with shutters.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Activity Sequence -> Conclusion

The video uses the creative framing of a Japanese train announcement to link disparate arcade visits into a unified travel 'journey' across different city districts.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While brands like Dragonball and Pokemon are visible, they are part of the setting (arcade games) rather than a paid promotion.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a side-profile shot of a woman in a black and white striped shirt and beige overalls talking and smiling in a brightly lit indoor arcade. (2) The scene cuts to a young boy in a black cap and matching striped shirt focused on playing a 'Dragon Ball Super Divers' arcade machine, pressing buttons and interacting with cards. (3) The camera alternates between the woman speaking to the camera and the kids enthusiastically playing games, showing other children and a man in the background within the dense, machine-filled arcade environment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks in Mandarin with a cheerful and explanatory tone, accompanied by fast-paced, electronic background music typical of a gaming center. (2) The soundscape is filled with the high-pitched bleeps, button-mashing sounds, and mechanical noises of arcade machines. (3) Ambient chatter and the overlapping sounds of multiple games create a busy, immersive field recording atmosphere.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text in large yellow and red font appears: '跑來日本打?' (Came to Japan to play?), '台灣就可以打機台!' (You can play machines in Taiwan!), and '浪費時間?' (Wasting time?). (2) Functional subtitles in white with yellow outlines provide the dialogue: '帶他們來玩 就是讓他們開心的就好' (Bringing them here to play is just to make them happy). (3) The branding 'Dragon Ball Super Divers' is visible on the top of the gaming machines.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a black hoodie is running outdoors on a city sidewalk, looking determined and speaking intensely to the camera. (2) The scene shifts indoors to a kitchen/studio where she continues speaking, then begins eating fried chicken and fries with another woman in a gray shirt. (3) Both women point to their skin and faces, gesturing to indicate dryness or irritation while looking concerned. (4) Close-up shots of NIVEA Repair & Care lotion and cream bottles are shown on a white table with decorative plants. (5) The main woman applies the cream to her hands, arms, and legs, showing the texture and the resulting glow on her skin. (6) The two women stand together, holding the products and smiling enthusiastically. (7) The video ends with a final comedic shot of the woman in the gray shirt eating more fried chicken.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy upbeat pop music begins with a female voice shouting enthusiastically about weight loss goals. (2) The music continues as background music (BGM) while two female voices engage in a dialogue, with a tone that shifts from complaining about skin issues to being excited about a solution. (3) Sound effects (SFX) like 'dings' and 'pops' accompany the appearance of product features and text overlays. (4) The main female voice provides a detailed narration of the product's benefits in a friendly, persuasive tone. (5) The audio concludes with casual laughter and a final humorous comment over fading BGM.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '下週要拍照' (Functional: Intent to look good for a shoot). (2) '我要認真減肥!!', '不要脂肪' (Decorative: Humorous weight loss hook). (3) '不要蔥花', '不要蒜頭' (Decorative: Food preferences). (4) '換季過敏', '臉容易乾癢' (Functional: Describing skin problems). (5) '0香料 0防腐劑 0酒精', '10% GLYCERINA + PANTHENOL' (Functional: Product ingredients/specs). (6) 'NIVEA Repair & Care', '妮維雅' (Functional: Brand name). (7) '妮維雅MOMO有獨家限量優惠' (Functional: Call to action for purchase).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro running hook -> Discussing skin issues -> Product demonstration and application -> Call to action

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman in a striped t-shirt and denim shorts on all fours, wiping a wooden floor with a pink cloth; she has a neutral to slightly tired expression. (2) The scene cuts to her sitting on a large white sectional sofa, wrapped in a blanket, eating snacks from a clear plastic tray while looking content. (3) She is then seen standing in front of a walk-in closet, pulling out various garments on hangers and tossing them aside with a playful, dismissive gesture. (4) The scene shifts to her wearing sunglasses and holding a microphone, dancing and singing energetically on the sofa. (5) Finally, the camera shows a view from behind a closing door, then cuts back to the woman who is now frantically wiping the floor again with a panicked and wide-eyed expression.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, mid-tempo Mandopop song with female vocals begins. (2) The music continues at a steady volume while the sound of chewing or soft plastic rustling is heard during the couch scene. (3) The female voice speaks in a conversational, slightly humorous tone during the closet scene, accompanied by the sound of hangers clicking. (4) The audio transitions to a high-energy, louder dance track with energetic singing and rhythmic beats. (5) A sharp 'door opening' sound effect occurs, followed by a popular 'Barbecue' meme song which is a fast-paced, high-pitched electronic track with repetitive panicked vocals.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '當老公獨旅不在家' (When husband is on a solo trip and not at home) appears as a white hook at the top center. (2) '衣某一樣沒在穿' (Clothing I don't wear anyway) and '三宅一生沒在穿' (Issey Miyake I don't wear) appear as subtitles in the middle. (3) '惜福季+1' (Blessing season +1) appears as a small decorative caption. (4) '哇了哇了哇了 BBQ了' (Oh no, it's barbecued/ruined) and '真的完蛋了' (It's really over) appear as functional subtitles at the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro (Pretending to clean) -> Middle (Being lazy and messy) -> Outro (Panic cleaning when husband returns)

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a female character in a white helmet and pink pants being assisted by a male instructor in a green suit while on a snowboard in a snowy area. (2) A fast-paced montage follows, showing the female character falling repeatedly in various ways on a wide, sunny ski slope surrounded by mountains and trees. (3) A brief shot from a moving ski lift looking down at the slopes is shown. (4) The character is then filmed from behind and the side successfully performing 'S-turns' down the mountain, maintaining balance and control. (5) The final sequence shows the character snowboarding towards the camera with a confident smile, falling playfully at the end and waving to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, high-energy pop song with a steady electronic beat and synthesized melodies starts immediately and plays throughout. (2) Sounds of a snowboard carving through snow and the impact of the board hitting the ground during falls are layered over the music. (3) A female voice speaking Traditional Chinese provides enthusiastic instruction and commentary during the middle segment, calling out directions like 'Look left' and 'Good'. (4) The video concludes with the music maintaining its tempo as the character waves.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text 'S Turn' appears in a yellow box during the snowboarding demonstration. (2) Variety-show style text '(請目鏡aa...)' appears briefly during a fall segment. (3) Chinese subtitles including '看左邊' (Look left), '左手延伸' (Extend left hand), '蹲' (Squat), '坐' (Sit), and '很好' (Very good) provide instructional context. (4) Large decorative text '漂亮' (Beautiful/Well done) in a red stylized font appears to celebrate a successful turn.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Instructional Setup -> Failure Montage -> Learning Progress (S-Turns) -> Confident Outro

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The prominent placement of the BURTON logo on the snowboard and the instructional nature of the commentary suggest a soft endorsement of either the equipment or a specific snowboarding school.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) 00:00-00:06: A woman in a blue sweater sits at a desk cluttered with books, looking annoyed and pointing her finger aggressively, eventually shouting toward the ceiling while looking distressed. (2) 00:07-00:13: The scene changes to the woman in a pink dress crouching on a play mat, drawing circles on the floor with her finger; she looks sulky and brushes away a hand that tries to touch her shoulder. (3) 00:14-00:19: The woman, now in a green hoodie, giggles and points at a man in a colorful shirt and a woman in red standing in the background. (4) 00:20-00:27: Wearing a black sweatshirt, the woman reacts with dramatic indignation to someone off-camera, eventually reciting something with a mocking expression. (5) 00:28-00:32: The woman in a tan t-shirt makes a crossing gesture with her fingers toward the camera, looking angry. (6) 00:33-00:39: Back in the black sweatshirt, she points at an off-camera person, then turns her palm toward herself while laughing hysterically. (7) 00:40-00:41: Black screen with golden text.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) 00:00-00:06: A high-pitched female voice speaks in a complaining tone, followed by an upbeat, playful woodwind and percussion BGM. (2) 00:07-00:13: A male voice asks a question in a soft tone, followed by the female voice shouting "Don't touch me!" with a sharp, annoyed pitch. (3) 00:14-00:19: The female voice chants a rhythmic, taunting nursery-rhyme-like phrase about boys and girls. (4) 00:20-00:27: A brief dialogue occurs where a voice asks to borrow something and the woman shouts "No!" followed by a longer, rhythmic mocking chant. (5) 00:28-00:32: High-decibel female shouting expressing anger and a desire to break ties. (6) 00:33-00:39: Playful banter ending in loud, genuine female laughter. (7) 00:40-00:41: BGM fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "超線" - Decorative Hook text, dramatic tone. (2) "吼~你超線了啦 老師" - Functional subtitle, complaining tone. (3) "(愛告狀)" - Decorative label, teasing tone. (4) "地板繞圈圈" - Decorative Hook text. (5) "你還好嗎" - Functional subtitle, concerned tone. (6) "不要碰我啦" - Functional subtitle, angry tone. (7) "(是要轉幾圈)" - Decorative caption, sarcastic tone. (8) "男生愛女生" - Decorative Hook text. (9) "男生愛女生羞羞臉" - Functional subtitle, mocking tone. (10) "小氣鬼喝涼水" - Decorative Hook text. (11) "筆借我一下" - Functional subtitle, inquisitive tone. (12) "小氣鬼喝涼水 喝到半夜變魔鬼" - Functional subtitle, rhythmic mocking tone. (13) "切八段" - Decorative Hook text. (14) "我要跟你切八段" - Functional subtitle, angry tone. (15) "指別人就是指自己" - Decorative Hook text. (16) "你很笨欸" - Functional subtitle, teasing tone. (17) "(無情笑場)" - Decorative label, humorous tone. (18) "還有什麼底下的留言" - Call to action text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Vignette 1 (Classroom) -> Vignette 2 (Sulking) -> Vignette 3 (Teasing) -> Vignette 4 (Stingy) -> Vignette 5 (Conflict) -> Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a woman in a blue shirt looking wide-eyed and terrified at something off-screen while holding a water bottle. (2) Transition to a woman in a pink striped outfit standing in a room filled with figurines and collectibles; she gestures towards a desk and then reveals a silver LED face mask. (3) She demonstrates the mask by holding it up to her face and pointing out its features. (4) Multiple split-screen and overlay shots show the mask emitting different colors (red, blue, purple) while the woman is seen wearing it in various settings, such as working at a laptop or walking. (5) Before and after photos of the woman's face are shown to highlight skin improvements. (6) The woman walks through a doorway wearing the glowing pink mask, startling the woman in the blue shirt from the first scene again. (7) Close-up of the woman in the mask looking directly at the camera, followed by the woman in blue smiling awkwardly.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A loud, high-pitched scream or surprised shout opens the video. (2) Fast-paced, upbeat background music with a steady rhythm begins. A female voice provides enthusiastic and professional narration in Mandarin. (3) A brief male voice is heard asking a question off-screen during the product demonstration. (4) Occasional 'whoosh' and 'ding' sound effects punctuate text appearances and scene transitions. (5) The video ends with a comedic, spring-like sound effect (boing) and a short silence.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: 'POV: 被劇透了還是想看' (POV: Spoiled but still want to watch) with a shocked tone. (2) Decorative text: '很亂' (Very messy) appearing over a desk. (3) Functional text: 'iRESTORE 愛麗朵爾光透美容面罩' (iRestore Light-Transmitting Beauty Mask) providing product information. (4) Feature descriptions: '調理膚況' (Conditioning skin), '改善暗沉' (Improving dullness), '紅光' (Red light), '藍光' (Blue light), '紫光' (Purple light), '懶人模式' (Lazy mode). (5) Instructional text: '一週3次' (3 times a week), '持續3-6週' (Lasts 3-6 weeks). (6) Comparison text: 'BEFORE' and 'AFTER' shown over facial photos. (7) Closing text: '(我長得很可怕嗎?)' (Do I look scary?) and '(沒有)' (No).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Gag -> Product Introduction -> Feature Demonstration -> Results Comparison -> Outro Gag

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with two women standing behind a large white towel with red Chinese text, partially obscuring their faces. One woman wears a white dress with a lace headscarf, while the other wears a black mesh top with a red beret. (3) They are seen laughing together on a couch, looking into a decorated mirror, and finally standing in front of a 'haha baby' brand sign. The video ends with a hand tearing through a paper layer to reveal a promotional text graphic.

(2) The music continues as the primary sound source. Faint sounds of laughing and exclamations are heard periodically over the music. (2) 'haha baby': Brand logo appearing on posters and a signage board.
