perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Three women are dressed in anime-inspired costumes (one in a blue and orange Goku-style suit, one with purple braids and a yellow jacket, and one with long red hair and a yellow skirt). They stand in a shop and perform a synchronized hand-dance to upbeat music. (2) They continue the dance with various finger-pointing and heart-shaped gestures. (3) The woman with purple braids suddenly breaks formation and runs away from the camera, followed by the red-haired woman. The woman with purple braids slips on the floor and falls on her back. (4) The fall is repeated in a slow-motion, black-and-white edit for comedic effect.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat Japanese pop song starts immediately with energetic male/female vocals and a fast electronic beat. (2) The music continues steadily throughout the dancing sequence. (3) A sudden, exaggerated 'thud' and sliding sound effect (SFX) is heard as the woman falls. (4) The J-pop music continues as the background audio while the sound of the fall is emphasized.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'POV：躲了一個下午你當仔到...' (Traditional Chinese) appears at the top, setting a humorous scenario of being caught. (2) Decorative Text: '得了一回滑倒🤣' appears during the replay of the fall to highlight the humorous accident.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Dance performance -> Sudden chase -> Comedic accident

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: No explicit product promotion detected.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man and a young girl stand in an outdoor parking lot wearing matching white t-shirts with 'haha baby RUN' bibs; they perform a high-five and the girl begins running away from the camera. (2) The man stands in place, counting down from five to one using his fingers, then proceeds to walk in an exaggeratedly slow manner towards the camera. (3) The scene transitions to a grainy, slow-motion montage of the girl running down a tree-lined road, eventually reaching a point where she turns around and gestures with her hand. (4) The man returns to the frame in a close-up shot, pointing back towards the girl and speaking with an expressive, surprised facial expression.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks energetically in Mandarin with an upbeat tone; ambient outdoor sounds of wind and distant cars are audible; a sharp 'clap' sound effect occurs during the high-five. (2) The male voice counts down '5, 4, 3, 2, 1' in Mandarin; the sound of footsteps on asphalt is heard. (3) The background audio shifts abruptly to a slow, melancholy piano and string melody with an emotional, melodramatic feel; a female voice (camerawoman) is heard laughing softly in the background. (4) The melancholy music cuts off, replaced by the man's loud, high-pitched vocal reaction and more background laughter.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text at the top: 'POV: 我的老公很會跑步' (POV: My husband is very good at running - Tone: Sarcastic/Humorous). (2) Functional subtitles for dialogue: '嘎哥讓你5秒再跑啦' (Ga-ge lets you run for 5 seconds first) and '來囉' (Here I come). (3) Decorative/Effect text during the countdown: '5', '4', '3', '2', '1' in a stylized font; emotional captions during the slow-mo: '(老闆很...)', '(人生就是要這樣向前衝)', '(不要害怕任何挑戰)' (Tone: Ironical/Inspirational). (4) Final decorative text: '嘎小朋友表示' (The kid says) and '你才!!!' (You are!!!).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Challenge -> Comedic Countdown -> Melodramatic Slow-mo Montage -> Reaction/Punchline

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Challenge -> Absurdist Slow-mo -> Reaction
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a comedic skit designed to entertain the audience through a subversion of expectations. It starts with a competitive 'running' hook between a father and daughter, uses a melodramatic montage to mock the child's small effort, and concludes with a punchline about the child's supposedly rude gesture toward her father.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Both main characters are prominently wearing matching apparel from the brand 'haha baby', which is owned by the influencer in the video.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy comedic hosting style characteristic of 'Cai A-ga' (嘎哥); family-oriented humor.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of 'melodramatic' editing for a trivial action is a common comedic trope in East Asian short-form video content to create an ironical contrast.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman sitting up in a bed with colorful sheets and green sausage-shaped pillows; she stretches her arms and yawns as '01:00 pm' appears. (2) She is then seen walking slowly and sleepily down a brightly lit white hallway, wearing a blue floral nightgown. (3) The scene shifts to her at a dining table, bringing a plate with bread and eggs and a blue mug; she sits and begins to eat. (4) While eating, she checks her smartphone and her expression shifts to shock. (5) A fast-paced montage shows her running back down the hallway. (6) Finally, she dives back into the same bed, pulling the covers over her head as 'Good night' text appears.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music begins immediately with a female voice singing lyrics in Mandarin Chinese. (2) The music continues at a steady volume as the sound of footsteps is faintly audible over the track. (3) As the woman looks at her phone, a sudden 'record scratch' or dramatic impact sound effect plays, followed by a momentary silence. (4) Loud, exaggerated snoring sound effects replace the music as the woman goes back to sleep.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '我的一天' (My day) with '01:00 pm' - Title hook establishing the theme. (2) '不小心賴床' (Accidentally stayed in bed) with '01:15 pm' - Descriptive caption. (3) '先吃飽再說' (Eat my fill first) with '01:30 pm' - Humorous caption about priorities. (4) '好慵' (So lazy) - Emotional sticker. (5) '怎麼已經要兩點了' (How is it already almost 2 o'clock?) - Hook text conveying panic. (6) '晚安' (Good night) - Final decorative text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro (Waking up) -> Daily Activity (Eating) -> Conflict (Time check) -> Resolution (Going back to sleep)

It uses fast-paced editing and synchronized sound effects to emphasize the humor of her low productivity.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a green tracksuit with the number 222 stands against a white wall. He is suddenly 'eliminated' and falls over as a person in a pink jumpsuit and mask appears behind him. (2) Two women in similar green tracksuits sit on the floor. Woman 333 looks anxious, while woman 001 smiles confidently and pulls out a blue box of 'hahababy' supplements. (3) The scene shifts to woman 001 demonstrating how to eat the supplement, then transitions to various indoor locations showing off the products and promotional gifts like a colorful storage box and a white rolling suitcase. (4) The women are shown tossing the product boxes into the air and laughing. Finally, they sit around the man from the first scene, who is lying on the floor, and offer him a supplement while the masked figure stands over them.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a male voice calling out '222 OUT' followed by a loud gunshot sound effect and tense, cinematic music. (2) Two female voices engage in a dialogue in Mandarin Chinese; one sounds worried and high-pitched, while the other is calm and cheerful. (3) The background music transitions into an upbeat, energetic pop track. A male narrator's voice enters, speaking clearly and professionally about the product's benefits and the 11.11 sale details. (4) In the final segment, the music changes to a playful, repetitive nursery-rhyme-style melody with upbeat electronic tones.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text shows numbers like '222號' and the status 'OUT'. Korean and Chinese text asks 'Who is next?'. (2) Decorative text captures the dialogue: '怎麼辦 怎麼辦 完蛋了' (expressing panic). (3) Product names and features appear: 'hahababy 嚼益粒 PharmaGABA', '壓力大 難入睡' (highlighting stress and sleep issues). (4) Promotional details are displayed: '雙11哈比狂歡購', price '$4180', and gift descriptions like '折疊收納箱' and '兒童行李箱'.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Skit Hook -> Product Demonstration -> Promotional Offer -> Playful Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a young woman in a plaid shirt closing the door of a red luxury car, followed immediately by a transition to the same woman riding a scooter in a street environment. (2) The scene shifts to a bright office where several people are standing around desks with laptops; it then cuts to a shot of the woman sleeping face-down on a desk with a yellow hoodie over her head. (3) The woman is seen excitedly running past a display case holding a white Prada bag; it then cuts to her sitting down, opening a plain yellow recycled cardboard box as if it were a wallet, revealing cards inside. (4) The woman is shown eating a large oyster in a restaurant setting; the final cut shows her sitting at her desk in the office, focused on a laptop while eating a bowl of instant noodles with chopsticks.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop song starts immediately, featuring a rhythmic male vocal chant repeating a phrase that sounds like 'Gongzhu qingshangche' (Princess, please get in the car). (2) The music remains consistent in tempo and volume throughout the entire video, with no changes in the soundscape. (3) No ambient environment noises, speech, or additional sound effects are audible over the background track.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '你以為的老闆出門（外出有專車接送）' - Decorative text appearing at the start, conveying a mock-glamorous expectation of a boss's commute. (2) '實際上（自己騎機車回家）' - Decorative text appearing during the scooter scene, revealing a humble reality. (3) '你以為的老闆上班（事情很多處理不完）' - Decorative text during the office scene, describing a busy work expectation. (4) '實際上（公司比較好睡）' - Decorative text during the sleeping scene, showing a lazy reality. (5) '你以為的老闆消費（名牌、全妝、標配緻）' - Decorative text during the Prada scene, describing luxury spending habits. (6) '實際上（拿回收盒當錢包）' - Decorative text during the box-wallet scene, showing extreme frugality. (7) '你以為的老闆伙食（天天吃大餐）' - Decorative text during the oyster scene, describing high-end dining. (8) '實際上（吃自家的不用花錢）' - Decorative text during the noodle scene, suggesting the person is eating their own brand's products to save money.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: A series of rapid 'Expectation' vs. 'Reality' juxtapositions following a rhythmic pattern.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Expectation -> Reality -> Expectation -> Reality
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a comedic skit designed to deconstruct the idealized image of a successful 'boss' or entrepreneur. By contrasting stereotypical luxury with humorous, relatable, and sometimes absurd daily struggles (like sleeping at the office or using a cardboard box as a wallet), the content aims to build a more authentic and approachable persona for the creator while providing entertainment.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The main character is shown eating instant noodles that belong to her own brand, as suggested by the '实际上（吃自家的不用花錢）' text and the visible packaging.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Expectation vs. Reality trope using the 'Princess please get in the car' trending audio.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages a trending audio format in the Sinosphere to promote the creator's own products in a self-deprecating and humorous way.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in a blue and yellow traditional costume and a woman in a pink floral dress argue intensely in an outdoor garden area. (2) A second, younger-looking woman in a pink and white dress appears; the man embraces her happily while the first woman watches with an annoyed expression. (3) The first woman points at the younger woman, revealing a secret that causes the man to look shocked. (4) The younger woman poses cutely and points to her face, then holds up a pink sachet. (5) Transition to a product montage: pink boxes of 'hahababy' collagen jelly are shown on a table, followed by a close-up of the jelly being squeezed out of a sachet. (6) A white suitcase is shown being packed with various colorful boxes of health supplements (green, blue, pink). (7) The three actors from the beginning reunite on screen, posing and waving in front of the garden background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, high-pitched dialogue in Hokkien (Taiwanese) between a man and a woman, accompanied by light, rhythmic background music. (2) A sharp sound effect (SFX) plays when a secret is revealed, followed by more animated dialogue. (3) At approximately 46 seconds, the audio shifts to a professional male narrator speaking Mandarin in an upbeat, promotional tone. (4) The background music changes to a bright, energetic pop track with a steady electronic beat. (5) Sound effects of items being placed in a suitcase (thuds) and soft rustling are heard during the product showcase.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional white subtitles appear at the bottom to translate the Hokkien dialogue into standard Chinese characters. (2) Functional text 'hahababy 膠原冰晶凍' (Collagen Jelly) appears in a stylized font. (3) 'hahababy 全新推出' (New Launch) appears as a title card. (4) Nutritional benefit text: '內含專利魚膠原蛋白' (Contains patented fish collagen), '冰晶番茄萃取物' (Crystal tomato extract), '玻尿酸與維生素C' (Hyaluronic acid and Vitamin C). (5) List-based text for the 'Health Supplement Set': '酵素凍' (Enzyme jelly), '益生菌' (Probiotics), 'GABA', 'DHA'. (6) '陪你輕鬆美一天' (Accompaniment for a beautiful day) appears at the end as a closing hook.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Comedy Skit Hook -> Secret Reveal -> Product Explanation & Demo -> Group Call to Action

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens on a busy city street where three young women are standing; the woman in the center, wearing a beige hoodie and an Adidas cap, talks excitedly to the camera with expressive hand gestures. (2) The scene transitions to the interior of a skincare factory/laboratory where a man in a white lab coat and hairnet explains the facility to the main woman (now also in protective gear); subsequent shots show large stainless steel vats, mechanical stirring of clear liquids, and laboratory equipment like viscometers and incubators. (3) Automated machinery is seen filling red dropper bottles and green plastic bottles, followed by a worker inspecting them and a machine sealing boxes in plastic. (4) The video returns to the street where the three women summarize their visit, laughing and waving goodbye.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music plays throughout; a high-pitched, energetic female voice speaks quickly. (2) A calm, steady male voice enters briefly to explain technical details, followed by various mechanical sound effects including 'swishes' for transitions, beeps from equipment, and the rhythmic clicking of the assembly line. (3) Multiple female voices are heard laughing and talking simultaneously at the end, concluding with a synchronized 'bye-bye' as the music fades.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text: '訪廠行程 - 保養品工廠' (Visit itinerary - skincare factory). (2) Descriptive text for the process: '原物料檢驗' (Raw material inspection), '四大菌種去培植' (Cultivating four major strains), '層層把關 請安心!' (Strict control, please rest assured!), '添加滿滿功效成分' (Adding full efficacy ingredients). (3) Production details: '配方打樣' (Formula sampling), '低溫培養箱' (Low-temperature incubator), '自動化填充' (Automated filling), '雙重檢查' (Double check). (4) Hook/Emotional text: '準備交到你們手上囉 <3' (Ready to be delivered to your hands) and '下次見拜拜' (See you next time bye bye).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Factory process montage -> Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women, one in a green top and one in a striped shirt, walk along an outdoor wooden pathway while conversing with expressive gestures. (2) The scene shifts to close-ups of dried tea leaves in a palm, followed by the process of weighing tea, dripping hot water over a filter, and showing a single steeped tea leaf. (3) A sequence shows the preparation of milk tea: pouring milk over boba pearls, stirring, and a finished cup with a 'Rencha' logo. (4) The women are seen again indoors, tasting the drinks with exaggerated squinting and nodding expressions. (5) A man appears at the end, taking a large sip of the drink and making a wide-eyed, shocked face directly at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-tempo electronic background music starts immediately. Two female voices engage in a rapid-fire, high-pitched conversation with frequent laughter. (2) The background music lowers slightly as a female narrator (off-screen) provides a clear, energetic description of the tea-making process. (3) Intentional sound effects (SFX) such as 'dings' for emphasis and slurping sounds are heard when the characters drink. (4) The video concludes with the music maintaining its pace and a short, humorous comment from a deep-toned male voice.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative text 'Weather so hot' with flame emojis and 'Rencha' title card appears. (2) Functional text listing product features: 'Selection of Taiwan original tea leaves', '8-hour ice lock', and 'Kuang Chuan fresh milk'. (3) Promotional hook: 'Three branches across Taiwan' and 'White Jade Pearls' shown with glowing effects.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the quality and craftsmanship of Rencha milk tea by emphasizing premium ingredients like Taiwanese tea leaves and fresh milk, framed within a humorous and energetic vlog format to appeal to a young audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of brand logo, detailed explanation of product benefits, and clear CTA showing store locations.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy comedic editing with sudden facial zoom-ins and variety show-style text graphics.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses 'pain points' (hot weather) to introduce the solution (refreshing tea) and leverages exaggerated human reactions to build brand memory.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A group of young people cheer and wave in a brightly lit studio setting while a white office chair is spun in the foreground. (2) In a fast-paced montage, different main characters take turns sitting on the chair as it finishes spinning, each posing with specific items including a red suitcase, skincare products, a neck pillow, and a gift bag. (3) The video concludes with a man wearing glasses sitting on the chair and lifting a red three-tiered trolley above his head while the background group continues to celebrate with confetti.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic pop music starts immediately with loud, synchronized group cheering and shouting. (2) Every few seconds, a distinct 'whoosh' sound effect occurs, synchronized with the spinning of the chair on screen. (3) The high-tempo music and enthusiastic vocal cheering continue consistently until the end of the clip, maintaining a festive atmosphere.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '11.08 - 11.11 哈比狂歡購' - Hook text indicating the sale event dates and title. (2) '天天抽好禮' - Hook text regarding daily gift draws. (3) '優惠沒得比' - Hook text emphasizing price discounts. (4) '免運不打烊' - Hook text about 24/7 free shipping. (5) '還有滿額禮' - Hook text regarding gifts for specific spending thresholds. (6) '就在hahababy' - Functional text identifying the brand and platform.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Character/Product Montage -> Brand CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 6 main characters appear sequentially on the chair, while approximately 3 background performers cheer throughout.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> List-based Product Display -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To generate excitement and urgency for a limited-time shopping carnival (11.08-11.11). By using a high-energy group atmosphere and a fast-paced 'spinning chair' reveal format, the video highlights multiple incentives like free shipping and gifts to drive consumers to the hahababy brand.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of products and brand name 'hahababy' with specific sale dates and benefits.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-spinning chair transitions and high-energy group cheers.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the '11.11' shopping festival context common in East Asian e-commerce marketing.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long dark hair leans over a desk with a laptop and a polka-dot box, speaking with expressive hand gestures and a determined facial expression. (2) The scene cuts to her dancing next to a black suitcase in a bright room, then transitions to an office where a man in a black wig and glasses joins her in a synchronized dance. (3) A third person joins them in a hallway; they dance excitedly while holding various colorful patterned suitcases. (4) The final scene shows a group of about six people in front of a 'hahababy' logo wall, dancing energetically with numerous colorful bags and suitcases before striking a final pose.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched and energetic female vocals speaking in Mandarin. Background includes faint ambient office sounds. (2) An upbeat, fast-paced electronic pop song with repetitive rhythmic Japanese vocals (Shikanoko trend) begins abruptly. (3) The music continues at a steady high volume with occasional swoosh sound effects during scene transitions. (4) The music reaches a crescendo as the group cheers and the song finishes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: "不會買hahababy 雙11狂歡購" (Don't know how to buy hahababy Double 11 Carnival Sale) - Energetic tone. (2) Functional Text: "我教你怎麼買!" (I'll teach you how to buy!) - Assertive tone. (3) Decorative Text: On-screen subtitles for the song lyrics appear in sync with the music rhythm.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional advertisement for the brand 'hahababy' targeting the 'Double 11' shopping festival. It utilizes a trending social media dance challenge ('Shikanoko') to create an energetic, fun, and viral-ready atmosphere, showcasing various suitcases and bags as props to encourage viewers to participate in the upcoming sale.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The brand name 'hahababy' is prominently displayed in text overlays and on a studio logo wall; brand products are the central focus of the dance choreography.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Specific brand logo wall and branded suitcases
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The strategic use of a viral meme trend combined with high-energy group participation suggests a professional marketing campaign aimed at younger demographics on short-video platforms.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in pink pajamas with a bubble tea print sits on a bed, yawning and looking tired. (2) Sudden transition to a vibrant room decorated with posters; four women wearing sunglasses and casual dresses dance and jump energetically on a bed. (3) Back to the woman in pajamas, she lies down and covers herself with a brown bubble tea patterned blanket, smiling contentedly. (4) The group of four women continues to dance and wave blankets around. (5) The woman is shown lying in bed again, while a digital graphic of a bedding set and pricing information appears on the right side of the screen. (6) The women playfully toss a red and white checkered blanket over a man lying face-down on a small bed.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo, upbeat electronic pop music starts instantly, featuring a heavy kick drum and bright synthesizers. (2) High-pitched female vocals enter, singing a remix of the song 'Barbie Girl' with an energetic and playful tone. (3) The music continues at a steady, high-energy pace without interruption until the end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "不管是自己睡..." - Meaning 'Whether sleeping by yourself', expressed in a calm, introductory tone. (2) "還是一群人不睡" - Meaning 'Or a group of people not sleeping', expressed in a lively, contrasting tone. (3) "hahababy MIT 床包組" - Functional text identifying the brand and product. (4) "陪你一夜好夢" - Meaning 'Accompany you to a night of sweet dreams', providing an emotional hook. (5) "雙11組合優惠中!" - Functional text highlighting a Double 11 shopping festival promotion. (6) "數量有限~要買要快!" - Urgent hook encouraging immediate purchase.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro (sleeping alone) -> Intercut of partying group vs. sleeping comfortably -> Product pricing display -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main woman in pajamas, 3 other women dancing (total 4 females), and 1 man lying on a bed at the end.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing pink pajamas with a bubble tea pattern.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Contrast -> Solution -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote 'hahababy' brand bedding sets during the Double 11 shopping festival. The video uses a high-energy contrast between quiet sleep and a loud 'party' atmosphere to suggest that the product is perfect for any situation, emphasizing comfort and fun design.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of brand name 'hahababy', product showcase, and specific pricing/sale information for the Double 11 festival.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of the bubble tea (pearl milk tea) motif which is a popular cultural icon in Taiwan.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leans heavily into the 'Gen Z' or 'Millennial' aesthetic with vibrant colors, fast cuts, and trending music to appeal to a younger consumer demographic.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a striped dress stands next to a large prop designed to look like a boarding pass for 'HAHABABY AIR LINES', pointing at the text 'Taipei to Seoul'. (2) A series of fast-paced cuts follows: characters measuring height with a yellow tape, a person standing on a scale while others watch, a woman with long black hair using a colorful polka-dot hair dryer, a man wearing a translucent face mask, a man packing/unpacking small pouches into a large red suitcase, a man showing his arm muscles to a woman, children wearing colorful floral hoods and sunglasses, people in oversized chains and streetwear role-playing, two men laughing at a black face cutout, and a man holding a child while greeting another man. (3) The video concludes with a group shot of adults and children wearing matching 'hahababy' branded hoodies, smiling and looking at the camera as the child walks forward.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music starts immediately. A high-pitched female voice speaks enthusiastically, accompanied by background cheers. (2) The soundscape becomes a mix of short dialogue clips, loud laughter, and expressive exclamations ('Wow!', 'Hey!'). Sound effects like 'ding' or cartoonish accents punctuate the scene transitions. (3) The music maintains its high energy until the end, finishing with the collective laughter of the group and a final upbeat chord.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: 'hahababy 直播播什麼' (What does hahababy livestream?) appears in a yellow/black bubble. (2) Functional labels appear chronologically: '量身高?' (Measure height?), '量體重?' (Measure weight?), '吹頭髮?' (Blow hair?), '敷面膜?' (Face mask?), '收行李?' (Pack luggage?), '秀肌肉?' (Show muscles?), '午睡一下?' (Nap?), '角色扮演?' (Role play?), '玩遊戲?' (Play games?), '影分身?' (Shadow clone?), '認親?' (Identify relatives?), '殘酷二選一?' (Cruel choice?), '卸妝?' (Remove makeup?), '餵寶寶?' (Feed baby?). (3) Final promotional text: '啊!還有很多抽獎' (Oh! And many giveaways), '這兩天也都有直播' (There are livestreams these two days), '期待和大家線上見!' (Look forward to seeing everyone online!).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Fast-paced montage of variety show activities -> Promotional Outro

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Demonstration -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as a promotional teaser for an upcoming 'hahababy' brand livestream event. By showcasing a variety of humorous and chaotic 'behind-the-scenes' style activities—such as game-playing, product demos, and family interactions—it aims to build excitement and curiosity about what will happen during the actual broadcast.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video features the brand logo 'hahababy' prominently, shows branded products, and explicitly mentions upcoming livestreams and giveaways for the brand.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Usage of the 'hahababy' branding and the appearance of the Tsai Ah-ga family influencers.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The fast editing and variety-show style captions are characteristic of modern Taiwanese social media marketing trends meant to retain viewer attention.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a young woman in a black mesh top and blue leggings dancing energetically towards the camera in front of a white two-story building labeled 'haha baby HAMU CAFE'. (2) A series of fast-paced cuts follow, showing a group of young men and women in various colorful outfits playfully grabbing, pushing, and pulling each other while shouting excitedly at the camera; the main woman appears in the center of most shots with exaggerated expressions of shock and excitement. (3) The scene shifts to a group shot where the main woman points her finger and speaks directly to the camera, with the rest of the group standing behind her nodding and waving. (4) The video concludes with the group in a chaotic, celebratory huddle, jumping and cheering together.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music starts immediately with heavy bass. (2) A female voice shouts excitedly in Mandarin, followed by a chorus of voices shouting in unison. (3) The audio alternates between the main female speaker giving an announcement and the entire group shouting energetic phrases, accompanied by sound effects of crowd cheering and high-pitched comedic accents. (4) The background music maintains its intensity throughout, ending on a high-energy group cheer.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'hahababy 雙11活動' (Double 11 Event) appears in a playful font, setting the promotional hook. (2) '今天最後一天' (Today is the last day) appears to create urgency. (3) '贈品都要被人搶光了' (Gifts are about to be snatched up) emphasizes high demand. (4) '你還不結帳!' (You haven't checked out yet!) serves as a direct call to action with a humorous, demanding tone. (5) '一年一次的最殺優惠' (Once a year best discount) highlights the value proposition. (6) '錯過等明年啦' (Miss it and wait until next year) reinforces the time-sensitive nature of the offer.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro dance -> Chaotic comedy skits -> Direct-to-camera announcement -> Outro celebration

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Urgency -> CTA -> Celebration
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a high-energy promotional advertisement for the brand 'hahababy' during the Double 11 (November 11th) shopping festival. It uses comedic physical acting and a sense of chaotic urgency to inform viewers that it is the last day of the sale and to encourage immediate purchasing (checking out).

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of the brand name 'hahababy' and the Double 11 sales event, with call-to-action text for shopping.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Variety-show style captions and high-energy ensemble performance typical of Taiwanese influencers like 2Uncle.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes the 'Fear of Missing Out' (FOMO) psychological trigger by emphasizing the limited time and high demand for gifts.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman in a blue floral t-shirt waking up and stretching in a modern, brightly lit hallway; she appears energetic and cheerful. (2) She moves to a bathroom and vanity area where she performs a skincare routine, including washing her face, applying serum with a dropper, and spreading cream on her cheeks. (3) She transitions to selecting an outfit, putting on a grey zip-up hoodie and matching shorts, and packing a colorful polka-dot tote bag. (4) She is seen consuming a small blue supplement packet. (5) Leaving her apartment, she uses a keypad lock and then rides a black electric bicycle with white tires through a city street and past a park. (6) She arrives at a building labeled 'hahababy HAMU CAFE' and enters. (7) Inside an office/studio space, she interacts with colleagues, looking at a laptop, and then participates in a professional photoshoot involving lighting equipment and a photographer. (8) As evening falls, she returns home, sets an alarm on her smartphone, and applies a printed facial mask. (9) Finally, she takes another supplement from a dark blue box and collapses onto a bed with a smile.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, mid-tempo pop song with female vocals begins immediately and continues throughout the video. The tone is cheerful and bright. (2) Occasional sound effects are layered over the music, including the mechanical click of a camera shutter during the photoshoot segment. (3) Towards the end, a distinct digital beeping sound mimicking a phone alarm is heard. (4) Ambient city noise or wind is not audible, as the music dominates the entire soundscape. (5) No direct speech or dialogue from the on-screen characters is heard; the audio is purely music and functional SFX.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative text: '李佩潔 的一天' (Li Peijie's Day) appears as a title at the start with a playful font. (2) Functional text: 'hahababy' brand name appears on various product packagings including supplements and masks. (3) Decorative text: '空的!' (Empty!) appears in a speech bubble during the photoshoot to emphasize a playful moment. (4) Functional text: 'hahababy 原相機' (hahababy Original Camera) on face mask packaging.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Morning Routine -> Commute -> Work/Shoot -> Evening Routine -> Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a split-screen presentation: the upper half features a 3D animated male idol group performing a dance routine in a modern outdoor plaza, while the lower half shows a young boy in patterned pajamas imitating their choreography in a room with a plain wall. (2) The animated characters transition through various outfits including yellow jackets, pink sweaters, and floral shirts while dancing in synchronization; the boy below maintains focus, mirroring their arm extensions and hand gestures closely. (3) In the final phase, the split-screen ends and the boy is shown standing in front of a purple digital backdrop featuring a female virtual group, striking a pose as if for a promotional poster.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy electronic K-pop track featuring multiple male vocals singing both English and Korean lyrics. (2) The soundscape is dominated by a heavy synth-bass and rhythmic percussion that drives the dance pace; there are no ambient room noises from the boy's environment audible. (3) The music concludes with a clear 'camera shutter' sound effect paired with a lingering synthesizer note.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Korean lyrics '이미', '알고' appear in stylized bubbles. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Large English phrases 'BECAUSE I NEED YOU', 'i'm empty', 'you're my favorite', and 'refresh' appear in vibrant colors following the song's hooks. (3) Functional Text: 'YOU'RE MY SODA POP' and 'MY LITTLE SODA POP' appear in large pink and blue fonts during the chorus to emphasize the song's title.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro dance mimicry -> Continuous choreography sync -> Final poster pose

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a textured grey background and the word 'KOREA' in a stylized font. A hand places a small round convex mirror onto the surface, which reflects three young women at an airport terminal. (2) A series of quick cuts shows the mirror being held in different locations: inside a subway train where the women pose with luggage, inside a Kodak-branded shop surrounded by cameras, and at a Korean BBQ restaurant where they are eating. (3) The mirror is then held up in front of a wall covered in photo booth strips where a young man joins them. (4) The sequence continues at an outdoor night market with food stalls in the background. The video ends with the women waving at the camera in a brightly lit station or mall corridor, transitioning from the mirror reflection back to a direct shot.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio consists of a high-energy K-pop song with a driving electronic beat and female vocals singing in a mix of Korean and English. (2) The music remains at a consistent, high volume throughout the entire video. (3) No ambient environmental sounds, speech from the people in the video, or sound effects are detected; the studio-recorded music track completely masks any other potential audio.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: 'KOREA' and 'REC' camera UI elements appear at the very beginning to set a travel theme. (2) Hook Text: 'POV: 把凸透鏡帶出門會得到...' (POV: What you get when you take a convex mirror out...) is displayed at the top of the screen throughout the montage. (3) Functional Text: Various Korean signs, posters, and 'Kodak' branding are visible in the background of the different locations.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Location Montage -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 3 main female friends are seen throughout; 1 male friend appears in the photo booth scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Three young Asian women wearing casual travel attire including sweaters, beanies, and coats.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a dimly lit KTV room with several young adults sitting on a sofa, looking bored and staring at their smartphones. (2) A woman with long dark hair and a light-colored jacket stands up and starts singing and dancing with a microphone, gesturing wildly. (3) Various shots follow of people dancing energetically, including a woman in a black skirt and a child in an 'OCEAN DREAMER' sweatshirt doing a squat-dance. (4) Two young boys with glasses are seen singing into microphones together. (5) The woman in the light jacket continues to perform for the camera, pointing and making exaggerated poses. (6) The video ends with a group photo of approximately 11 people, including adults and children, smiling and making heart or peace signs in the KTV room.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a recording of a male vocal singing a ballad over soft music, accompanied by the low chatter of people in the room. (2) The soundscape shifts abruptly to a high-energy dance track with a female vocal counting 'one step, two step, three step, four'. (3) An upbeat K-pop style electronic song plays loudly, featuring high-pitched female singing and rhythmic beats. (4) A child's voice is heard singing along to a pop song, followed by cheers and enthusiastic shouting from a crowd of adults. (5) The final phase features a energetic female vocal singing a Mandarin rock/pop song with loud background music and people laughing and cheering in the distance.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '我以為的唱歌局' (What I thought a singing gathering was) - Humorous/Comparative. (2) 'one step, two step...' - Functional/Rhythmic. (3) '中邪?' (Possessed?) - Humorous variety-style caption. (4) '好會扭' (Good at twisting/dancing) - Complimentary/Enthusiastic. (5) '這不只16蹲吧' (This isn't just the 16-squat challenge, right?) - Trendy/Humorous. (6) '才才真可愛' (Caicai is so cute) - Sweet/Affectionate. (7) '左擁右抱好快樂' (Happy embracing left and right) - Joyful. (8) '總監給的粉絲福利' (Fan benefits from the director) - Playful/Humorous. (9) '該上班的時候認真上班 該玩的時候認真玩' (Work hard when you should, play hard when you should) - Motivational/Hook.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro showing expected quietness -> Shift to chaotic, high-energy party atmosphere -> Group photo montage.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a montage of a couple in a park with orange autumn leaves; the girl bends over and the guy lifts her onto his shoulders in a romantic gesture. (2) Transition to an indoor studio with white walls where a girl in a grey long-sleeve crop top and patterned blue jeans bends over. (3) A guy in a black jacket and white pants runs from the background and jumps over the girl's back repeatedly. (4) The guy performs an exaggerated, silly walk and shouts while the girl laughs and points at him; they both share a moment of intense laughter and comedic posing for the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Soft, romantic piano and string music plays during the outdoor park segment; no vocals are heard. (2) The music shifts to an upbeat, rhythmic pop song with female vocals. (3) Sudden loud, high-pitched male shouting ("Agh!") occurs in sync with the guy's jumping actions. (4) Continuous female laughter and further comedic vocalizations from the male speaker layered over the upbeat background music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "别人的浪漫" (Other people's romance): Decorative hook establishing the expectation of a romantic scene. (2) "嘎式浪漫" (Ga-style romance): Decorative hook introducing the comedic subversion. (3) "嘎3岁" (Ga 3 years old): Descriptive text mocking the male character's childish energy. (4) "甚至有点怀疑他的理由" (Even suspecting his reasons): Comedic commentary on the guy's behavior.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Expectation (Romantic) -> Reality (Comedic Action) -> Outro (Laughter)

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 romantic couple in the intro, 1 comedic duo in the studio segment.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a young woman in a blue oversized hoodie standing on a colorful rainbow-painted crosswalk in a busy city street. (2) A montage follows showing a young man lifting and spinning the woman in various locations: a brick-walled alley, outside a clothing store, and inside a neon-lit arcade. They change outfits into matching school-style uniforms (brown blazers and plaid skirts/trousers). (3) The scene shifts to a large open parking lot where both are wearing white t-shirts with marathon bibs. The man attempts to lift the woman but struggles and fails, leading to a humorous argument where they gesture wildly at each other. (4) The video concludes with a series of romantic-style still photographs of the couple in the previous city locations.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, high-tempo remix of the song 'Love Story' by Taylor Swift starts, featuring clear female vocals and electronic synth beats. (2) As the scene shifts to the parking lot, the music volume drops and loud, excited voices emerge. A male and female are heard shouting in Mandarin with high-pitched, humorous tones. (3) Sounds of shuffling feet and physical effort are audible during the struggle to lift. (4) The 'Love Story' remix returns to full volume for the final photo montage.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'POV: 韓國一日男友 vs 老公' (POV: Korean one-day boyfriend vs husband) appears as a hook at the top. (2) Decorative Text: '整個飛走' (Flying away) appears with sparkling effects during the spinning scene, conveying a whimsical tone. (3) Decorative Text: '一日男友勝' (One-day boyfriend wins) appears in the final photos with a thumbs-up emoji, serving as a humorous conclusion.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Fast-paced montage of romantic lifting -> Humorous fail in a parking lot -> Romantic photo recap.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a female host standing on a bright city street in Korea, gesturing towards a purple electric scooter on the sidewalk. (2) The scene cuts between daytime and nighttime exterior views of the Hongdae area and the guesthouse entrance. (3) The host enters the apartment, showing a minimalist dining area with a long wooden table and then a living room with a green circular rug and a large flat-screen TV. (4) She guides the camera through a clean bathroom, pointing out neatly folded purple towels and various toiletries on a shelf. (5) The tour continues into three separate bedrooms; two rooms feature both a double and a single bed, while the third is a smaller double room. (6) Finally, she showcases the kitchen area, which includes a refrigerator, microwave, and an integrated washing machine, ending with a positive hand gesture.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic electronic pop music with a steady rhythm begins. A young female voice speaks in a friendly, enthusiastic tone in Mandarin Chinese, introducing the location. (2) The music continues as the primary audio layer while the host provides a continuous descriptive narration of the apartment's interior features and proximity to the subway. (3) There are very few ambient sounds; the focus remains on the BGM and the clear, studio-like quality of the voiceover. (4) The audio maintains a consistent volume and pace until the video concludes with a final energetic remark.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '韓國弘大民宿' (Korea Hongdae Guesthouse) appearing as a colorful title at the start. (2) Functional Text: '弘大7號出口B1' (Hongdae Exit 7 B1) indicating the specific location. (3) Functional Text: 'RODEM HOUSE' identifying the guesthouse name. (4) Functional Text: Multiple section labels like '餐廳' (Dining Room), '客廳' (Living Room), '浴室' (Bathroom), '第一間(3人房)' (First Room - 3 people), and '廚房' (Kitchen) appear chronologically to guide the tour. (5) Hook Text: 'CP值超高' (Extremely high CP value) at the end to emphasize the value for money.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Location Context -> Interior Room-by-Room Tour -> Utility Overview -> Recommendation

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with rapid close-ups of colorful posters and logos on glass windows. (2) A woman in a red hoodie and a man in a yellow-and-white checkered shirt pose energetically with large, character-themed cushions in front of a branded backdrop. (3) Shots transition between various merchandise items like small pouches, lanyards, and pillows, followed by a close-up of fried food in a bucket. (4) The scene shifts to a press-style event where the two main characters stand behind a microphone stand, surrounded by a large crowd of photographers and reporters with various recording equipment. (5) The woman in the red hoodie is seen speaking directly towards the camera in a room filled with merchandise, holding up different items like a colorful lanyard and a pink plush bag. (6) The characters are then shown wearing face masks and blue gloves, working behind a fast-food service counter, interacting with customers and handing over branded paper bags. (7) A montage follows showing the woman happily eating a piece of fried chicken and breaking open a small bun to reveal a dark filling. (8) The video concludes with several group photos of the main characters posing with a large crowd of fans and staff, all giving thumbs up or peace signs.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic pop music with a fast tempo starts immediately and remains constant. (2) Multiple voices are heard simultaneously, creating a lively atmosphere of a public event; a male voice speaks enthusiastically followed by a clear female voice. (3) The female voice becomes dominant, delivering a fast-paced, high-pitched, and excited narrative in Mandarin. (4) Subtle sound effects like 'pops' or 'dings' are heard accompanying the visual transitions of products. (5) Occasional background chatter and camera shutter sounds are audible during the press conference and store service segments.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text includes dates like '2025.01.15' and 'MAR 31 2025' indicating the campaign period. (2) Product prices such as '$399', '$379', and '$479' are shown next to specific items. (3) Decorative 'hook' text appears in large, bold Chinese characters including the brand names 'TKK Fried Chicken' and 'haha baby', as well as promotional phrases like 'One day store manager' and 'limited collaboration'. (4) Functional subtitles provide a literal transcription of the woman's narration regarding the product details and availability.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Event Promotion -> Product Showcase -> Behind-the-scenes Service -> Food Tasting -> Community Celebration

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with her hair in a bun and a black graphic apron smiles brightly while holding a finished plate of stir-fried pork towards the camera. (2) The scene shifts to a kitchen counter where she adds sliced onions and white green onion stems into a white ceramic frying pan using chopsticks. (3) She adds thin slices of raw pork into the pan and stir-fries them quickly. (4) She seasons the mixture with a pinch of salt from a white bowl and a splash of soy sauce from a bottle. (5) Fresh green scallion sections are added and tossed with the meat. (6) She pours the cooked contents onto a white ceramic plate and garnishes the dish with fried garlic cloves. (7) A close-up shot shows the steaming final dish as the title appears.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, mid-tempo electronic background music starts immediately with a rhythmic beat; no vocals are detected. (2) The sound of sizzling oil and ingredients hitting the hot pan begins as the cooking process starts. (3) Rhythmic clicking and clinking sounds of chopsticks interacting with the pan are heard over the music. (4) The ambient sizzling continues until the plating is finished, and the BGM concludes with the final shot.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: "onion" and "洋蔥" appear, neutral instructional tone. (2) Functional Text: "white part of green onion" and "蔥白", neutral instructional. (3) Functional Text: "sliced pork" and "豬肉片", neutral. (4) Functional Text: "quick stir-fry" and "爆炒", emphasizing the action. (5) Functional Text: "salt" and "鹽巴", neutral. (6) Functional Text: "soy sauce" and "醬油", neutral. (7) Functional Text: "scallion sections" and "蔥段", neutral. (8) Functional Text: "stir evenly" and "均勻拌炒", instructional. (9) Functional Text: "serve on a plate" and "盛盤", instructional. (10) Functional Text: "garnish with garlic" and "蒜頭裝飾", instructional. (11) Hook Text: "香蒜洋蔥豬肉片 Stir-fried Pork with Garlic and Onions", informative and appetizing final title.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a busy airport check-in area. A young woman in a purple sweater is standing in line, looking at papers; a hand reaches into her backpack's side pocket and takes a tissue. (2) A brief meme-style insert of an elderly woman speaking is shown, followed by a shot of someone's feet. (3) Back at the airport, the camera focuses on a brown backpack; hands reach in and successfully extract a red water bottle and then a blue pouch while the owners are distracted. (4) The camera shows various family members (a man in an orange jacket and a woman in a black sweatshirt) laughing as they realize their items were 'stolen'. (5) The final shot shows the woman in the black sweatshirt looking at her open backpack.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic music starts immediately. Background noise of a crowded airport terminal is audible. (2) Female voices are heard laughing and speaking in Mandarin, sounding excited and playful. (3) A rhythmic heartbeat SFX plays during the close-up shots of the 'theft' occurring. (4) High-pitched laughter and exclamations follow as the family members discover the prank. (5) The music continues until the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV: 出國前找媽東西被偷' (POV: My mom's stuff being stolen before going abroad) - Hook/Functional. (2) '(小偷一號)', '(小偷二號)' (Thief No. 1, Thief No. 2) - Decorative/Descriptive. (3) '初級挑戰: 水壺' (Primary challenge: Water bottle) - Hook. (4) '成功拿走' (Successfully taken) - Effect text. (5) '媽，包包下次記得關' (Mom, remember to close your bag next time) - Closing hook.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Prank execution (stealing items) -> Reveal and family reactions.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in an indoor office setting with three women. One woman with reddish-brown hair is talking to another. (2) A series of flashbacks occur with a bright, glowing filter, showing one woman in a white sweater crying and drinking, interacting with her friends. (3) Back in the present, the woman in the white sweater holds her head as if hungover. A friend brings a bottle of honey and mixes a drink. (4) Detailed shots follow showing a green bottle of cleansing gel being applied to the woman's face and massaged into her skin. (5) Different colored capsules (yellow, black, white) are held up to the camera and then shown being swallowed. (6) The video ends with the women interacting around a gift bag and a final shot of the brown-haired woman holding a syringe-like object.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with fast-paced, high-pitched female dialogue and upbeat, lighthearted background music. (2) Sound effects like 'ding' and 'whoosh' emphasize transitions and text appearances. (3) During the flashback segments, the voices are louder and more dramatic, conveying a sense of drunken chaos. (4) In the present-day scenes, the tone becomes more helpful and calm as products are introduced, though still maintaining a humorous energy. (5) There is a continuous layer of catchy, pop-style BGM that ties the various segments together.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Traditional Chinese subtitles appear throughout to transcribe the dialogue. (2) Decorative captions like '一萬件???' (10,000 pieces???) and '加薪???' (Raise???) appear in large fonts to show shock. (3) Functional product labels appear on screen: '蜜理純生封蓋蜜' (Honey), 'Mi浮 麥盧卡藍銅植萃洗卸凝膠' (Cleansing Gel), and 'Mi酒 閃酒膠囊' (Alcohol Metabolism Capsules) with descriptions of their functions.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video uses a flashback structure to show a night of drinking followed by the morning hangover and the products used to recover.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a pink and green sweatshirt sits at a wooden desk with a backdrop of shelves filled with action figures and toys; she looks at the camera and smiles. (2) A man in a brown cardigan walks through a hallway decorated with colorful caricatures on the wall; he stops and looks surprised with wide eyes. (3) A woman with dark hair and a plaid shirt sits at a desk with a laptop; she looks up and makes a peace sign with her hand. (4) A man in a beige t-shirt and camouflage pants crouches in an office space, looking directly at the camera with a grumpy or angry facial expression. (5) A fast-paced montage follows, alternating between these four individuals as they repeat their expressions and gestures in sync with a rhythmic beat, accompanied by a large orange text overlay that scrolls vertically.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice off-camera is heard asking questions in Mandarin. In response, four different individuals speak single words: a woman says 'No', a man says 'Oh', a woman says 'Yeah', and a man says 'Gee' with various emotional tones (happy, surprised, happy, angry). (2) An upbeat, high-tempo K-pop track with synthesized percussion and keyboard melodies fades in. (3) The individual vocal clips ('No', 'Oh', 'Yeah', 'Gee') are edited into a loop, perfectly synchronized with the rhythm of the music and the song's original lyrics, creating a rhythmic vocal remix.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Questions in yellow such as '你可以幫我很開心的說No嗎？' (Can you help me say 'No' happily?) appear at the bottom. (2) Decorative Text: Phrases like '滿臉？？？' and '(這還是很配合)' appear as character thoughts or variety-show style commentary. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman wearing a green long-sleeved crop top and white pants holds up a white T-shirt with blue and yellow polka dots in front of a decorated Christmas tree. (2) She lays the T-shirt on a round white table and uses scissors to cut the bottom hem into numerous thin vertical strips. (3) Close-up shots show her hands tying pairs of these strips together in knots to close the bottom of the garment. (4) She folds the shirt in half and cuts along the armholes and neckline to transform the torso into a bag shape with thick straps. (5) She cuts the straps into three sections each and braids them together to create decorative handles. (6) She ties the ends of the braids and proudly displays the finished fringed bag, carrying it on her arm and shoulder while smiling at the camera.

A female voice speaks in a lively, high-pitched, and enthusiastic tone in Mandarin. (2) As she begins cutting, the sound of rhythmic scissor 'snips' is mixed with her voice. (3) The narration continues with a helpful instructional tone, occasionally punctuated by 'ding' and sparkle sound effects during key visual transitions. (4) The music remains consistent in energy until the end, where her voice becomes even more excited as she reveals the final product.

Tie!', 'DIY Tassle Bag' appears in a variety-show style with colorful fonts to emphasize key moments. (4) Closing text: 'Handheld or Shoulder bag' highlights the versatility of the product.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a brightly lit airport terminal. A group of friends is standing near a check-in counter; one woman is carrying a massive pink plush toy shaped like Crayon Shin-chan. A man in a grey hat gestures and talks excitedly to her. (2) The scene shifts to an indoor arcade (Mint Play). A chronological montage shows several different friends (Kiki, Anita, +0, KID, etc.) attempting a skill game where they must stop a digital timer exactly at 10.00 seconds. They press a large orange button, and the screen displays their near-misses (e.g., 10.04, 9.68). (3) A woman named Amy takes her turn and stops the clock. The glass door of the prize cabinet suddenly swings open. The group reacts with shock and intense joy, jumping and screaming. A man reaches in and pulls out the giant pink plush toy. The video ends with the group posing for a commemorative photo with the prize.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with lively Mandarin Chinese dialogue, laughing, and the ambient noise of a busy airport. A light, upbeat, and whimsical BGM plays in the background. (2) As the setting changes to the arcade, the soundscape is filled with electronic arcade BGM, mechanical button clicks, and digital beeps from the game timer. Each failed attempt is accompanied by the group groaning or shouting in disappointment. (3) When the prize door opens, there is a sudden burst of high-pitched screaming and cheering. A triumphant, high-energy BGM takes over as the group celebrates loudly with laughter and clapping until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: "我要申請機位" (I want to apply for a seat) appears as a variety-style caption. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: Player labels like "選手1號：Kiki" and "選手10號：Amy" appear to track the game. Result overlays like "失敗 10.04" (Failed 10.04) and "差一點點" (So close) emphasize the tension. (3) Hook/Conclusion Text: "門開了!" (The door opened!) appears in large yellow letters. Final text reads "謝謝蔡宗翰" (Thank you Cai Zonghan) and "此次遊戲金主" (The sponsor of this game) to credit the friend who paid.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at airport -> Montage of failed game attempts -> Successful prize win -> Celebration and group photo.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with two women in an industrial setting, one wearing a yellow sweater and the other in a dark green sweatshirt. They stand in front of shelving units. (2) Transition to a factory floor filled with rows of large white automated knitting machines. A close-up shows the carriage of a machine moving rapidly back and forth across a needle bed, with spools of blue and purple yarn on top. (3) The women hold up a large, orange-brown knitted panel with a diamond cable-knit pattern. (4) A middle-aged woman wearing a face mask and glasses is seen operating a circular linking machine, meticulously joining pieces of the orange knitwear. (5) Close-up shots show hands manually tucking in loose threads and sewing on labels using a white sewing machine. (6) The scene shifts to large industrial washing and drying machines; one shows soap suds through the round glass door. An older man in a red polo shirt explains the machine's function. (7) An older man in a plaid shirt uses a heavy industrial steam iron on a purple knitted garment, with visible steam rising. (8) A worker uses a lint roller on the purple garment laid flat on a table. (9) Final shots show various workers in the background and a close-up of a 'Linking Department' sign.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music plays continuously. A young woman's voice speaks enthusiastically, introducing the factory. (2) The sound of industrial machinery—rhythmic clicking and whirring—becomes audible as the camera shows the knitting machines. (3) The primary female voice continues to narrate the steps, punctuated by occasional sounds of steam hissing during the ironing phase. (4) A brief dialogue occurs where an older man's voice is heard explaining the washing process, followed by the presenters laughing and reacting with 'Oh!' sounds. (5) The music remains the dominant layer throughout, maintaining a cheerful and educational tone until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '終於來啦' (Finally here! - Decorative/Hook). (2) '織布中...' (Knitting in progress... - Functional). (3) '20幾個線頭!!!' (More than 20 thread ends!!! - Emotional). (4) '師傅好厲害啊' (The master is so amazing - Emotional sticker). (5) '洗兩次' (Wash twice - Functional). (6) '完全不落地' (Completely off the ground - Hook/Promotional). (7) '變蓬蓬鬆鬆的' (Became fluffy - Emotional). (8) '標籤車縫中...' (Label sewing in progress... - Functional). (9) '超仔細!!!' (Super detailed!!! - Emotional). (10) Process diagram showing: '手工 -> 品檢 -> 包裝' (Handmade -> Inspection -> Packaging - Functional).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A group of five young adults is seen dancing in a studio setting. The central figure, a woman wearing sunglasses and a brown-and-white varsity jacket over a brown shirt and black pants, leads the choreography. Above them, a picture-in-picture window displays an animated clip of three seals performing the same synchronized dance. (2) The dancers perform a series of rhythmic arm movements, hip sways, and side-to-side steps that mimic the movements of the seals on the screen. The background features a grey wall with 'Da tou fo' logos and a bright green curtain. (3) Toward the end, the camera angle shifts slightly as the dancers turn around, briefly showing the back of the varsity jackets which have 'Hairy Baby & Mujon' printed on them.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, upbeat Korean pop song plays. A female vocalist sings catchy, repetitive phrases in a rhythmic, playful tone. The tempo is moderately fast and consistent. (2) The background music consists of bright electronic beats and synthesized melodies that synchronize perfectly with the vocal rhythm. (3) There are no discernible ambient noises or sound effects, indicating a high-quality studio recording or a direct audio track overlay.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Static decorative text on the wall background reads 'Da tou fo' accompanied by a cartoon face logo. (2) Another background sign features the words 'HAIRY BABY' and some Korean characters. (3) The text on the back of the jackets says 'HAIRY BABY & MUJON' in a stylized font, conveying a brand-centric or team-identity tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a constant rhythmic dance performance from start to finish.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a man in a white T-shirt and white headphones sitting in front of a microphone, looking surprised and then smiling. (2) A series of clips follow showing a recording session in a studio with soundproof walls. A woman in a blue top and a woman in a striped shirt take turns singing into microphones while wearing professional headphones. (3) The man in the white T-shirt (Zonghan) is shown singing his parts with exaggerated facial expressions, hitting high notes. (4) The scene transitions between different 'takes' marked by on-screen text, showing the participants laughing and reacting to each other's singing. (5) In the final segment, all three individuals are seated together at a wooden table, singing in unison into their respective microphones, looking happy and energetic.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and lighthearted background music plays as a male voice speaks in a surprised tone. (2) The soundscape shifts to the isolated vocals of the female singers repeating the phrase 'ha ha ha baby baby ha' in a rhythmic, melodic way. (3) Interspersed between singing takes are sounds of studio banter, laughter, and an off-camera male voice providing direction and feedback. (4) The man in the white shirt sings the same melody in a high-pitched, slightly strained but comical voice. (5) The video concludes with a loud, synchronized vocal chorus from all three participants singing the main melody together over the upbeat BGM.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '蔡宗翰!!! 唱歌竟然被誇獎!!' (Cai Zonghan!!! Actually praised for singing!!). (2) Decorative Hook: '那天我以為...' (That day I thought...), '重金邀請...' (Invited with big money...). (3) Functional Labels: '二伯 TAKE 1', '+0 TAKE 1', '宗翰 TAKE 2', indicating the recording attempt numbers. (4) Emotion/Variety Text: '裝可愛!!!' (Acting cute!!!), '很棒!!!' (Great!!!), and subtitles for the spoken dialogue explaining the recording process.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Individual Vocal Takes -> Feedback/Banter -> Final Group Chorus

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman stands in an urban plaza with her father, talking to the camera with expressive hand gestures and a smiling face. (2) The scene transitions to a group walking up a long set of stone stairs in a lush, green outdoor setting; close-up shots focus on their sneakers (UStini brand) as they step. (3) The woman and her parents sit on a wooden bench in a narrow alley with a green door background, discussing the shoes and pointing at them. (4) Close-up macro shots of the shoe's interior and sole are shown, featuring a red probe touching metallic fibers and highlighting the sole's texture. (5) The woman returns to a talking-head shot outdoors, giving a thumbs-up and final recommendation, followed by a brief shot of her father laughing.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo acoustic guitar and percussion BGM starts. A young woman speaks in an energetic, friendly tone in Mandarin. (2) The sounds of footsteps on stone stairs are audible over the continuing music. The woman and her parents exchange brief, breathless remarks while hiking. (3) A male narrator's voice enters, sounding professional and instructional, explaining product features. (4) The woman's voice returns, conversational and persuasive, mixed with her mother's soft-spoken testimony. (5) The BGM swells slightly for the outro as the woman and her father laugh together.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional subtitles translate the dialogue about the father living in Taipei. (2) Decorative hooks like "Young people's life" and "Need to exercise after eating" appear in colorful variety-show styles. (3) Technical text overlays explain "UStini Grounding Technology," "Conductive Yarn," and "Ohm Plate." (4) Promotion details appear: "Discount 100 NTD" and the code "2uncle987."

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Physical Activity (Hiking) -> Product Feature Demonstration -> Testimonial/Recommendation -> CTA

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens on a brightly lit stage during the day where a male and female host in colorful outfits point at the crowd while standing behind a transparent lottery box filled with tickets. (3) Transitions show the venue (Lihpao Resort) at night with a large Ferris wheel in the background; performers in vibrant, polka-dot costumes dance on stage while the crowd holds red crab-shaped light sticks. (4) Close-ups of children in the audience singing along and wearing themed hats and costumes. (5) A dramatic fireworks display lights up the night sky over the resort buildings. (6) The video concludes with the hosts back on stage, the female host appearing tearful and emotional while they both wave goodbye to the camera.

(2) The audio shifts to include loud, synchronized crowd cheering and the ambient noise of a large outdoor gathering. (3) High-pitched singing from performers on stage is layered with rhythmic percussion from the BGM. (4) Loud, booming sound effects of fireworks exploding are heard clearly during the night montage. (5) In the final segment, the female host's voice becomes shaky and emotional with audible sobbing and sniffing between words as she speaks into the microphone, accompanied by gentle piano and crowd applause.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a white hoodie and sweatpants is seen in a room filled with racks of clothing; she starts a rhythmic, running-like dance movement, looking excited. (2) As she moves through the doorway, more people join her, forming a line and mimicking her running gestures. They pass through an office kitchen area where others are working or packing bags. (3) The scene shifts to a hallway where about 10 people are now in a line, running with their arms outstretched like airplanes, smiling and laughing. (4) The final segment is a high-angle outdoor shot showing a long line of approximately 30 people running in sync down a street, continuing the same rhythmic arm and leg movements.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic music with a strong, repetitive bass beat begins immediately. (2) The music remains constant as the intensity of the scene increases; there are faint sounds of group cheering and laughter buried under the track. (3) No clear spoken dialogue is detected, only the rhythmic BGM which syncs with the physical movements of the people on screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: 'POV：當你發現這週末是hahababy路跑' (POV: When you find out this weekend is the hahababy road run). The tone is humorous and sets the context for the organized group movement.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with three children showing off their packaged gingerbread houses, with a boy in a red shirt appearing particularly excited. (2) The scene shifts to an indoor classroom/studio where a female teacher in white explains the activity to a group of children and parents. (3) Sequence of individual children (labeled Student 1-5) are shown preparing icing and assembling gingerbread biscuits. (4) Humorous moments are captured: one boy in glasses sneaks a lick of the icing, and a younger boy in a blue shirt is caught eating a biscuit, reacting with a guilty but cute smile. (5) A montage follows showing the assembly process where adults help kids apply icing to biscuit 'roofs' and 'walls'. (6) Each child poses happily with their finished, decorated gingerbread house in a transparent box. (7) A group of children shouts 'Merry Christmas' together; the boy in the blue shirt accidentally drops his box, causing the gingerbread house to shatter. (8) The final segment shows the teacher/mom attempting to repair the broken house in a black-and-white 'sad' filter before ending with a shot of the intact houses before the accident.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and festive Christmas-themed background music plays at a steady tempo. (2) High-pitched children's laughter and excited voices are heard continuously throughout the clip. (3) A clear female voice (teacher) provides instruction and playful commentary in Mandarin. (4) Specific sound effects (SFX) such as 'boing' sounds or 'ding' sounds are added during funny or transition moments. (5) The audio peaks with a collective shout of 'Merry Christmas' followed by a noticeable 'thud' sound as the box hits the floor and subsequent gasps/laughter from the onlookers.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '親子DIY薑餅屋' (Parent-child DIY Gingerbread House) sets the theme. (2) Labeling Text: '手作老師3三伯' identifies the instructor, while '學員1號' through '學員5號' identifies the children. (3) Hook/Effect Text: '哥哥怎麼在偷吃' and '啊!被抓到了...' highlight humorous moments of kids eating ingredients with a playful tone. (4) Decorative Text: 'Merry XMAS' appears during the final celebration. (5) Narrative Text: '樂極生悲...' (Joy turns to sorrow) and '嘗試補救中!!!' describe the accidental drop and repair attempt with a humorous and sympathetic tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Instructional Demo -> Activity Montage -> Climax (Accident) -> Humorous Resolution

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female teacher, 1 male adult assistant, 5 main children (3 boys, 2 girls), and at least 1 other adult parent visible in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main teacher is a female with long dark hair tied back, wearing a white zip-up hoodie. The primary child featured is a young boy in a blue 'LA' Dodgers t-shirt and light blue Crocs.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a nighttime exterior shot of a Daiso department store building in Korea with its bright red logo. (2) A hand is shown holding various skincare products like 'Boncept Retinol Serum' and 'Medipeel Extra Super 9+' in front of store shelves. (3) A close-up split-screen comparison shows a nose with visible blackheads (Before) and a smooth, clean nose (After). (4) A young woman with her hair clipped back appears, holding the products to her face and pointing at her nose. (5) Close-up shots follow, demonstrating the texture of a white gauze strip. (6) The woman applies liquid from a white bottle onto the gauze and then presses the gauze onto her nose. (7) She is then seen applying a green mud mask specifically to the bridge and sides of her nose. (8) She massages the area and eventually washes her face with water. (9) She applies drops of a soothing serum using a pipette and then rubs a white cream onto her nose. (10) The video ends with a side-by-side product display of all items used: Medipeel, Mamonde, Madeca 21, and Boncept.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, fast-paced electronic pop track with a catchy melody begins immediately and continues throughout the video. (2) A male voice provides energetic Mandarin narration, introducing the 'Korea Daiso' finds and the 'nose care combination'. (3) The narrator's voice is high-pitched and enthusiastic, guiding the viewer through each step of the skincare routine. (4) Subtle sound effects like 'shimmers' or 'pops' occur during product transitions and text pop-ups. (5) The music stays at a consistent volume, supporting the instructional tone of the narration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '韓國大創' (Korea Daiso) - Functional text identifying the location. (2) '超高CP值' (Super high CP value) - Decorative hook text emphasizing affordability. (3) '養鼻組合' (Nose care combo) - Functional title for the tutorial theme. (4) '臺幣400不到' (Less than 400 TWD) - Hook text highlighting the low price. (5) '使用前/使用後' (Before/After) - Functional labels for comparison shots. (6) '第一步' (Step 1), '接著用' (Then use), '3-5分鐘後' (After 3-5 mins) - Functional step-by-step instructions. (7) '貼心提示' (Warm tip) - Friendly hook for advice. (8) '趕快截圖!' (Take a screenshot now!) - Call to action hook at the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at store -> Product reveal -> Step-by-step skincare tutorial -> Results and summary
