perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a live-action lifestyle vlog. A woman with her hair in a bun, wearing a red and white striped top, attaches a red floral 'Merry Christmas' wreath to a white wall. (2) She moves to a dining area and spreads white cloths across two long wooden tables, then adds a long, red, crinkled fabric runner. (3) She decorates a small green artificial Christmas tree with gold and bronze baubles, a star topper, and fairy lights. (4) A decorative garland featuring greenery, pinecones, and red berries is laid out across the center of the dining table. (5) Star-shaped string lights are hung on a nearby cabinet. (6) She sets the table with white plates, wooden chargers shaped like reindeer, and silverware. (7) A collection of colorful canned drinks is arranged on a plaid cloth. (8) In a kitchen setting, she is shown chopping cauliflower and large King Oyster mushrooms on a grey cutting board. (9) The final phase shows a large group of young adults gathered around the feast, tearing apart a whole roast chicken and waving excitedly at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A cheerful, mid-tempo upbeat instrumental track begins, featuring synthetic percussion and bright melodic lines. No vocals are detected. (2) The music continues consistently through the decoration and food preparation segments, maintaining a festive and energetic atmosphere. (3) At the very end of the video, the background music continues as a large group of people synchronously shout 'Merry Christmas' with high-pitched, joyous, and celebratory energy.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'Merry Christmas' is seen written in gold script on the red wreath, setting the holiday theme. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: 'Merry Xmas' appears in a red festive font centered on the screen during the final group shot, serving as a celebratory hook.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with two young women in a modern white kitchen; one wears a black off-the-shoulder top and holds a jar and spoon, while the other in a black t-shirt holds a phone. (2) A quick cut shows a third woman in black gym wear looking concerned while touching her chin, then she walks toward a white water dispenser in the background. (3) Back to the first two women who look surprised or excited at their phones. (4) Close-up shots of the 'Geng Yuan' black sesame powder jar and a spoon lifting the fine grey powder into a double-walled glass. (5) The main woman is seen tasting the mixture with a smile. (6) Detailed shots show the powder being mixed with hot water to create a thick paste and whole black sesame seeds on a small plate. (7) The video concludes with all three women standing together in the kitchen, presenting stacks of the sesame powder jars toward the camera with enthusiastic expressions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop-style BGM starts immediately with the sound of female voices chatting enthusiastically. (2) At 0:05, the distinct sound of a water dispenser filling a cup is heard over the music. (3) A female narrator (one of the on-screen women) begins a fast-paced, high-pitched, and friendly promotional pitch, describing the texture and benefits of the sesame powder. (4) Subtle sound effects of clinking spoons and stirring are layered under the narration. (5) The music continues at a consistent volume as the narrator discusses calcium and fat content. (6) The video ends with a synchronized group cheer/tagline from all three women as the music reaches a final beat.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles appear throughout the video translating the spoken dialogue. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: '耕沅 94細高鈣芝麻粉' appears as a large title identifying the brand and product. (3) Decorative Text: '粉末細緻', '冷水或冰水都好沖泡', '不容易沉澱' highlighting product features. (4) Data Comparison Text: '鈣質每100g 1800mg vs 1400mg' and '脂肪每100g 35mg vs 53mg' comparing the product to others. (5) Hook Text: '老人小孩 補充鈣質' and '真的很好喝' appear at the end to appeal to target audiences.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair wearing a black sweatshirt waves at the camera in a room filled with clothing and accessories. (4) She displays Puffee brand makeup puffs in various packaging and swatches a product on her hand and applies it to her face. (5) She holds up multiple packages of THE BOM eyeliner pencils and demonstrates applying a light-colored pencil under her lower eyelid. (6) She displays TAG eyebrow pencils and applies one to her eyebrow. (7) She holds up Son & Park lip and cheek balm tins, swatching them on her hand and dabbing them onto her cheek. (8) She shows TAG lipsticks in rotating tubes and applies them to her lips. (9) The video ends with a shot of the Daiso store sign, her shopping basket full of products, and a flat lay of all the featured products on a table.

perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '沒想到效果這麼好' (Didn't expect the effect to be so good) - Surprised and happy tone. (2) '喝10天就感覺到氣色更好' (Felt better complexion after drinking for 10 days) - Informative tone. (3) 'Before' and 'After' - Comparative functional text. (4) 'TKLAB DOUBLE 特級膠原飲' (TKLAB Double Super Collagen Drink) and '6000mg' - Product details. (5) '喝起來就像莓果果汁，酸甜清爽' (Tastes like berry juice, sweet and sour and refreshing) - Sensory description. (6) '10天內就讓你氣色好狀態好' (Good complexion and state within 10 days) - Promotional hook. (7) '以後大家直播都不用開美肌' (No need for beauty filters in live streams anymore) - Humorous and confident hook. (8) '實習生下班' (Intern off work) - Scene context.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Personal hook -> Before/After evidence -> Product feature explanation -> Social sharing with colleagues -> Playful outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator throughout, plus 3 female colleagues in the office scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with dark hair styled in a high bun, wearing a black oversized sweatshirt and later a light-colored t-shirt. She is very expressive and energetic.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic bedroom/living area with figurines and posters; a studio with tripods and professional lighting; and an office with computers, audio mixing boards, and white curtains.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lighting, very clear and even.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Demonstration/Evidence -> Technical Details -> Social Validation -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as an enthusiastic product endorsement for TKLAB Super Collagen Drink. It aims to convince viewers of the product's immediate efficacy (the 10-day claim) and pleasant taste by showing a personal transformation, detailing the high collagen content (6000mg), and demonstrating its popularity among office colleagues. The ultimate goal is to drive sales by framing the product as a lifestyle essential that replaces the need for beauty filters.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Holding the product box and sachet directly to camera, showing 'Before/After' results, mentioning specific product names and ingredients, and handing it to others as a recommendation.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy 'bestie' style recommendation combined with fast-paced editing and variety-show style captions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of an office environment and the 'intern' label makes the high-end beauty claim more relatable to a working-class or student demographic. The emphasis on 'no beauty filter needed' taps into current social media trends regarding skin authenticity.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a young woman walking through a busy night market. She is wearing a blue denim-style short-sleeved shirt over a white tank top. She looks towards the camera and begins speaking while walking forward. (2) As she moves, she uses various hand gestures, occasionally pointing to herself or gesturing outward to emphasize her speech. Her facial expressions are engaged and thoughtful. The background shows various street food stalls, neon signs, and people walking in the opposite direction. (3) She continues her walk, passing by a Samsung store and other street vendors. She holds a smartphone in her left hand during parts of the walk. The camera follows her movement at a consistent distance, capturing her from the waist up.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a gentle, upbeat acoustic guitar melody playing as background music. A female voice is heard speaking clearly and calmly in Mandarin Chinese, sharing a personal narrative. (2) The acoustic music continues at a steady tempo throughout the speech. Ambient noise from the night market, including distant chatter and muffled street sounds, is audible but kept at a low volume to ensure the speaker's voice is prominent. (3) The speaker's tone remains consistent, friendly, and reflective until the video ends, with no significant changes in the soundscape or sudden sound effects.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 自己年輕的時候也是 (I was also like that when I was young) - Reflective tone. (2) 不懂得怎麼講 (Didn't know how to speak/express) - Explanatory tone. (3) 不管是你有困難 (No matter if you have difficulties) - Functional text. (4) 願意講出來的人是比較好的 (People who are willing to speak out are better) - Encouraging tone. (5) *無效抱怨 (Ineffective complaining) - Variety-show style label. (6) 但你抱怨事情不會解決 (But complaining won't solve things) - Logical/Advice tone. (7) *勇於開口 (Dare to speak up) - Hook/Call to action. (8) 一起變好的機會 (A chance to get better together) - Positive/Inspirational tone. (9) 懂的對事不對人 (Know how to focus on the matter, not the person) - Life lesson. (10) *放寬心接受批評 (Open your heart to accept criticism) - Variety-show style caption.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Personal Reflection -> Life Philosophy -> Encouragement

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, approximately 7 passers-by in the background of the night market.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a light blue denim shirt over a white top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Bustling night market street with bright neon signs for food stalls, a Samsung retail store, parked motorcycles, and various shops.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Artificial night lighting from shop signs and street lamps.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Personal Experience -> Moral/Lesson -> Practical Application
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to provide emotional value and career advice to viewers by sharing the creator's personal journey from being poor at communication to becoming resilient and open. It emphasizes that direct communication is more effective than complaining and that professional growth comes from being able to separate personal feelings from business matters.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video content is purely conversational and focused on personal philosophy without promoting a specific product.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Walk-and-talk style vlog with direct camera address and life-coaching elements.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a popular short-form format in Taiwan where influencers share 'gold nugget' life advice while walking through relatable local settings like night markets.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing oversized pink overalls walks down a white marble hallway and accidentally spills a large quantity of items from her pockets onto the floor. (2) Close-up shot shows a variety of items including pens, notebooks, small bags, and numerous pink supplement sachets scattered on the ground. (3) A woman in a white dress kneels and picks up a sachet, holding it up to show the camera while smiling. (4) The woman in pink takes the sachet back and begins an enthusiastic explanation, transitioning to product shots of 'EVOLSENSE' boxes and liquid being poured onto a plate. (5) The woman in pink is shown in a kitchen setting drinking from the sachet and then demonstrating a capsule supplement. (6) Graphic overlays appear showing SGS test reports and ingredient details. (7) The two women stand together in the hallway, chatting and laughing while holding the products. (8) The main character speaks directly to the camera with high-energy gestures for the final call to action.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic pop background music starts immediately with a loud clattering sound effect as objects hit the floor. (2) A young female voice expresses surprise and curiosity, asking about the product found on the floor. (3) The main female voice responds with a friendly and excited tone, explaining the benefits of the beauty drink. (4) A professional male voice-over enters to provide technical details about ingredients (SGS, Omega-3, Lutein) while the BGM continues. (5) Sounds of a water glass being filled and a capsule being swallowed are audible. (6) The two female voices engage in a playful, fast-paced dialogue with occasional laughter. (7) The main female voice delivers a final loud, enthusiastic promotional message.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: '(?)' appears as items fall. (2) Functional: '瓔研司光之飲' (EVOLSENSE Light It Up Beauty Drink), '高效原料' (High-efficiency ingredients), 'SGS 檢驗食安有保障' (SGS tested food safety guarantee). (3) Functional: '采亮葉黃素' (I See You Lutein Capsule), '全素友善' (Vegan friendly). (4) Hook: '現在都有團購優惠' (Group buy discount available now), '快到首頁點選團購連結' (Go to homepage for group buy link).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Spill) -> Discovery -> Product Demo 1 -> Product Demo 2 -> Technical Proof -> Social Interaction -> CTA

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Product Feature 1 -> Product Feature 2 -> Social Validation -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and sell EVOLSENSE health and beauty supplements (Light It Up Beauty Drink and Lutein capsules). The video uses a relatable 'clumsy' hook to grab attention, followed by a detailed breakdown of product benefits, safety certifications, and a direct incentive via a group buy discount.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product demonstration, mention of group buy links, and focused brand display.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy comedic opening (spilling items) followed by technical narration.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video blends lifestyle influencer aesthetics with professional technical narration to build both relatability and trust.
